name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Remembering John Lewis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Five years since we lost a civil rights hero
|
---

Peter,
Five years ago, we lost a civil rights hero.
Rep. John Lewis was a revolutionary, a fierce opponent of the status quo.
He dedicated his life to challenging and destroying the racist systems of oppression that have plagued this country since its founding.
He was among the Founding Fathers and Mothers of a more just America — men and women who braved guns, billy clubs and bare fists to awaken the conscience of a country. He spoke out against bigotry, police brutality, abuse of power, and violations of the right to protest.
He stood alongside President Lyndon Johnson as the original Voting Rights Act was signed into law in August, 1965. Throughout his life and his career in Congress, John Lewis devoted himself to the fundamental — yet still-unmet — promise of our nation: **the right to vote.**
I am honored to have worked with John Lewis in the struggle to fulfill that promise — an endeavor that included fighting back against gerrymandered maps in Georgia and demanding fair representation for voters across the country, particularly for communities of color in the South whose voting power was being diluted by unfair maps.
He was a beacon of strength as we fought the disenfranchisement of African American voters in Georgia and across the South, just as he inspired the courage of millions across the country throughout his public life righteously fighting for justice for all.
He led with openness, honesty, and the fullness of his being. He “gave a little blood” on a bridge in Selma — in his words — and he gave his life to his country and to all of us.
Today, I am remembering this extraordinary man and renewing my commitment to his fight for justice. I hope you will, too.
In gratitude for all that John Lewis gave us,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

_So to the deep state goons and their grundoon foot soldiers...

_Go ahead. Reboot the kangaroo courts. Spin up your fake news hit pieces. Sling your indictments.

We see right through it. **You told us _not to believe our lying eyes._**

You rigged the system, flooded our borders, buried us in debt, and dragged us into forever wars that never had anything to do with us.

And we’ve got nothing left to lose except our freedom and this country.

Here’s what we believe:
_\- Get rid of the machines.
\- Deport the illegals.
\- Release the files.

_ If that scares the establishment, good. Because we’re done playing nice.

Let’s take our country back, one truth bomb at a time.

Royce White

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

body:
We need to keep up the momentum >>
| **_Look!
Look!
Look!_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92262?t=6&akid=20666%2E878179%2Ek--WIR) | [SAY NO TO KINGS: STAND WITH BERNIE SANDERS AND CHIP IN $7 TO PASS THE NO KINGS ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92262?t=7&akid=20666%2E878179%2Ek--WIR)
---
After today’s No Kings Protests, millions of Democrats are **_FIRED UP_** to hold Trump accountable and end his MAGA reign! 🔥

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Now we know. Trump is definitely on Epstein’s list.
body:
“A pal is a wonderful thing. Happy Birthday — and may every day be another wonderful secret.”
#

On Saturday, I called for the Department of Justice to release the Epstein files.
Yesterday, I put forward a resolution for a vote to put the full weight of the United States Senate behind releasing the Epstein files.
Today, Republicans voted down that resolution.
And just a little while ago, the Wall Street Journal released a page from Epstein’s 50th birthday book, which was compiled by Ghislaine Maxwell (who is currently in prison for what she did while she worked with Epstein).
In that book, there’s a letter from Donald Trump. He signs off with this:
_“A pal is a wonderful thing. Happy Birthday — and may every day be another wonderful secret.”_
If there was still any doubt, that’s gone. Trump is on Epstein’s list.
Republicans in the House and Senate voted to protect Trump and his elite friends today. Pam Bondi and the Department of Justice are doing everything they can to prevent those files from seeing the light of day. Kash Patel and the FBI are probably in the basement throwing them into the industrial shredder as we speak.
They are all in on it. They are all covering up sexual criminals, pedophiles, creeps, lowlifes. Everybody in Trump world and the MAGA right wouldn’t shut up about Epstein until they realized the big guy was guilty as sin. Every accusation is an admission from these people.
We can’t trust the federal government to do their job. We know that. We need those files released, we have to do it NOW — and then we need an independent investigation to charge Trump and all the other scumbags he partied with.
[**They are on the ropes. We need you to rush a signature on our petition demanding the release of the Epstein files. We can’t let up. We can’t let this go. We MUST keep making noise.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/rg_em_sign_epstein_july25/?source=em250717-1-160&akid=3921%2E734936%2E1sE0yq) Thank you. Ruben

name: Kim Schrier (personal)
subject: I know there are other things you'd rather be doing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I just wanted to personally thank you, Peter.

I know there are a million other things you could be doing this summer besides reading political emails, but I’m grateful you’re here, because your support really does matter.

Our country, our rights, and our democracy are all on the line, and while it’s so easy to check out from the exhausting news cycle, the first step to making a change is staying informed. After Trump's horrible, big, ugly bill, it’s more clear than ever that too many of our leaders aren’t voting with our best interests in mind. And when that happens, it’s on all of us to hold them accountable.

We have to flip the House next November if we're going to take back the reins of our democracy from extremists who are hell-bent on moving us backward with their archaic agenda. With your help, we’re so close to hitting our mid-month goal—but I need a little extra help to close the gap ahead of tonight's deadline.

Will you chip in to stand with me today? >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-july-2025? &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111672399/558027843/-2027950711?refcode=em25_250717_mm3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250717_mm3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=dd62d086-6f63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDYyZDA4Ni02ZjYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hb_OQWfPduQ3BmKIyvPQbtDEHXT2PxAUe7ERHq5AKHA=)

### The Farm Fighter vs The Harvard Ghost
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bee5f33e-f508-4877-b1a5-174f707cde7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

You know how I always say the antidote to political cynicism is finding an authentic candidate who you can tell is running b/c they actually give a damn? Someone who doesn't spit out talking points like a broken Pez dispenser?
Well, buckle up--because this week we met one!
Her name is **Hallie Shoffner**. A sixth-generation Arkansas farmer, on a farm that started around 1890 and she had to shut down--like so many farmers--the beginning of this year. So she decided to run against human-happiness killer, Tom Cotton, to help people _not have to shut down farms, businesses_ , etc in Arkansas anymore.
Single mom. Spreadsheet junkie. Not a polished political robot, but a real-deal human being who's running for Senate to take out the walking embodiment of elitist detachment and perhaps the original cause of acid reflux: **Tom Cotton**.
All I have to say is--WOW--this wasn't some usual interview with canned applause lines. This was Hallie laying it bare:
* She had to **shut down a 132-year-old family farm** this year because the economics--thanks to relentless instability, GOP-fueled tariffs, and Washington negligence--no longer work.
* She's **fighting for Medicaid** , because 1 in 3 Arkansans depend on it. Cotton's proud of a bill that would rip coverage from hundreds of thousands of them.
* She called the "Big Beautiful Bill" what it is: **a billionaire bailout disguised as governance** --gashing SNAP, gutting rural hospitals, and blasting holes in Arkansas' own state budget.
* And she's got **no patience for Ivy League hypocrites** like Cotton who smile for out-of-state donors while flying over their constituents' suffering.

This wasn't just economic populism. _It was human_. Hallie told the story of a Dollar General worker in rural Arkansas--offering a place to stay to a woman in crisis, while he himself came up five bucks short on groceries.
That's the Arkansas Cotton doesn't see from 30,000 feet. But it's the Arkansas that Hallie and most Arkansas actually live in.
And what's her plan?
Not some jargon-filled nonsense. Not triangulating BS. Her campaign is built on **storytelling, shared struggle, and straight-up truth**. And yeah, she'll throw punches. Not for politics--for survival. To help her neighbors and community.
I'll say it plain: **Tom Cotton is vulnerable.** He's the kind of antiseptic senator who never shows up, never smiles, never does a damn thing anyone can name. Besides frowning and huffing his way through Sunday shows--because he doesn't work.
Hallie does. She's been up before dawn running a farm. She knows risk. She knows what collapse looks like. And she's got the guts to make it personal.
I've run campaigns in red states. I've seen how cynical party hacks can screw this up. So if you're reading this, support the hell out of Hallie while she's still building steam.
🎯 [ShoffnerForArkansas.com](https://substack.com/redirect/a4e71663-efab-4b5b-b50d-1506f6d7c194?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- contribute, volunteer, spread the word.
Because the truth is: **farmers like Hallie have been bailing out America for generations.** Now it's our turn to have her back.

### The Nazi Hunter Exposing And Bankrupting Nazis
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c272509-613f-47b3-b880-347ca1fbfe09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After Hallie lit the fuse, we brought in Kris Goldsmith, a real-life Nazi hunter (yes, you read that right). Founder of Task Force Butler, Kris is a combat veteran, antifascist investigator and also founded Veterans Fighting Fascism.
He also runs the _On Offense_ _Substack_ and podcast--and is a co-host of _Find Out_ , a no-bs political show that calls out cowards, builds power, and gives a damn about winning.
As you can tell, Kris isn't messing around, in fact, he's spent years exposing hate groups and[ fighting authoritarianism](https://substack.com/redirect/68b6980f-af5a-4d4c-a98d-256fdef95f98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the country. So the guy is no keyboard warrior--he's a combat vet who came home from Iraq, and was distressed by the rise of white nationalist terror groups like Patriot Front and Blood Tribe.
He then decided, as someone who loved his country, he had another fight he simply had to take on, and it's turned the lives of goose-steppers everywhere into something more akin to a living hell. His mission? Make being a Nazi "difficult and expensive."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/48aaa427-cb0a-402d-92e3-42cdc78cb281?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Through investigations, lawsuits, and helping law enforcement, he exposes extremists not just online, but in courtrooms--where it actually hurts. (And he makes corporate media cover these stories by creating the spectacle necessary, [or they'd just ignore it to continue their series of "interviewing Nazis in Ohio coffee shops"](https://substack.com/redirect/323fd4a5-e895-4519-9d16-ee3b7b6816d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
And the stories Kris told on Amped Up? Chilling.
We're talking about armed militias plotting to black out Baltimore by hitting the power grid as part of their "accelerationist" ideology to bring down the U.S. government and enact the fascism they hold dear. More chilling? [Billionaire tech bros like Peter Thiel](https://substack.com/redirect/11eb56b8-3c5a-42a1-b5f2-1852bc5635bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and Elon Musk [who share this sick ideology](https://substack.com/redirect/a1bc5442-de85-4c56-a11b-4363619932d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Then there are the Neo-Nazi soldiers posting his home address to try to get him SWATed. And yes--many of these same freaks get popped for child porn (see ["The Epstein Files" and Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/51d50fab-c107-49f0-8a26-45ec5b23428d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and weapons charges.
Chris broke down how [hate](https://substack.com/redirect/f338175a-12a6-4d03-9403-179b8fb17ad0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), violence, and predation feed each other online, and [how we're way behind countries like Germany and France](https://substack.com/redirect/cc4956f8-795a-4e91-974a-4efc88dba229?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when it comes to stopping it.
His point was blunt but clear: _free speech doesn 't mean freedom to terrorize_. And if our government won't step up to stop it, people like him--and the rest of us who care deeply about fairness and justice--will have to do it to protect the vulnerable [and our republic](https://substack.com/redirect/dc47a666-ad44-4236-b377-dcdf37bfba2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
🎯 [Task Force Butler](https://substack.com/redirect/5d833820-1eb2-4c76-8c29-a91d3fd667a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- contribute, volunteer, spread the word

Hey folks,
I know I already sent out an episode today with Joe Walsh, and I don't love cluttering your inbox. So let me start with a quick apology for the second send. But I decided this story was worth shooting an emergency live and sending out.
I was joined by Carlos Alvarez-Araños, founder of American Opposition, and read him the newly reported _Wall Street Journal_ story--live, in real time--about Trump's insane birthday card to Jeffrey Epstein. He hadn't seen it yet.
What unfolded was a deep, disturbing, surreal, and--unfortunately--very real conversation. Here's what you need to hear:
**[00:03:15]** I read the letter line by line, typed inside the drawing of a naked woman, with Trump and Epstein exchanging cryptic, creepy banter about "secrets" and "having things in common."
**[00:05:04]** Carlos calls out the elite history of abuse that defines too many rich circles--and why we shouldn't need "more proof" when women have already come forward.
**[00:10:08]** Breaking: J.D. Vance denies the letter's existence--despite the government and _WSJ_ allegedly possessing it--and Trump threatens to sue, which would force a deposition.
**[00:35:00]** We break down how Democrats are weaponizing every floor vote to demand the Epstein list's release--and force Republicans to show their hand.
**[00:46:17]** I end solo (Carlos's cell phone died) by sharing my feelings about the cancellation of Stephen Colbert's show on CBS.
**If you found this conversation helpful, please support my work by becoming a paid subscriber today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ufk5PJCmV1P4gC6tbj5whsLq_Fp7QgwxJ41qggRmSs0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168601718)
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: ABQ vs. ICE, Trump vs. Powell, & The Secret to True Happiness
body:
New episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fb19fab349&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | We just dropped a must-watch new episode of the [**No Doubt About It Podcast**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3f1e9418ae&e=567664f14c), and you won’t want to miss this one — packed with news, hard truths, and a surprising twist on what really leads to happiness.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6fb0add31d&e=567664f14c)
| **🔥 In This Episode:**

**✅ Albuquerque Mayor Tim Keller’s Dangerous ICE Warning Policy**

We kick things off with a fiery takedown of Mayor Tim Keller’s decision to tell Albuquerque police to warn citizens when ICE is conducting immigration operations.

Mark and Krysty break down:

→ Why this is borderline obstruction of justice
→ How it creates a permission structure for violence against ICE agents
→ Why Keller’s reckless political play is dangerous for public safety
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=647881b2ce&e=567664f14c)
---
| **✅ LAPD Smacks Down a City Councilwoman — And It’s Glorious**

In Los Angeles, a city councilwoman asked the LAPD to do the same thing — warn citizens about ICE. Let’s just say the LAPD educates her on how the law actually works... and you’re going to want to hear this exchange.

✅ Trump vs. Jerome Powell — What’s Really Going On?

Why is Trump so determined to fire Fed Chair Jerome Powell? We break down:

→ The economic pressures behind Trump’s push
→ What it could mean for interest rates, inflation, and your wallet
→ Why this fight could shake up the coming midterm elections
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=32954b54a7&e=567664f14c)
---
| **✅ The Surprising Secret to True Happiness**

Krysty wraps up the show with a fascinating new study on what leads to lasting happiness — and guess what? It’s not money, fame, or success. We break down the answer and why it matters more today than ever!
---
|
---
| **❤️ Help Us Keep Growing!**

✅ **LIKE** the episode on [YouTube ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e56b70d75b&e=567664f14c)

✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=17e400c3ce&e=567664f14c) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4b94cf6e15&e=567664f14c)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b8dcfc23e0&e=567664f14c)
Thanks for being part of the No Doubt About It community — where we tackle the real stories, call out the spin, and remind each other what matters most.

Watch, share, and join the conversation!

With gratitude,

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **

| | | | | Friend,I want to thank the "eagle-eyed" reader who alerted me to a typo in an email that went out earlier, where I promised to defund Planned Parenthood, but it ended up spelled defend.
I am glad the individual alerted me, and I agree – It would be remarkably out of character for me, given my voting record and lifelong history of being pro-Life!
#WeHaveAllBeenThere 😂
Thank you for being part of this movement.

---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn93tok85mr8g57vei8pgl93vvdhjn81epp1gq4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3j64o73cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhmlsca1vp0t5n66p6rj0gu4ej5450ln55ovfek0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3j64o73cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcbt6veop694tcbkddlqvd57gejn2oqrqrjgedeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3j64o73cjh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ul6vjql8h5jevgmuj54d85nrqjluisrd6u4ltg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3j64o73cjh2bs)**

In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate. Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR’s pen. Now, 92 years later, [President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z99h5l59td638rdsirk0svrjddsqlqm5rs8qhjfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3gm0o34chh2bs) His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people. * **Reinforce America’s financial dominance**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: HISTORIC! Congress passes real spending cuts
body:
Thanks to you, Trump will sign the bill that delivers real, actual spending cuts to existing programs -- immediately.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** Did you know you were participating in history this week? Thanks to **_you_** , Congress just did something even Congress didn't think it could: passed historic spending cuts totaling more than **_$9 billion_** , including massive cuts to Leftist pet projects like NPR and USAID.
Democrats and liberal Republicans fought to stall and stop the President's rescissions bill, but We The People spoke up. Thanks to you and conservative leaders in both the House and Senate, and the hard work of OMB Director Russ Vought, President Trump will sign the bill that delivers real, actual spending cuts to existing programs -- immediately.
**_There is still more to be done._** Just in case you were tired of winning, we are hearing from the White House that additional spending cuts, maybe even another rescissions package, could be coming in the weeks ahead.
On a recent episode of my podcast, Wade Miller of Citizens for Renewing America discussed the potential for President Trump to use pocket rescissions to further cut spending. [**You can listen to our conversation here**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acb55c6a/1edb9794acb4c5f8) for in-depth details about rescissions and the federal budget process.
Please keep an eye out for future action alerts on how you can continue to push Congress to do the right thing. Share this email with other patriots, connect with us on social media, and let's keep up the pressure to ensure real change happens!
Thank you again for being part of Tea Party Patriots Action and for believing that we can still save America!

****

__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| **** ******************** ******** In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

# Friday, July 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1940, [President Franklin Delano Roosevelt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAUBODT4A4LAzZOQbGNu2y7pYXzHuFFGCwgsXz7VVZ7g7_-pNHM_Lmvd0eR0vO329E2n9eEZ43YGpb1KFgJMLUK5J4pV6oqJxXyKoUcuTB8mFdwFK9Vd2A9okTVoR3MKGelhpvugnXO-FFKZWa4ofGb3rQ3bpucAVSbuXVkv2nCDPMgxKRUrzcj_SjgMcOsHU5MCwRqufSvTKkF9PHKHyz9I-9dtKG1ozL1i8mFyeU8zz5QbblcX2dyaYEqB3dxSvy_MLm83vHiw8zk4qHwlHdKriFwnwt_p6PgA7_LEXgLVIA3LHtXLBwnxUh1MkyL5-4o_mvRfnTdx8q_AQAA___AK4Uv) was nominated for a third term. He would later be elected to a record four terms, the only U.S. president to serve more than two terms. Today, in our _Finance _section, we report on a [new study](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy2yAQAL9G6s6DAEu8giKNu5c2peYsDnMJAg-crdHfZ5xfSL-zs7O_vtdv5Mzl8RN38hLrWujomUSorc9GnQMV6YHxUWrnbmoxqa5a6SuoBSa3BuR8rnYMPhJpMiP5ablqZ8z0Zcfk1YKzpUAmRJqVM3cVnNYKo0VD0c0j-49NLZOblJqNudj7ouNVhc0FZ5HmwSoKLLVdflcukijms76pXba6j9knkWcfzI9B3wZ9O47jsmP7Q3KgbOnDDPrWpbZz0LcNC5z1BY2EG0EtgLC1F3eCnvgJiRp1SPWA_bUlYIGtdukgFTK_CVCgE4K9R4xOfY3Nh-fBOXOfl8Gqx46c_2XJf718e_03AAD__3V2ioM) that found that retiring full-time on a cruise ship can cost between $30,000 and $100,000 a year. Would _you_ ever consider spending your retirement at sea? Reply to this email and let us know. On Fridays, Amy Hess dives deeper into _Feel Good Flyover_ with heartwarming interviews and stories to kick off your weekend right. Today, she talks to the Kentucky priest who shouted _" I love you, Kate!"_ at Wimbledon. Listen on [Spotify](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0LFOwzAQgOGncbZG50sc14MHBjIgGgQCIVgsNz7XhjSOHCtVeXrUnYX91zf87wdzsHGK82mwZ9L-5E3xySyZtkgXEyinnNJ3JONiprEYBBQ7kDsOldOeCKmpSHMpkO-VbPdV0A114MAeoRXH0Svnjt0oZNdJxYFb5auobwpIDtggoqwlVyCFsl4KSchb1gK5WFKuv1KcSyA_XdNGuR7TuZp0KGVZWXPHsGfYp4Xmel1Sif56Cxj2a0gXhn07bC8PTz_T8zCd3obH14_5XvHPKuvVZhtYC3_o5X8PNo2_AQAA__9l52kv), [YouTube](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUzzFvgzAQBeBfgzfQ-cA9GDx0YUunShktA3exWxJHjgPKv69Q1y5d39P7pHc-uZOPa7xdPvyVrVzEFUnunnmLvLvAOeWUviO7JWaei0NAUwPVGtRihRm5VWw1GdT9QF2vgvUy8JufjF8MS6uZQGCmhYh6aSfyKtpDAdKALSJSQ3oAMoMXMsSou6oDXmJJuflK8VYCy_pKG-dmTle12lDK_VG17xWOFY77vjev9CzPiY_-CDs4-zKH-jNwPf5OVbYPn32oOvjDLP97vln8CQAA___-9Ga0), or [Apple](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkDFv-yAUxD8NbLbgAXlmYPgv3vJfOyJiHoHWCRamrvrtq1SVsnTpenf63elezv4cylru1__hRi5dk--p-q3RUejDZ2q11fpWyMfSaOkeBJhB4CAFjy4RASlOTqIBOVnUE88OL3qy6mQinUCjNTpFvARFVsUgrBa8uAdFoBSgAABHlFagsSGhQQKpmRYUS69tfK3l3jOl9bMe1Mal3vjqcu_bztQ_BjODeatxCXvfx7BtKz0iDOb3_ekwmHum4YcxPNUS5fS9wZ4kb24PLWSmxS-d_W_PHA6-AgAA__8eOG_G) and see why _Feel Good Flyover_ is our most-loved edition. ## Trump Diagnosed With Vein Condition
President Trump was [diagnosed with chronic venous insufficiency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAQhp8GO05wQPEUFNvY3W23NFwYdDYIBvAY337jvsJtpvmSL_N_f76WL0uR0vrb7mhayEvCq0ZsDctyFKzkMbXqya4pV6oyJ7nlBQQMXGjeT4u3FO9Fdd4EREDZoen1AJOU_Vt1m5GDF0q7t3NTr9_jt3LiDcNgR_DOilF1ZB6b0P3UCzFK-VLfGsIgvJv8pCyOTAn01HJ5_c2U2oYh3vmD5eXy3kWztXZUJn8xmBnM6T5ybQ9iMD9iBrPQDOb-OWflzz4GcyvnfvB6hoCF0spDyTt3W8mJHP9gymfllB5OjjC5m9vQsPCIK68XxqcZvzYGc1eMPy6KkeqomRLrbin-_639KOjHwL8AAAD__-rNiik) after doctors evaluated swelling in his lower legs, the White House said Thursday. The condition, common in older adults, occurs when leg veins struggle to return blood to the heart, causing swelling and discomfort, but it's not considered serious. Testing ruled out blood clots and heart problems, and press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Trump feels no discomfort and [remains in "excellent health."](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9utDAQBPCnMZ2Rsc2_wsUnfaK7KF1KZNgFNjIY2XuH7u0j8gqpRxrN_L4e48NToGP98Ds6XuJ44JUDMmMaz4SZAA_OQH49YqZs4mG2OGqla6laWXUjeArv0RbgFkSNpkBXtbXujKl6W2yu7qHuVQ-29o1qACY1N9XkodNqqm07FeTuNtVWXaVUY0xpp1YvtYK5g856bIRVCMQxld-RDt5wCe_4wlTOcS-C25jPLMw_oQehBz_N94NyjXcs9PAZAzHNWeiB03M_5cvn-Rl8koyZ6VhlwFXmC8PNIK-NGOUWnxmFHjLH9BZmIBDmf6VNZ3qj2iI5OC8KgXLTCqvW3VP4XcN_Inw5_RMAAP__o6-Fmg) Treatment may include exercise, leg elevation, or compression therapy.
## Lightning Kills 1, Injures 14
One man is dead and 14 others, including eight children, are injured [after a lightning strike](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb1j8OZCBoVLlLV2qqqOF4WLflEAEJFHevkpfofMnfTrnfJ-Wk8OEeftwF7A9liXDoyXoHepyrdAwQO4toNtyadhkyXIvi2BiokxTbpbgMD0XNQQbAQTIASzXkzBS8qMaduvlaozW3ukoouI6hgjRs-jWI3AfpwHt641pbjhjBylHtWoRJxa8CUY5OBDFIGAvdTwXzH2HmJ7lDnX05TIku_d-bUS-ETETMbvVvwzGrbxmIuavTyJmTgO4QLmkmM-3CoG62KHS1uvN_9CE294z5o1meBAxt17qk8gZA5HvXEjDj0qbodpwfWBK2A6aKLZdHKY_iP6vcncrfgMAAP__F4mBuQ) at the Black Knight Bowbenders archery range in Jackson Township, New Jersey, on Wednesday evening. The group was outside when lightning struck the ground nearby during a thunderstorm. Robert Montgomery, 61, an instructor, died from his injuries, and others were hospitalized with burns and other symptoms. It's the [second lightning death in New Jersey](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2S4yAQhU-DMqlQgwQKCDYh86YbqljTSO3B4ALGKt1-Sr7CRJ30-97Pv9t6cxQpbX_dE00LeU141IitYVlfBSt5TK16clvKlarISex5BQ5Tz1U_6tU7iucqO28CIqDo0IxqAi3EuMhuNx6kEtyB1CKADl4sd1iEn4NUfhELdGQuGlejHjmfhRjkfwVh4v6uvZYOZyY5emq5DI9Mqe0Y4pnfWIZ7fnbR7K29KhN_GFgG9jiO4bu6lr07rwcGtrZcTgb2anYd1ygnBvayZWC5YmDHmYHdcgxY-i-KEX0fadtborT1CY_-gaXiRdETyHGSmn90XTH-dVCMVGfFJN-ejuInWPvVmm8DPwEAAP__BUuFnQ) in just over a week, and the 12th nationwide this year.
## Connie Francis Dies at 87
Connie Francis, the chart-topping singer of _Who 's Sorry Now_ and star of the film _Where the Boys Are_ , [died Wednesday at 87](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE-DMyz-bHBAsImz3nRDi4Zn-60wWMC05duPemZuMGFJpVJ937_H8nAYMW1_3QG2rXlJcNUIrUFZzgIVA6RWA7ot5YpV5iT3vAgmBso05WYJDuO9qC7YFUCA7MByPQgjJZ9Ut9tBiXF6Tl4AU5opbdTIAlvN4FcxDd50aN9rTHPDGRul7NVTi3VgwZtglIORKAYBWy79_4yp7bDGO7-g9D4fXbR7a2cl8g8RMxHzdV39nmO8r5xDgTOX9t0kYn6jETEfHxU9_Qk-p4RA1-KSx0oDuECvHQrQtgN95rtSV4BWTBsU6nwrUCs1mnIhR8mN5IyIuSs2nBfGiHXURLHtcBi__rVfSX1Z8RkAAP__yTuLVg). One of the best-selling female artists of all time, she sold over 200 million records and became the first woman to top the Billboard Hot 100. Just weeks before her death, Francis was enjoying a surprise resurgence: her 1962 track _Pretty Little Baby_ exploded on TikTok, featured in over a million videos, and topped the app's viral music charts. [Listen to the song here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGnwVss4BDjDAyRrnLVIZ0qdUQYjsOpCKRAYuXtq_QVun6f9Bv-n2d7dpQoX97dFU1fi824tYS9Y7W3io0C5t4CuUsujRqUDLFYyeV-x_VOzDY4Sk-rhmBWRIkwoBF6L2cAcVBDNFotjqOA6TBx572AaVlmftDgQQYNciDz0rgWs-B8AhjVouW658HPYVYOJ6Y4Buqljl-Fco-4pmd5YB19uQ7JxN5vjcGRyROTp23bxme59_uCr_-1uO4jg9ODwb-jOIeP-P3f1behmnDbKCVqk2aKX66O0i_Z_9ThYeRPAAAA__-JG3BB). The renewed popularity even brought Francis to the platform herself, where she told fans she was "flabbergasted" by the revival of a song she barely remembered recording. She spent her final days knowing her voice still resonated--across generations, and across time. [Photos from her life are available here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb8Gd6zwAItf4SIN3Uub0sJmbE-EwYLZZ_nvo91fSHOro6Oj--d7-g6UKG-_w4Ejr2XKeLWEzFins2KjiJlbpLDl0qjpkvVeJlBgpXKyH6YYKN2T6eK4IgLqDsfeWRi07r9Mt4_WwTM-Z_c1RLTKwKxjD9a5JfbrHHToaHzblOuHXqmn1g8zO1itissQBxPwKYzCSFzq42-hzDuu6S4_WB9LObo07sxnE_qXAC_AX9f1eLXAJYb7DQjwJy38qii3kBLWW4DHzFg5UD4wswB_vBotAvw7RIBXToDv37OUnAnlWkNeqMkPJ8-9cGnyrMh8y0TMCeUc5ls2yhtWAX6wYI01g_qoujrG86KUqD2dMGo7AqVPPf_X5T8j_AsAAP__YneUvw).

clean_body: President Trump has been after doctors evaluated swelling in his lower legs, the White House said Thursday. | | | | | | Friday, July 18, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1940, was nominated for a third term. He would later be elected to a record four terms, the only U.S. president to serve more than two terms. Today, in our Finance section, we report on a that found that retiring full-time on a cruise ship can cost between $30,000 and $100,000 a year. Would you ever consider spending your retirement at sea? Reply to this email and let us know. On Fridays, Amy Hess dives deeper into Feel Good Flyover with heartwarming interviews and stories to kick off your weekend right. Today, she talks to the Kentucky priest who shouted " I love you, Kate!" at Wimbledon. Listen on , , or and see why Feel Good Flyover is our most-loved edition. Keep your cells young with today's sponsor, , with a special discount for The Flyover readers on their fatty acid supplements. | Trump Diagnosed With Vein Condition President Trump was after doctors evaluated swelling in his lower legs, the White House said Thursday. The condition, common in older adults, occurs when leg veins struggle to return blood to the heart, causing swelling and discomfort, but it's not considered serious. Testing ruled out blood clots and heart problems, and press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Trump feels no discomfort and Treatment may include exercise, leg elevation, or compression therapy. Lightning Kills 1, Injures 14 One man is dead and 14 others, including eight children, are injured at the Black Knight Bowbenders archery range in Jackson Township, New Jersey, on Wednesday evening. The group was outside when lightning struck the ground nearby during a thunderstorm. Robert Montgomery, 61, an instructor, died from his injuries, and others were hospitalized with burns and other symptoms. It's the in just over a week, and the 12th nationwide this year. Connie Francis Dies at 87 Connie Francis, the chart-topping singer of Who 's Sorry Now and star of the film Where the Boys Are , . One of the best-selling female artists of all time, she sold over 200 million records and became the first woman to top the Billboard Hot 100. Just weeks before her death, Francis was enjoying a surprise resurgence: her 1962 track Pretty Little Baby exploded on TikTok, featured in over a million videos, and topped the app's viral music charts. . The renewed popularity even brought Francis to the platform herself, where she told fans she was "flabbergasted" by the revival of a song she barely remembered recording. She spent her final days knowing her voice still resonated--across generations, and across time. . name: Julia Kortrey, Evergreen
subject: Why are your electric bills so high, friend?
body:
Demand accountability from the culprit blocking cheaper energy
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3789615/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Have you noticed your electric bills are significantly higher than usual this summer, friend?

You can thank **PJM Interconnection** , the largest grid operator in the U.S., serving 65 million people across 13 states.

Instead of prioritizing clean energy that is faster to build and 50 percent cheaper than gas, they’re keeping thousands of clean energy projects in limbo and greenlighting old, dirty energy sources like gas and coal.

PJM regularly holds “energy auctions” to determine which types of energy sources will power our homes, and another auction is coming up **this Tuesday.**

All eyes are going to be on PJM, watching to see if they finally take action to put clean, affordable energy sources on the grid, or if they’ll stick with business as usual. |
| This month, families are paying **_up to 30 percent more_** on their electric bills. We shouldn’t stand for another rate hike. [**Will you write to your lawmakers right now and ask them to hold PJM accountable?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3789616/87SdQ4wZ) [SEND A MESSAGE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3789617/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| As the people that run our grid, you’d think that PJM’s job would be to keep our energy reliable and affordable, right?

Well, it turns out their board and 1,000+ voting members are mostly fossil fuel CEOs and energy traders who make more money for themselves when PJM shuts out competition from cheaper clean energy.

So, instead of investing in cheap, clean energy like wind and solar, which would lower our bills and make our air cleaner to breathe, **PJM keeps doubling down on dirty fossil fuels—all while doubling the salaries of their own executives.**

Governors in New Jersey, Maryland, and Pennsylvania have already publicly called PJM out as the main reason utility bills have soared, but your legislators need to know that you support cleaner, more affordable energy, too. [**Tell them it’s time to hold PJM accountable and make electricity affordable again.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3789618/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3789619/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for raising your voice, |
---
| | |
---
### Julia Kortrey
Deputy State Policy Director
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FnQMz77NHk5nXdSv4Ik3mQ~~/AARclBA~/xuMuPOJVur2CWJaEojzAm2Dw-b5Nh9HJlRkb-qb_aAd1RYXa5TqpLwNmIyrl-oWYrGPmbxbViTpK23nZDhKWCts2_jf1qxZT7zw-WhrdprHxngCvTA-NLxgFc7GpnEqtAa4gQNpMOLoIJ3OWk01z2uy88ctKO1r6zcc6m7__PXPbkYiJdQ5Yf3rMoUC1K8MZ8x_AFGqY36RsAZuJPuJ1V3jDGlyEb70tbvy15rrQhkNSUd8JhNTt4kog2RDVtna6BMgnQ9eDq50HTAVofApHY4jT37JJ2UdI6bzkbJDx-kZ547zB6d0HGR62jOQQKauL6qNEWmxzm6X_MWabDeTr6g~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FnQMz77NHk5nXdSv4Ik3mQ~~/AARclBA~/xuMuPOJVur2CWJaEojzAm2Dw-b5Nh9HJlRkb-qb_aAd1RYXa5TqpLwNmIyrl-oWYrGPmbxbViTpK23nZDhKWCts2_jf1qxZT7zw-WhrdprHxngCvTA-NLxgFc7GpnEqtAa4gQNpMOLoIJ3OWk01z2uy88ctKO1r6zcc6m7__PXPbkYiJdQ5Yf3rMoUC1K8MZ8x_AFGqY36RsAZuJPuJ1V3jDGlyEb70tbvy15rrQhkNSUd8JhNTt4kog2RDVtna6BMgnQ9eDq50HTAVofApHY4jT37JJ2UdI6bzkbJDx-kZ547zB6d0HGR62jOQQKauL6qNEWmxzm6X_MWabDeTr6g~~) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FnQMz77NHk5nXdSv4Ik3mQ~~/AARclBA~/xuMuPOJVur2CWJaEojzAm2Dw-b5Nh9HJlRkb-qb_aAd1RYXa5TqpLwNmIyrl-oWYrGPmbxbViTpK23nZDhKWCts2_jf1qxZT7zw-WhrdprHxngCvTA-NLxgFc7GpnEqtAa4gQNpMOLoIJ3OWk01z2uy88ctKO1r6zcc6m7__PXPbkYiJdQ5Yf3rMoUC1K8MZ8x_AFGqY36RsAZuJPuJ1V3jDGlyEb70tbvy15rrQhkNSUd8JhNTt4kog2RDVtna6BMgnQ9eDq50HTAVofApHY4jT37JJ2UdI6bzkbJDx-kZ547zB6d0HGR62jOQQKauL6qNEWmxzm6X_MWabDeTr6g~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/FnQMz77NHk5nXdSv4Ik3mQ~~/AARclBA~/xuMuPOJVur2CWJaEojzAm2Dw-b5Nh9HJlRkb-qb_aAd1RYXa5TqpLwNmIyrl-oWYrGPmbxbViTpK23nZDhKWCts2_jf1qxZT7zw-WhrdprHxngCvTA-NLxgFc7GpnEqtAa4gQNpMOLoIJ3OWk01z2uy88ctKO1r6zcc6m7__PXPbkYiJdQ5Yf3rMoUC1K8MZ8x_AFGqY36RsAZuJPuJ1V3jDGlyEb70tbvy15rrQhkNSUd8JhNTt4kog2RDVtna6BMgnQ9eDq50HTAVofApHY4jT37JJ2UdI6bzkbJDx-kZ547zB6d0HGR62jOQQKauL6qNEWmxzm6X_MWabDeTr6g~~)**

clean_body: This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College ~~ Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called " The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. ~~ If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of " The Second World Wars" on DVD: ~~ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The " The Second World Wars" DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. ~~ Pop Acta Media | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

body:
Attorney General Ken Paxton raised $2.9 million for his U.S. Senate campaign during the second quarter, while incumbent John Cornyn received about $800,000 in direct contributions. A joint fundraising committee collected $3.1 million. This is the first report since Paxton announced his campaign.

# Friday, July 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1917, the United States War Department ordered the [Thirty-sixth Infantry Division](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGSpCAUgOHTYKYFiEgHBJuY9aYbWihPebUIXfBa29tPzVxhLvD_Vd-_5_x0GDHtf90Blj5bnhNcNQIRlHl7J18cVkx7cO9YD1cqphPqLLkcWj62wszeYbxn1Xi7cP8QDVgxDtL0WmneBGt6Z_TwAAVjL_UqQHFYpd68UX7hQjZov2N8FEYIzgfdrbD0ejDDZpwRehFMcfBIuXQUgODj6hbvfELp1nw00QaiV2X9HyYnJqfrujqqweUUMUGXy87kFFzyS87_mZwgUUGoTE4UsNDdVvxQaDFtLlG5W48nVsypKda_LowRqx6Z4vvhMP4c6XdOp5VfAQAA__-QoH9e) at Camp Bowie in Tarrant County to mobilize for combat in Europe. Composed mostly of Texas National Guard troops, the Texas Division—or “T-Patchers”—participated in the Meuse-Argonne offensive in October 1918, suffering 2,601 casualties. Country singer Pat Green gave a benefit concert for flood victims Wednesday night, raising over $1 million. You can watch it [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQgOGnMVuQzwH7GDx0KJ3SoVLVEdnxEU4yENkGkrev0lfo_Evf8P9chovjyMvt081ky2Nch4WOHKkUSsO4LSE5zrzcJrfFPLuUedkpD0qq9iTNCXAIjuNzaKpgvQwdVGTBtArPutGymixoZST5gB20CMH4DhUYrw10Hq_aVWxfmDSAAFK2ur6SP-sW2xEdgvYgGkmBy5rqMlGhh8tjfK47pfq6zlW0Uyn3LM5vQvVC9cdx1M91K5unVxeqj7yTUD30X_fv9-5jR6ySDfeDY-SsjWjkbXYc_7Tyvwe7Vb8BAAD__3k5b7o) and read about it in today's _Roundup_ section. On Fridays, Amy Hess dives deeper into _Feel Good Flyover_ with heartwarming interviews and stories to kick off your weekend right. Today, she talks to the Kentucky priest who shouted _“I love you, Kate!”_ at Wimbledon. ## Kerr County Residents Protest Potential Tax Hike
At least 135 people are [confirmed to have died](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOwygolNQbGM3225pLnLRm0WYAKMzb7-ZSfYJ_vrkfDnn-3Nf7kCB4vYbDjT15dMS8SoBa8W8-Gd0GahQ3HZ4hnJALhRPLIsSauBi5HJaHFB4L33jjBXuJhs0chzU1Olei2Y3o7D9TQwSrNV6tKvqADTadZBS2d53DZkPTIxyklKIQbcr2k4P0-AnmKS2kvUCHdWU27pjxRcUH97pxNyu6WiC2Wt9FNb9Ympmar6uq_37gvgJmZo_b5iavzWm5gMe_NoxI9_hRO4DlJ37kJKjuHEPFQJVwsItYuRrip7ygY5T5P8RTTbucVEIVPTIerEdQOE7pf5M4GnUvwAAAP__GZOHjw) in the devastating flash floods in six counties two weeks ago, and [102 people](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAQx58Gd6wAf8AVLtLQXdqUFh_DenKzcAJ2fX77yInyBNeNfiP9v369b-8OCfP9p3vA2r9S2TIcjaB3qFt65lgdNsz33T2pPVxtmF_QNiXUzIXm0mzRIZ3bNMTVi_gmB1ilnpUZl2kRw75KNZrktRinSUcz-pS0116PUiQzBa8GXC8xoaWRUoh5uQXw4zKbORln5OIlmwRE7KXe-g4dvlxLdJYX1Fsoj4HWvffPxsYfTFmm7HEct4_m-vVkyl5tmLJUgiOm7GXFlBWaKSuvK4Lre-Oh5AyhQ-S98N9POvnEE5USMd95xQYXl0JzzPwDauWhPHM_-ds_kKMj-s9KShjQUePNnUzZoa7x80AibItmk7g_HNLf7P17i79W9ScAAP__t0mVcw) are believed to be missing. On Wednesday, the family of deceased Camp Mystic co-owner Dick Eastland said they are unsure whether he [saw the flood warning alert](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAYBODT2B0WEMCkoHiNu7x2SwubHxsJQxZ-h-T2K-8Vth5pNN98PeaHDTGk7b89wODb5zlBqxEQocz-TK7YUEPadnvGethSQ3pBnTnlktCRMD07G-JnFr0zC3V31oNho-T6poSi_W4U9QvXXHrK79JTobUUVAjlF6lGy8Y-mKuMjkwzRqlUwwrLTUktvbaaqYV1goILmMuAOyC8bfXxk19QhjUffTQ74rN2t38dnzo-tdYGn9-X4so7Pp2141OCRr5PqBhyquRCgSN2ySeStgPuUMhqjyc5PhXDSlwosGIupNpGfMzZkWZLCmkjNkLBvhj3bCHGUNXYCbodNsTfPfi3F1-G_wQAAP__hIWKAA) from the National Weather Service at 1:14 a.m. on July 4, backtracking from an earlier statement acknowledging Eastland waited to begin evacuating. Meanwhile, Kerr County residents gathered Wednesday to protest a [potential tax rate hike](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUDuy4yAQPA3KcAGWhF5AsAnZ23RD1SAGm3oYVMzYsm-_pb3CJp10V__-fK_fkEuut9_wQMfv1NaKBxVkxr6mZ40dMuV6u8Oz0AM65fpCWo0yk1RW6mWNkMtnHYfogopfekCn7WSW6zzOari7kOa0zNrqqEdlMQaLATHaJV6_pphgyO40U1YvWis1zZcNw3WeliktsOg5aDEqjJlbv_AdGd9AqXzaC_tla4-huDvzTuL6SxgvjD-O4_JDwCcpjD_XCONL26AI488oYbyywnh9wg_2Lrf2rPyRe2-MxNhJHlBZcpPEbZd7I8qh4CnYsfNHMrxlrltHIJQBU-soM8sbMkli6IxRGD90F_cjl5JptmJUtwfk8q80_9_VL2f-BgAA__8toJYN) discussed during Monday’s commissioners meeting. The tax assessor-collector was authorized to calculate a "voter approval" tax rate of 8%—only allowed when a disaster declaration has been issued—in addition to the standard 3.5%. At a low water crossing on State Highway 39 in Hunt, TxDOT crews found a [mangled guardrail](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkT2ypSAQhVeDWVuAf9zAYBKzN-mEViuNUoPwClq9d_dTzhZe3FX9ne-cP1_zF_rg4_YbDxr57dIc6S6BmCnP7ow2oy8-bjueoRyYi48XlVlL3YEcQJnZog-fua3suEj7UhWNaui0afq2l9U-ysWuL9N1S_PSrWuUsavpcOmdG8ha7So_Ps_koIxSUnZ9vdLS9J3pnEGj-kWJVpL1nHLNOzG9sbjwSRflek1HFcad-buI5pfQk9DTfd_134L8HIWeHhuhp5BWDEJPD0roSQ5CT6oXetrxoshQiCLwjgwLuZQJ-G0Tw5rpLpBpfXBwYNwCWeDbFyYL24n56SeAS2e0gI4pg6ULCyP7uMHuQ4A1nZHzB1xIyT5hqjza79uH4Es_iFZuB_rwX4Z_NsE16n8BAAD__3D1nu4) that looked "like a towel that got rung," an indication of the force exerted by an estimated [10 million pounds of water per second](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAUhZ8Gd3cEDGBvQZGGbtOmtO4MlzEKBgvwsPv2kfMK25zmSN_5-fO5fmJMMb9-4062f4WyZhotUe9U13BmXzG2mF8bnqntWFvMb2qr5FIDn0Esq8eYvlc1efvg_kNMZMWs5XI3yvBps0oZFZR6cGXUXZtZa-l1-AgBZy7krKZoLxifxSIE59rcnvS4G73osOAizEMwxcnHXuqtb9TpC1tI3-VN9fYs-5Ts1vvR2P0Xk45JN8a4_W3YL5NJd61h0qXyxMSku6KYdHxm0olL-kZwlEEVSoCBnSpgBmo97tjJg-Cwx5RiyXCUM_sGB1Vo9CzZQ0hlkAdfRoYL9DrRYzoPghrfVJl0U7X-GBegmZkp_toxpv-9-8_eflv5LwAA___qN5Qm) that flowed down the Guadalupe River.
## Campaign Finance Reports Show Tight Senate Race
Attorney General Ken Paxton raised $2.9 million for his U.S. Senate campaign [during the second quarter](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOmzAQhJ_G3DayHYPJgUMuSK2U9tgjMngJ25o1sk1I-vQVfYX_NtJoRvPNr8fwcBSInz_cil15z3FgPHLAUjAN884-OcrEz8XtIa8uZeIX5kFLXYO0oNrBOwqfwVS-G6W_qQo7ZWvdXhvTyGrpLN5urZ4cWmPQG13Xc-3MKK9WW4MWK-rOMmlVq5SUdXOZcLw2dVvPrWtVMyphJHoqMV3KggXfLs_hE1-YLlNcq9AtpWxZXO9C90L3x3Fc1synJ3SPDHsWuj-hhO63GKjQdMqE2z4Gmhxn-IMMm3uXyODYw--4MEwx8YfhxEdYKQSKnIEYEnpYYoE9Q0Z2BWFLtLr0gZmeSxG6dwnud_Xt-8_wt0qd344znRsrjHyujsL_3eVrb786_S8AAP__IniXig), while incumbent John Cornyn received about $800,000 in direct contributions. A joint fundraising committee collected $3.1 million. This is the first report since Paxton announced his campaign. Cornyn, who has been endorsed by the National Republican Senatorial Committee, has about $5.9 million in cash on hand. His joint fundraising committee controls another $2.7 million. Paxton [reported $2.5 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GO80FBbGg2Mbu33ZLg3LVmyAYYHTm7TdOtf12X3Fyzsn352f6seQpbL_tgaa81zgFvLPHUjBN6yu4ZClT2Hb78vmwKVO4ME8ChKyhr7menCX_mbrKmRncwCs0vJdCt6pTUO0GlB6UknwWQytAgdODXISUHPkwrGArMk8Z9FxzDiBVs-DcKqnlqq3mauasA3RUYmrKjgXfNq_-Ey9MzRKPypu9lDOz9hcTIxPjfd_NGT0VWuITYGL0dGH9Op0tmJkYnzkmRuiZGPlDSwxbwpy_mMIn1Kd9lxjqxR6npS3U_4ioAToplYQqGXfe5D1l1bMOtsOS_14q_yfyMuJvAAAA__9huIYs) in cash on hand. Meanwhile, Gov. Greg Abbott [collected more than $20 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GO8yFEcWCYhqT3eTfdktz0auSIEwAdebtN84rbHeSk5yc7_v7M_6g8y6sf3AnU95LHANd2VMplMblCHNCl11YNzx83jFlF07KowSpOHRc6HFG5z9jU83GwtyLiozolNSPtmmh2owCmBT2CNpa2Uml-l4QCgQ1aQu2q5y5x6ATWggA1dYT2UertFo0atFawRqg2ZWY6rJRoTfmxX_iSame4l55s5XyyuzxZHJgcriuq95zuDsmBwr8yEwONxSTwzeviVaO1sZSuI9r5hJ2PuH-QrcGfoNyXAolnqctRs_PeEwbJX65wOSAiT-f4tdve3ZVMvPrct673HasgXVH57-nyv-pPI38FwAA__8d2YkS) in donations during the first half of the year, and he has a campaign war chest of over $87 million. Lt. Gov. ## Pat Green Raises Over $1 Million for Flood Victims
Fort Worth country singer Pat Green raised over $1 million for flood victims during a [livestreamed benefit concert](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OpSAQhq9GO04A_7Cg2Mbu23ZLM-CoJAgG5ug5d7_BW_iqSd4n82ae-fcz_4DzLmx_4UBNnzXOAe_skQjTvL7DksBlF7Yd3j4fkLILF-ZZctkxPjCh5gWc_85tvWjDl1HUqMXQSdX0bc_rXSOMI7Rgx260reFGiBUao5S1gwHDh9rpUsYHoYTgvOtfFk3Td6pbFSjRG1G1HBdHMb1oR8IP5NV_44XpZeNRe70Tnblq_lRyquR03_fLmlwsCq_k9KxUcipRGTHRzp6Q2fgOlL6sGGJiJxDbEmJgFNkeMzEbg8VErAAfDTLvVnwo-pOtPsaFXc6SO0p1nfRy3s57l_uhavl2gPPPlfS7315a_g8AAP__L0SSoA) at Globe Life Field in Arlington on Wednesday night. Green’s brother, sister-in-law, and two of their children died in the July 4 flash floods in Kerr County. The stadium was empty, and several other prominent artists performed in person and remotely. "_No audience, just music and a mission: to help families devastated by the Texas floods—including my own_ ," [Green said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGu4yAURVeDuxdhjIEULqZx96ed0nrAI0GDIQJi_-x-5L-FqY90ro7un6_tC2OK-fEbd1r6dyhbprMl6p3qFt7ZV4wt5scT36ntWFvMB7VNcDED1zCazWNMn00OfrHc38eBllHPwkxKKj48lyDlJDj3UnCaRDDGcyRu7wLN5HDWQ1wuGdejGUfOZ3VzZCc1mzkYNKOyI5OcfOyl3vqTOn1jC-lTDqo3V_YhLc_eX41Nv5hYmVjP87z9pdzmizKxYu3RJWJivcKYWFNxmJhYf0zgyjv3-oGrkSq8sMOjEmVI8SBovRLu5MGV7Kh2uHAqliDFQBAiJQ-9gKVMIXYIqRQPR3Q97teWMBpCINTaB7AWA8gZLRjnJHAltdXqbhWpoS7-dcaUYlOaSf7YMaafvP5_pxyL-BcAAP__5p6isA) in the post about the concert. "_You can't define how much pain is going on right now, I've certainly never been through this... I'm trying to turn the sorrow into some bright light and hopefully bring some resolution for these families that have been decimated_ ," [Green said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OpCAYRq8GOww_ilhQbGP3bbuleYUXJUGYADPO3P3GuYWvfpKT55x_P-sPhBjS_hdONO3t85rwqhFbw7L6Z3IFQg1pP-AZ6wmlhvTCugomRsomyvXqIMTPOnTObMzNvEPDp1FoqQbFusMMgHJG6a3STjIrrfDzDMIDKjkBsi6YG8YmrjlnbFS9xU2qUY9eg-Zq42Rg6ELLpW8HNnxD9fGTX1h6m88umqO1RyXyDxELEct1XX3arPPXPROx3D5ELDFbiEQsD2h0L4iJflHUx5wdLRgDerphQh8atTlZLI1Cudu0nIhYpNbjzCYilq4Y97hCjKGqiQxsPyHE75n2u4QvI_4HAAD__x9lhz0). The money raised will benefit Kerr County Relief, TEXSAR, and the Do It For Durrett Foundation through The Pat Green Foundation. A joint fundraising committee collected $3.1 million. This is the first report since Paxton announced his campaign. | | | | | | Friday, July 18, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1917, the United States War Department ordered the at Camp Bowie in Tarrant County to mobilize for combat in Europe. Composed mostly of Texas National Guard troops, the Texas Division—or “T-Patchers”—participated in the Meuse-Argonne offensive in October 1918, suffering 2,601 casualties. Country singer Pat Green gave a benefit concert for flood victims Wednesday night, raising over $1 million. You can watch it and read about it in today's Roundup section. On Fridays, Amy Hess dives deeper into Feel Good Flyover with heartwarming interviews and stories to kick off your weekend right. On Wednesday, the family of deceased Camp Mystic co-owner Dick Eastland said they are unsure whether he from the National Weather Service at 1:14 a.m. on July 4, backtracking from an earlier statement acknowledging Eastland waited to begin evacuating. Meanwhile, Kerr County residents gathered Wednesday to protest a discussed during Monday’s commissioners meeting. The tax assessor-collector was authorized to calculate a "voter approval" tax rate of 8%—only allowed when a disaster declaration has been issued—in addition to the standard 3.5%. At a low water crossing on State Highway 39 in Hunt, TxDOT crews found a that looked "like a towel that got rung," an indication of the force exerted by an estimated that flowed down the Guadalupe River. Campaign Finance Reports Show Tight Senate Race Attorney General Ken Paxton raised $2.9 million for his U.S. Senate campaign , while incumbent John Cornyn received about $800,000 in direct contributions. A joint fundraising committee collected $3.1 million. This is the first report since Paxton announced his campaign. Cornyn, who has been endorsed by the National Republican Senatorial Committee, has about $5.9 million in cash on hand. His joint fundraising committee controls another $2.7 million. Paxton in cash on hand. Meanwhile, Gov. Greg Abbott in donations during the first half of the year, and he has a campaign war chest of over $87 million. Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has in the bank. Yesterday, former Galveston mayor Joe Jaworski announced he would as a Democrat, having fallen short of securing his party’s nomination in 2022. Earlier this week, State Rep. Steve Toth (R-Conroe) announced he would for his seat in Congress. Pat Green Raises Over $1 Million for Flood Victims Fort Worth country singer Pat Green raised over $1 million for flood victims during a at Globe Life Field in Arlington on Wednesday night. Green’s brother, sister-in-law, and two of their children died in the July 4 flash floods in Kerr County. The stadium was empty, and several other prominent artists performed in person and remotely. "No audience, just music and a mission: to help families devastated by the Texas floods—including my own ," in the post about the concert. "You can't define how much pain is going on right now, I've certainly never been through this... I'm trying to turn the sorrow into some bright light and hopefully bring some resolution for these families that have been decimated ," . The money raised will benefit Kerr County Relief, TEXSAR, and the Do It For Durrett Foundation through The Pat Green Foundation. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Bernie Sanders and AOC are now helping Mamdani destroy New York
body:
Here is how we stop communism from taking over NYC

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, this is a wake up call.
Bernie Sanders, a **self-described socialist** who spent decades as an **apologist for the USSR,** has now pledged to join AOC, a Far-Left Radical Democrat, to do everything in their power to **get Zohran Mamdani elected** as the next mayor of New York City.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Zohran Mamdani is a communist ally of Bernie and the Squad who referred to Bernie Sanders as “one of my heroes” and if elected will do everything in his power to help them undermine the progress of the Trump administration.
His new friends are already parading him around Washington, D.C. as they seek to make him the new face of their party.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Bernie, AOC, and their socialist supporters are all in to help Zohran Mamdani win because they know that if they can make Marxists like Zohran Mamdani the mayor of NYC then they will be able to transform the Big Apple into ground zero for their agenda to remake America into a socialist country.
**_[I will not stand by while New York, my home, is destroyed by Zohran Mamdani and I am laying the groundwork to fight back](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

**[We can not Make America Great Again if NYC, our nation’s largest city, remains a sanctuary for criminals, illegal immigrants, and anti-American extremists.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

[HELP ELISE SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
President Trump’s administration and Republicans in Congress are fighting every day to implement an America First agenda and restore our nation but New York Democrats at every level are resisting as they bitterly cling to their power and failed leftist policies.
New York is already suffering with **failed leaders** like _Gov. Kathy Hochul_ and _Rep. Hakeem Jeffries_ , with**corrupt partisans** who weaponize our government like _AG Letitia James_ and _DA Alvin Bragg_ , and with**out of touch leftists** like _AOC_. Electing Zohran Mamdani as Mayor may be the final act that brings the Empire State to its knees.
**Here is what you can expect from Zohran Mamdani and NY Dems if they succeed this November:**

* **Local law enforcement defunded** and replaced with community activists.
* **ICE banned from NYC** and more taxpayer money directed to illegal immigrants.
* Millions of taxpayer dollars allocated to provide **sex changes to children**.
* **Government run grocery stores** that undercut small businesses.

Zohran is a radical that is capitalizing on the frustrations that Americans have had with the years of inflation under Biden and the Democrats. But instead of providing an America First vision like President Trump for the restoration of the American Dream Mamdani chose another path...
His Marxist vision for America involves making everything “free” by**heavily increasing taxes**.
He wants to target “wealthier” and “whiter” neighborhoods first to fund his programs and when businesses close and every New Yorker who is able to flee his socialist experiment has left then he will also come for what remains of the middle class and the working class.
**When he runs out of taxpayer money his “free” programs will collapse and NYC will be left to resemble a third world country.**
It is no wonder that Bernie Sanders - who honeymooned in the Soviet Union and once praised breadlines as a good thing - wants to hand him the keys to New York City.
Friend, the good news is that we haven’t thrown in the towel yet and my team of American patriots is mobilizing to fight fire with fire.
**_[I am going all in to Save New York from communism and I am calling on every American patriot to help provide the resources needed for our team to hold the line](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

_**[This isn’t just about one city.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[This is about the future of our country.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
[HELP ELISE SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Last year, the American people rejected the Radical Left and gave a resounding victory to President Trump and MAGA Republicans with a mandate to implement our America First agenda.
Fellow patriot, this is a major test for the MAGA movement and I need you with us in this fight.
Together, we can overcome Bernie and AOC’s socialist machine, defeat Zohran Mamdani, and defend the freedom and values that have made America the greatest nation on earth.

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aPiS/?__vbtrk=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNzA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Zohran Mamdani is a communist ally of Bernie and the Squad who referred to Bernie Sanders as “one of my heroes” and if elected will do everything in his power to help them undermine the progress of the Trump administration. His new friends are already parading him around Washington, D.C. as they seek to make him the new face of their party. Bernie, AOC, and their socialist supporters are all in to help Zohran Mamdani win because they know that if they can make Marxists like Zohran Mamdani the mayor of NYC then they will be able to transform the Big Apple into ground zero for their agenda to remake America into a socialist country. . President Trump’s administration and Republicans in Congress are fighting every day to implement an America First agenda and restore our nation but New York Democrats at every level are resisting as they bitterly cling to their power and failed leftist policies. New York is already suffering with failed leaders like Gov. Kathy Hochul and Rep. Hakeem Jeffries , withcorrupt partisans who weaponize our government like AG Letitia James and DA Alvin Bragg , and without of touch leftists like AOC. Electing Zohran Mamdani as Mayor may be the final act that brings the Empire State to its knees. Here is what you can expect from Zohran Mamdani and NY Dems if they succeed this November: Local law enforcement defunded and replaced with community activists. ICE banned from NYC and more taxpayer money directed to illegal immigrants. Millions of taxpayer dollars allocated to provide sex changes to children. Government run grocery stores that undercut small businesses. Zohran is a radical that is capitalizing on the frustrations that Americans have had with the years of inflation under Biden and the Democrats. But instead of providing an America First vision like President Trump for the restoration of the American Dream Mamdani chose another path... His Marxist vision for America involves making everything “free” byheavily increasing taxes. He wants to target “wealthier” and “whiter” neighborhoods first to fund his programs and when businesses close and every New Yorker who is able to flee his socialist experiment has left then he will also come for what remains of the middle class and the working class. When he runs out of taxpayer money his “free” programs will collapse and NYC will be left to resemble a third world country. It is no wonder that Bernie Sanders - who honeymooned in the Soviet Union and once praised breadlines as a good thing - wants to hand him the keys to New York City. Friend, the good news is that we haven’t thrown in the towel yet and my team of American patriots is mobilizing to fight fire with fire. . Last year, the American people rejected the Radical Left and gave a resounding victory to President Trump and MAGA Republicans with a mandate to implement our America First agenda. Fellow patriot, this is a major test for the MAGA movement and I need you with us in this fight. Together, we can overcome Bernie and AOC’s socialist machine, defeat Zohran Mamdani, and defend the freedom and values that have made America the greatest nation on earth. Your fellow patriot, Elise Stefanik Proud New Yorker | | | | | | | | | | | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Free Thinker Daily
subject: Banned sniper gear finally available to the public…
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e292565/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvTXVVcGJxZWd6eQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsejE2YzM5UQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNZbHZ1M01kSFhnNVpscw/gaHoutw/s2j2b479ac4)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see Friend:

In fact, you’ll never see the world the same way again...

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them...

**[Codename: DarkForce](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e292565/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsejE2YzM5UQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmZpbGVfaWQ9MTM3JmFmZl9zdWI9RnJlZXRoaW5rZXImYWZmX3N1YjI9NzE2Jl9ubGlkPVlzTnpZUkRxblgmX25oaWRzPW5jWWx2dTNNZEhYZzVabHM/gaHoutw/sdm268273af)**

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

**[Check it out](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e292565/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsejE2YzM5UQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmZpbGVfaWQ9MTM3JmFmZl9zdWI9RnJlZXRoaW5rZXImYWZmX3N1YjI9NzE2Jl9ubGlkPWVVQXU5S3I2NU0mX25oaWRzPW5jWWx2dTNNZEhYZzVabHM/gaHoutw/s3ma9f35fbf)** : These bad boys have real-time IR night vision with 5X magnification, video recording and playback.

Plus they’re IP54 water resistant.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 90% OFF discount...

While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and **free shipping!** **[Grab your DarkForce Binoculars before I run out](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e292565/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsejE2YzM5UQ/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmZpbGVfaWQ9MTM3JmFmZl9zdWI9RnJlZXRoaW5rZXImYWZmX3N1YjI9NzE2Jl9ubGlkPVRrYjNlTVhWQU4mX25oaWRzPW5jWWx2dTNNZEhYZzVabHM/gaHoutw/s7i898579b7)
**
P.S. These bad boys have 7 levels of IR intensity, are USB rechargeable (no batteries needed), and they’re super compact.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e292565/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsejE2YzM5UQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNZbHZ1M01kSFhnNVpscw/gaHoutw/sem3c7828c5)

name: Collapse Imminent
subject: Urgent: Dems on track to permanently lose PA in 3 ½ months
body:
Defend Our Courts has evidence of a looming disaster and no one is listening.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KNzv3KjJ1qQD2c4oOKBYCKWNVEWCBoOyky90usqcazSu4_68_maF9UywEnkeqs5HGIXY3v0ytaTzkineuGI48kZXAQsf8Vx11QDlSXAk8Yb69PhXee-05ksH9WBA63P3KEm-fIDedUnV9WGfnmA-FQovBovrvB4LiQe65Wlt5X6qlc1kYvPiAo-bfDFkeDUULXPh8Hj27NN6ZVhjHA6ihuTzz-1Z1RqTPNeYPfycgXk=&c=L0FdbS0moHfc1TV2L77kNekhULvBf7h0dZKpHqFEPhk5MMOs5SwULw==&ch=UARs_rHMBHxDwzwm4yl_gKaw9rq3DScKPe3sVENMEe6vYsNeFyXIdg==)
---
| Peter,
Like the trope of the alarmed scientist in the disaster movie warning a dismissive public of impending doom, Defend our Courts has evidence of a looming disaster and no one is listening to our dire warnings.
The disaster: MAGA is about to seize control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in an obscure judicial election this November - a move that will transform PA from swing state to deep red GOP stronghold.
PA judicial elections have extremely low turnout so if MAGA mobilizes their voters and we don't, we lose, and this is exactly what we are on track for.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KNzv3KjJ1qQD2c4oOKBYCKWNVEWCBoOyky90usqcazSu4_68_maF9UywEnkeqs5HGIXY3v0ytaTzkineuGI48kZXAQsf8Vx11QDlSXAk8Yb69PhXee-05ksH9WBA63P3KEm-fIDedUnV9WGfnmA-FQovBovrvB4LiQe65Wlt5X6qlc1kYvPiAo-bfDFkeDUULXPh8Hj27NN6ZVhjHA6ihuTzz-1Z1RqTm16v0f9lNKo=&c=L0FdbS0moHfc1TV2L77kNekhULvBf7h0dZKpHqFEPhk5MMOs5SwULw==&ch=UARs_rHMBHxDwzwm4yl_gKaw9rq3DScKPe3sVENMEe6vYsNeFyXIdg==)
---
|
The implications of losing the PA courts are catastrophic:

* No judicial body to issue court orders stopping MAGA's most insidious overreaches in PA

* The majority of Pennsylvania's blue congressional districts gerrymandered into deep red districts

* MAGA given free reign to rig the 2026 midterms and 2028 Presidential where Trump has floated that he will seek a third term

Barely anyone in Democratic circles is talking about this critical race and we've mobilized zero resources to compete here.
MAGA on the other hand is moving quickly. They have kicked off a presidential election scale voter turnout program and billionaire dark money MAGA donor Jeff Yass, the richest man in PA, has already pledged millions to try to buy.
Most PA Democratic voters do not vote in judicial elections like this one and we've done nothing so far to activate them.
[Three and a half months. That's how long Defend our Courts has to build a massive get out the vote program that can compete with the full brunt of MAGA movement who are miles ahead of us. We can catch up but we need to begin building now. Can you rush a donation today of whatever you can spare?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KNzv3KjJ1qQD2c4oOKBYCKWNVEWCBoOyky90usqcazSu4_68_maF9UywEnkeqs5HGIXY3v0ytaTzkineuGI48kZXAQsf8Vx11QDlSXAk8Yb69PhXee-05ksH9WBA63P3KEm-fIDedUnV9WGfnmA-FQovBovrvB4LiQe65Wlt5X6qlc1kYvPiAo-bfDFkeDUULXPh8Hj27NN6ZVhjHA6ihuTzz-1Z1RqTe7A86UMNxtc=&c=L0FdbS0moHfc1TV2L77kNekhULvBf7h0dZKpHqFEPhk5MMOs5SwULw==&ch=UARs_rHMBHxDwzwm4yl_gKaw9rq3DScKPe3sVENMEe6vYsNeFyXIdg==)

clean_body: Defend Our Courts has evidence of a looming disaster and no one is listening. | | | | | == | Peter, Like the trope of the alarmed scientist in the disaster movie warning a dismissive public of impending doom, Defend our Courts has evidence of a looming disaster and no one is listening to our dire warnings. The disaster: MAGA is about to seize control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in an obscure judicial election this November - a move that will transform PA from swing state to deep red GOP stronghold. PA judicial elections have extremely low turnout so if MAGA mobilizes their voters and we don't, we lose, and this is exactly what we are on track for. | | == | The implications of losing the PA courts are catastrophic: No judicial body to issue court orders stopping MAGA's most insidious overreaches in PA The majority of Pennsylvania's blue congressional districts gerrymandered into deep red districts * MAGA given free reign to rig the 2026 midterms and 2028 Presidential where Trump has floated that he will seek a third term Barely anyone in Democratic circles is talking about this critical race and we've mobilized zero resources to compete here. MAGA on the other hand is moving quickly. They have kicked off a presidential election scale voter turnout program and billionaire dark money MAGA donor Jeff Yass, the richest man in PA, has already pledged millions to try to buy. Most PA Democratic voters do not vote in judicial elections like this one and we've done nothing so far to activate them. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == This is an all hands on deck moment. Please do whatever you can. Make a donation. Get out the word. Scream it from the rooftops. We cannot afford to lose PA. We need all the help we can get. Defend Our Courts Fighting for Justice.
