This Florida Supreme Court ruling is big news:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111681167/558058540/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2ZGJjMGQwLWNlNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SxG6_tONa2o6PUZCAwfnQjOH8ZbQ7thvhNsMFzdrgzo=&emci=72f0a62f-4463-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b6dbc0d0-ce63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, the Florida Supreme Court just announced their ruling in _Black Voters Matter v. Byrd_ — the Court upholds DeSantis’ gerrymandered map. **To recap:** In 2022, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis put pressure on the state legislature to pass a discriminatory map that deliberately split up Black voters in Northern Florida – voters who had previously been contained within a congressional district where they could influence the outcome of the representation of that district. This map has been in place for two elections, despite blatantly violating the Florida state constitution. **The Florida Supreme Court will allow the state’s manipulated map to remain in place, upholding a far-right agenda aimed at diluting the power of Black voters in Florida. ** **This is a major betrayal not just to Black voters in Florida who’ve had their voting power weakened, but to everyone who cares about the future of fair maps.** The DeSantis-drawn map was a blatant attempt to secure unearned power for Republicans, an egregious gerrymander. **Now that a state court has allowed an unfair, clearly unconstitutional map to stand, we can be sure Republicans across the country will be emboldened to defy their own state’s constitutional protections for voters. ** [**It’s abundantly clear that we’ve got our work cut out for us to fight back against shady map manipulation. Rush whatever you can to help the NDRC fight for fair maps and a stronger, fairer democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111681169/558058542/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FLSupremeCourt_email_202050718-NDRC-Tier1-FLSupremeCourt_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050718-NDRC-Tier1-FLSupremeCourt_&utm_campaign=FLSupremeCourt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2ZGJjMGQwLWNlNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SxG6_tONa2o6PUZCAwfnQjOH8ZbQ7thvhNsMFzdrgzo=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111681173/558058545/958112375?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FLSupremeCourt_email_202050718-NDRC-Tier1-FLSupremeCourt_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050718-NDRC-Tier1-FLSupremeCourt_&utm_campaign=FLSupremeCourt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2ZGJjMGQwLWNlNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SxG6_tONa2o6PUZCAwfnQjOH8ZbQ7thvhNsMFzdrgzo=)
---
This decision is a tough one to process. The DeSantis-drawn map clearly violates the Fair Districts Amendments of the Florida Constitution — it was part of a playbook to create an artificial political advantage through map manipulation that excludes entire groups of people from fair representation.
When Floridians voted to pass the Fair District Amendments, they did not do it with the expectation that a court would later side with anti-democracy actors like DeSantis to decide that those amendments actually had no meaning. By eliminating critical pro-voter protections, the court has opened the floodgates for more extreme gerrymandering — in Florida and across the country.
And don’t get it twisted, Peter — this is a direct blow to the very foundations of democracy that America represents.
**But American democracy is the people’s democracy — and the NDRC is proud to be leading mobilization efforts in the fight against gerrymandering. **
[**If you’re ready to keep fighting for our democracy, make a contribution to the NDRC today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111681177/558058550/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FLSupremeCourt_email_202050718-NDRC-Tier1-FLSupremeCourt_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050718-NDRC-Tier1-FLSupremeCourt_&utm_campaign=FLSupremeCourt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2ZGJjMGQwLWNlNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SxG6_tONa2o6PUZCAwfnQjOH8ZbQ7thvhNsMFzdrgzo=)

name: Christian Urrutia
subject: The Epstein files are finally out
body:
At least, that’s what the headlines SHOULD say...
| | | | | [](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015nyb6aPcsHPF-l8NoXK9tJva7eI6Kd63P_H6fTYCG7GL166ofxuWmbGWvOkRG5C_4YBUh4v0NbfSoAx79896EMU6wYLAjx5Q4X7aiiPscoKOx9aDpkAowDI4zXj00oEUZrpgZdJe5E67vJ4No2JxT9eSrrCTTRXpJbDWbldAJ890pPzpsic2heqkNIW-O4ABtKSkeQ67au_RfR0NOWW5zIGNrvf1XBB2&c=6RzqROe8I8El2GbFClOR1NS52uhrLCRMduqY9aviMwTvQmixJrLZSA==&ch=P2PjvV-w59riaJ9QhcsralNT4l8f38QG436xsEjkrcrnFFLgN7t2Kg==)
---
| | | | Peter,
The Epstein Files are finally out. Hundreds of names. Powerful elites. And a clear trail of who participated and who looked the other way.
Or at least, that's what the headlines should say.
Instead, MAGA and their enablers in Congress are doing what they always do: protecting the powerful, covering their tracks, and hoping the rest of us will memory-hole yet another of Trump's nasty scandals.
Let me be clear: there is no excuse for withholding this information. The American people deserve the truth -- all of it. Who was involved, who knew, and who stayed silent while the rich and powerful preyed on the young and the powerless.
But in MAGA's America, justice is optional, and depends on whether you belong to the right political "tribe." To MAGA, rules are only for the rest of us. And as a result, the system is designed to protect predators -- not survivors.
This problem is exactly why I'm running.
I didn't get into politics to play nice with power. I'm a human rights lawyer who took on war criminals in court. I'm a Captain in the National Guard who still wears the uniform. I'm the son of immigrants who believes that justice should belong to everyone -- not just the rich and connected.
But let's be honest -- I'm going up against the same corrupt political machine that allowed Epstein and his friends to operate in the shadows for years. The moment I got in this race, they started attacking me because they know I am a threat to the status quo.
Now more than ever, we need leaders who won't flinch when the stakes are high. Who won't look the other way. And who will never be part of the coverup. I pledge to be that kind of candidate, and that kind of leader, now and always.
---
| | | | [I will never stop fighting for truth, accountability, and justice in Congress. But to get there, I need your help right now. NH-01 is a must-win for Democrats, and we can only win by showing the voters a vision of integrity, service, and commitment. Can I count on your support to run the kind of campaign that lifts people up and inspires them during these dark times?](https://hqigqzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015nyb6aPcsHPF-l8NoXK9tJva7eI6Kd63P_H6fTYCG7GL166ofxuWmbGWvOkRG5C_uApx-YblTO-7FHxAz2AIjyqgEoWIzjXlngogKePF_mUpjBt_04MsoqtwnnBz6iq8NPufqNrCDnPnZLNkxd7gJxgKACBIwUxVci7l-0uZChWN3dm9Xg-jArDhL9BQjdmVGormTNRcH0YBWquT1098aA==&c=6RzqROe8I8El2GbFClOR1NS52uhrLCRMduqY9aviMwTvQmixJrLZSA==&ch=P2PjvV-w59riaJ9QhcsralNT4l8f38QG436xsEjkrcrnFFLgN7t2Kg==)

subject: I need you to know something very important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb4n29iuf7f456vv46ih88lvnnhea2kiu5s02ufg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im6oj2cjh2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3hoil2g9cogngsmiu0c03lo1elmh06em7bc2kpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im6oj2cjh2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfn0t0034t4a6pcroc0o2b52rd4hb7uhm6tdmr00_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im6oj2cjh2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq5g4ap55jgbiquqqeeohi0fil8toel82nv9hl0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im6oj2cjh2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza
---

clean_body: Emergency Roll Call of Seniors| | | | | | | | Dear Friend,Seniors are under attack... Polling and disturbing trends show that seniors—once the backbone of the conservative movement —are now the target of an all-out propaganda war!And I’m worried that it’s working... So today, I’m performing an EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS. ... Time is of the essence because recently we’ve seen disturbing reports. According to RealClearPolitics, President Trump is underwater with seniors aged 70+ —the only age group where his approval is negative.And the anecdotal evidence is even stranger—maybe you’ve noticed that the radical protestors showing up to anti-Trump rallies are often 50+, or that older Americans on social media are suddenly turning on Trump! Maybe you even know friends, family, or neighbors who have suddenly fallen into the left’s trap. But with such a radical shift happening before our eyes, we have to ask... what on earth is going on?Is it the Liberal Media? We know that 66% of seniors still rely on TV for their news , and the media has become an echo chamber for anti-American lies. CNN, MSNBC, CBS, ABC, NPR, PBS...The list goes on and on; and their radicalism and propaganda has only increased since Trump took back the White House.Could it be the AARP? They have a direct line to millions of older Americans—and they aren’t shy about their support for ObamaCare, Medicare for All, the “Inflation Reduction Act” under Joe Biden, LGBTQ ideology, and more, even as they play the role of a moderate, “middle of the road group.” Or maybe it’s even George Soros and his web of influence? You and I know that George Soros has a massive web of NGOs, PACs, and investments designed to influence lawmakers and spread Marxist propaganda and chaos.And according to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP Foundation accepted over 10 MILLION DOLLARS —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The AARP once even honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine , calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators ” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time. ” My friend, maybe it’s the combination of the three...the Liberal media, the AARP, and George Soros who are targeting seniors; your friends your family, and YOU. And it’s why I’m asking you to stand with AMAC Action. Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative patriots 50 years of age and over. We have 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And we have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. In fact, our efforts have been so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for mature Americans to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!And today, we are focusing our efforts on fighting back on the left’s increasing grip on America’s seniors. My friend it’s simple—AMAC Action is THE antidote to forces targeting YOUR generation. Because if we don’t act now, we’ll wake up in a country where American seniors are the backbone of the Marxist movemen t...Where the liberal media has a stranglehold on your friends and family ... And where liberal elites and groups ensure this generation will be remembered for radicalism instead of patriotism ...I know I don’t want to ever see that America...and I think you don’t either.AMAC Action is the most effective voice in the nation, advocating for conservative values and changing the hearts and minds of mature Americans. But all that we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. We don’t receive of dime from the federal government. We’re funded by grass roots patriots just like you. So when you answer YES to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS ... When you support AMAC Action, you’re not just declaring your opposition to the left’s propaganda—you’re fighting back! Your donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 or $1,000 ensures that we have the resources to: Advocate for conservative values and policies Spread the truth to seniors everywhere and counter propaganda Ensure that our generation, yours and mine, is remembered for patriotism, NOT for radicalism. And so much more. My friend, together, we can save this generation and secure America’s future. But it starts with your YES today. Please give your critical answer to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS below. Thank you for standing strong.Let’s show them that patriotic seniors aren’t fooled—and we aren’t going anywhere. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. The most radical left-wing forces in the nation are counting on you to sit this one out. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | |

name: Dinesh =?UTF-8?Q?D=E2=80=99Souza?=
subject: I need you to know something very important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zibv195bsjv69e7ik5lvrhn4fjotlir5jche1oh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3imep36c1h2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd14sacamvcp805r3sac4m64q3tp53sorqngr240_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3imep36c1h2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zggvii7cqj4vvci3u5c39cf225evuo0lbje2v2l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3imep36c1h2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zndluf1001glojjdj8h9rqvrmpa38ng7lrkl1ojg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3imep36c1h2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza
---

You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again. Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself. Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything. At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY! And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is. For America, Dinesh D’Souza | | | Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas | | | Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Stand with Bernie! (via VPP)
subject: Trump’s newest target: Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need you to stand up and support Bernie Sanders.
| Folks, Bernie Sanders is fighting back – _AGAIN!_ ⬇️ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92261?t=6&akid=20664%2E878179%2Eb_Hzi9) **We’re THRILLED to see Bernie stand up against MAGA extremism — but Republicans are FURIOUS.** _They HATE to see our grassroots power growing!_

While Trump attacks Senator Sanders relentlessly, we’re getting to work to protect him — _start with sending Sen. Bernie Sanders an URGENT letter thanking him for all his amazing work!_

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now, before we hit send tomorrow at 9am! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92261?t=7&akid=20664%2E878179%2Eb_Hzi9) | [**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92261?t=8&akid=20664%2E878179%2Eb_Hzi9)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, _**but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.**_

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.

**Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.**

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92261?t=9&akid=20664%2E878179%2Eb_Hzi9) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92261?t=10&akid=20664%2E878179%2Eb_Hzi9)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20664%2E878179%2Eb_Hzi9). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20664%2E878179%2Eb_Hzi9).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20664%2E878179%2Eb_Hzi9) to request fewer emails. Bernie Sanders an URGENT letter thanking him for all his amazing work! | TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders FROM: A proud Democrat Subject: Thank you. Dear Senator Bernie Sanders, Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance! It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back. I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you. Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead. | X A grateful Democrat \- The Voter Protection Project | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9m704ju2oebabicfr5k485ua5e8eqhkib9c2p3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zeb5se50jpj3j1khe6n64o16829fumekfhsdpdsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqb9cm8242ka0hnrj7qp439e3463b4f661vnmbb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1u4h95haml85iq75fv7gm8vj2ucr334tf9h7mmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrht1hrkdepkg32igg2i3f35nmjdhlbo0ovto0o0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq6ru8mf67797oop6kchrkho174kenoa6bbt37bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj881grtkds8an2avekvebtufds7sdg08k41p2fo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj71sbuuf8q8t4l23gvb4n4rq4831qlc32md0h58_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhdmms8ltrf35nc6497tdhld30hh85enpongkil8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf6oe0ev2ajf1pqjanpmofjtuj2rm4n50srqgta0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31cti64pj2c8gq48bi4bh28pr5c9geao70clh649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8p55cf0l6atj1bldtn7a2ru7iv5lnm4m5tiqjhg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im1o35c9h2bs)_

subject: BREAKING: New GOP opponent in New Hampshire

body:
Chris is focused on what really matters.
Big news, Peter:
**Another Republican just entered the primary for New Hampshire’s Senate seat.**
He’s another Trump rubber stamp — he even refused to accept the results of the 2020 election.
That means Scott Brown and the growing GOP field will be facing off to see who can appease the MAGA loyalists the most and earn Donald Trump’s endorsement in this race.
While the Republicans wade through their messy primary, **Chris Pappas is focused on what really matters — standing up for Granite Staters and fighting for our future.**
Chris has won competitive elections in New Hampshire _four times in a row._ But he can’t win this fight alone. He is relying on the support of this grassroots team to make sure we can defeat whichever MAGA clone the Republicans decide to nominate against him.

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Colbert told the truth, and now CBS is cancelling his show. Don't let them get away with this.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell CBS: "Don't Cancel Colbert!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td38c0acb-95d0-407f-ac7c-7934b5bcb1d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c09097a-20f4-44d2-b527-db216e661fd7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [In a shocking move, CBS just announced that it will cancel the "Late Show" with Stephen Colbert.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1cf166f8-0f09-4f4a-b642-35ede86190d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The move comes just after Colbert criticized Paramount, CBS's parent company, for agreeing to pay millions of dollars to settle a completely frivolous case brought by the Trump administration. The company cited "financial" considerations, but the explanation seemed bizarre, given that the show has been # 1 in its time slot for 9 years running, and is believed to make a $20,000,000 to $30,000,000 profit per year (according to John Heileman, MSNBC). CBS says profits have dropped, but it made no effort to work with Colbert to reduce expenses, and it told him about the cancellation just hours before telling the world. Colbert has been unafraid to criticize Trump, and he was unafraid to call out CBS. We need his voice, and we need media companies to stand strong against Trump. [**Add your name, and demand that CBS reverse this decision.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc12a7adc-4e51-478a-bff8-9bd1cc8c300d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5d6194b-524c-4928-a5e0-d2fc58daf568/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28908bba-cf49-47e3-806e-f09df9025800/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef002197-ede9-4f44-a34a-6942a15fa119/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Follow Us | [](https://Facebook.com/LeftAction)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A new project from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)
---
Our political system is rigged right now. We have more people in power who would rather kiss Donald Trump’s ring than do anything meaningful for the people they represent. Republicans in Congress would rather fight for a corporation’s bottom line than fight for a person’s livable wage. Billionaires pour loads of money into races to get a return on investment: bigger tax giveaways and even more power to rig the economy in their favor. And just recently, 269 Republicans in Congress voted for a bill that takes meals away from hungry children and seniors, strips health care from millions, and marks the largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the rich in our history. They smiled, clapped, and cheered when it was signed into law. Something has to change. But we can’t just hope for it. We have to fight for it. So today, I’m announcing a new project: **Fight PAC.** [**This organization will support, uplift, and help elect fighters for the working class to Congress. I want to share more about it below, but if you’re in the position to make a contribution right now to support Fight PAC and our campaign, you’ll help demonstrate the strong grassroots support for this kind of movement.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=8&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)
---

---
This is about electing leaders who understand what it really means to fight for working families. It means taking a stand when it’s hard, and speaking truth to power. It means refusing corporate PAC checks — even when it would be easier to take them. It means unapologetically proposing bold economic reforms — not just small measures that nibble around the edges. Democrats have the chance to take back the House and Senate in November 2026 and I will do everything possible to make that happen. We know that Democrats win when we go out there and fight for the big, structural changes that will make our government and our economy work for working people. We also know that Democrats need our majorities to be filled with fighters who want to pass plans that truly transform the lives of working people in this country. Contributions to Fight PAC will support candidates who are doing just that. [**If you believe it’s time to stop begging billionaires and corrupt Republicans to start fighting for working people, then please join us today by splitting a contribution between Fight PAC and our campaign.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=14&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3062?t=12&akid=2599%2E4032634%2EzJ-Z2b)
---

Did you see this message, Peter?

We have officially endorsed **Christina Hines in _the congressional race that will likely determine which political party controls Congress_** in the second half of Trump’s term. Eight candidates are vying for this seat, and **Christina is the only woman.**

In the 2022 election for this seat, Republican John James won the district by just 0.5%. Now, John James is running for Governor, meaning this is the **_only open competitive House seat_** on the entire electoral map.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111692715/558087141/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250718BUMP_N_EH_90DO_6_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YTZlNDYxLWRiNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=36hjNW2JhAgh5xhKDLso_40dWLLl2aCw0GxeNJtdb18=)
---
John James, pictured with President Donald Trump, voted earlier this year to jail doctors for providing abortion care. He has also compared abortion to genocide. **Experts have rated MI-10 as a tossup, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026.** Christina’s candidacy presents an incredible opportunity for Democrats to regain control of the House, and we cannot let it slip away.

**Christina is the right person for the job. Voters in her district know her, trust her, and believe in her commitment to their best interests. However, she’s falling behind her male competitors in fundraising. _Early_ money is essential for political campaigns, especially as institutional support groups decide where to invest. This is why she needs our help sooner rather than later.**

[**This is our _most realistic_ prospect for flipping a House seat from red to blue. Help us ensure Christina has the support she needs to win by rushing a split donation today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111692716/558087142/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250718BUMP_N_EH_90DO_6_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YTZlNDYxLWRiNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=36hjNW2JhAgh5xhKDLso_40dWLLl2aCw0GxeNJtdb18=)

Let’s do this,

\- Erica

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

As we gear up for the critical 2026 midterm elections, we have another exciting endorsement for you: **Christina Hines running in the congressional race that will likely decide which political party will have control of congress in the 2nd half of Trump’s term.**

In the 2022 election for this seat, Republican John James won this district by 0.5% – not even a full 1% – despite outspending his Democratic opponent by a 5-to-1 margin. Now, John James is running for Governor, meaning **this is the _only _open_ competitive_ House seat on the entire electoral map.** All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents – which makes it tougher for a Democrat to break through.

This race provides an incredible opportunity for Democrats to win back the House and we absolutely cannot let it slip away.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111692717/558087143/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250718BUMP_N_EH_90DO_6_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YTZlNDYxLWRiNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=36hjNW2JhAgh5xhKDLso_40dWLLl2aCw0GxeNJtdb18=)
---
**Larry Sabato’s ‘Crystal Ball’ has rated MI-10 as a Tossup in 2026, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026.** When Christina was on the ballot as the Democratic Nominee for County Prosecutor in 2024, she outperformed both the Democratic congressional nominee and Kamala Harris.

**There are eight candidates running for this seat and Christina is the only woman.

Here’s the thing: Christina is highly qualified, but she’s lagging behind her male competitors in fundraising. This is the time that she needs the most help, as institutional support groups are evaluating where to invest.**

[**This is our _most realistic_ prospect for flipping a House seat from red to blue. Help us ensure Christina has what she needs to catch up to her all-male opponents and get her as much attention as possible by rushing a split contribution between Her Bold Move and her campaign today. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-hines/?refcode=EM_F_250718BUMP_N_EH_90DO_6_G_N_L2&amount=20.26) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Christina Hines:_ | | [**$20.26 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111692718/558087144/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250718BUMP_N_EH_90DO_6_G_N_EB20.26&express_lane=true&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YTZlNDYxLWRiNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=36hjNW2JhAgh5xhKDLso_40dWLLl2aCw0GxeNJtdb18=)

---
** ** | | [**OTHER »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111692723/558087149/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250718BUMP_N_EH_90DO_6_G_N_EBOther&refcode2=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YTZlNDYxLWRiNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=36hjNW2JhAgh5xhKDLso_40dWLLl2aCw0GxeNJtdb18=)
---
Christina is running to replace John James. In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, **Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill”** which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history.

Here’s how Christina responded:

_“The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens - and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them.

I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.”_

Christina’s story is one of hard work, service, and fighting for others. **This is our _most realistic opportunity_ of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen. Let’s get Christina the resources she’ll need to triumph. Each and every flipped seat in the U.S. House of Representatives gets us closer to a Democratic majority – and further away from future “Big Ugly Bills” by Trump’s GOP.**

[**We are proud to endorse Christina Hines in this deeply important race. As you know,_early money_ goes the furthest when it comes to campaign funding. Can we count on you to be an early investor in this race? Rush a split donation of $20.26 or more today! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111692724/558087150/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_250718BUMP_N_EH_90DO_6_G_N_L3&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YTZlNDYxLWRiNjMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=36hjNW2JhAgh5xhKDLso_40dWLLl2aCw0GxeNJtdb18=)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor

There are eight candidates running for this seat and Christina is the only woman. Here’s the thing: Christina is highly qualified, but she’s lagging behind her male competitors in fundraising. This is the time that she needs the most help, as institutional support groups are evaluating where to invest. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Christina Hines: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Christina is running to replace John James. In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history. Here’s how Christina responded: “The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens - and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them. I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.” Christina’s story is one of hard work, service, and fighting for others. This is our most realistic opportunity of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen. Let’s get Christina the resources she’ll need to triumph. Each and every flipped seat in the U.S. House of Representatives gets us closer to a Democratic majority – and further away from future “Big Ugly Bills” by Trump’s GOP. = Together, Erica Henry Senior Political Advisor Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. name: McKay for Senate
subject: Ronald Reagan warned us. It’s happening now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McKay for Senate Inc 19 Bakers Creek Rd, Warwick, RI, 02886
body:
I didn’t serve in the Cold War to sit back and watch THIS:

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo4glmq9bfii7jsfj5k281kt66fbba4mnuafu21o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im9o74cjh2bs)
---
_**Patriot**_ ,

**[🚨 I need you to chip in RIGHT NOW if you believe America is under attack from within. 🚨](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvjmouh8dnkf4qktju67maecms192foh30hqst9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im9o74cjh2bs)**
---
[ CHIP IN TODAY!
<CLICK HERE>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z39sbc6lka3tgblkhakoqq3joel73eqttu6q5hto_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im9o74cjh2bs)
---
**I served during the Cold War.**

_**I stood face-to-face with the threat of communism.**_

Back then, it was in Moscow.

Now? It’s here. _**In our schools.** **In our government.** **At our border.**_

**The red threat is REAL** — _**and I’m running for the United States Senate to stop it.**_

This isn’t hyperbole. It’s history repeating itself.

They called it the Soviet Union in the '80s.

Now they hide it behind buzzwords like “ _**equity**_ ” “ _**climate justice**_ ” and “ _**reparations**_.”

It’s not progress.

It’s _**SOCIALISM**_ with a fresh coat of lipstick—and they’re ramming it down America’s throat.

But I’ve seen this story before. It ends in RUIN..

_**That’s why I’m launching the most unapologetically anti-communist campaign in the country—and I need you standing with me.**_
---
[ SUPPORT RAY'S CAMPAIGN HERE! ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z28q5s9fn97f72dd48ad8bkopkeu6g3vom7ivqug_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im9o74cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zstmjv60k7bgtltfeha653km9paauthhbjsv939o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im9o74cjh2bs)
---
**Ronald Reagan once said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”**

Well, guess what?

_**This is that generation.**_

And the Left isn’t hiding it anymore.

**They want WIDE-OPEN borders.** **A surveillance state.** **Thought police.** **Drag queens in kindergarten classrooms. And full-blown Marxist brainwashing in every school in America.**

_**They want to erase America—and rebuild it in their own radical image.**_

_**I risked my life once to stop this.**_

_**Now I’m risking everything again.**_

But I can’t win this battle without you.

**[👉 _Patriot_ , will you rush a donation before it’s too late?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z46vdibbncp1k76ce7j0frd7j1rkala882s0ff28_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im9o74cjh2bs)**
---
[ RUSH YOUR DONATION HERE ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkjvpoq6dq94gnne2a8s4huesud98lkn8givq4u0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im9o74cjh2bs)
---
We’re building a movement of patriots who refuse to surrender this country.

No more compromise. No more silence.

Just one final, full-throttle fight for freedom.

__**Will you join me?**__
---
[ DEPLOY WITH RAY HERE! ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmq8msc395b0sa514a7e97ks9p3t0ak1fitm0kl0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c3im9o74cjh2bs)
---
_– Ray McKay_
_Cold War Veteran_
_Candidate for U.S. Senate, Rhode Island_

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Halfway there — but Republican attacks are escalating.
body:
GOP attacks are escalating — help us fight back and close the fundraising gap.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K0EWGWW99TVE2R2M63SWRFFK_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K0EWGWW99TVE2R2M63SWRFFK_1)

| | | | Peter, We’re halfway through July, and we’ve raised critical funds to power our fight for Tennessee families — but we’re still short of our goal. Just as we’re pushing forward, the GOP is ramping up its attacks on our neighbors: targeting innocent families based on the color of their skin, cutting food assistance programs like SNAP and summer food programs, and enacting extremist MAGA laws targeting working and middle class families statewide. We cannot let these Trump sycophants steamroll our Tennessee values. Your support keeps our organizers in the field, our communications aligned, and our lawmakers prepared to fight back in the Tennessee House. **Pitch in now to help us close the gap and stand up to Republican overreach. Together, we will protect immigrant families, access to healthcare and local economies.**
---

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene **[sounded off on Democrat Rep. Melanie Stansbury](https://substack.com/redirect/5f332a9c-50c8-4558-a20e-504144904408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she made scathing accusations towards Republicans and the Trump administration for "stealing the power of the people," during a defense budget hearing.
MTG didn't let her get away with it...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5f332a9c-50c8-4558-a20e-504144904408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5f332a9c-50c8-4558-a20e-504144904408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Let us be clear, the White House and an unelected bureaucrat is trying to steal the power of the purse and to steal the power of the people!!" Stansbury said. "This is happening under your watch! ... You are giving away our constitutional authority to a corrupt and chaotic administration!"
Shortly after Stansbury's floor speech,**[Greene took the podium, reminding Democrats that America stands alone](https://substack.com/redirect/5f332a9c-50c8-4558-a20e-504144904408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to handle its own problem, and no foreign country is sending us aid as we send billions around the globe to help them.
"I'd like to ask, what foreign country showed up to help Americans in our time of distress, in our humanitarian crisis?!" Greene asked. "Which foreign country said 'here America, here is millions and billions of dollars to help you!' I'm going to tell you zero!!"
**["Here we are again, while the American people are enslaved by $30 trillion in debt,...](https://substack.com/redirect/5f332a9c-50c8-4558-a20e-504144904408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** we go by this belief that we have to fund every foreign country around the world!" Greene continued. "I say enough! And the American people say enough!"
Watch Greene go off at the Democrats here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5f332a9c-50c8-4558-a20e-504144904408?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Dear Reader,
The Deep State fought to kill it.
Joe Biden tried to bury it... but with the stroke of his pen...
President Trump unlocked a revolutionary healing miracle so powerful, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. hails its "**[extraordinary ability to cure disease.](https://substack.com/redirect/06ea2729-288e-4233-b646-9b693ccdd2f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "
We call it **[Nature's Divine Healing Code](https://substack.com/redirect/06ea2729-288e-4233-b646-9b693ccdd2f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**...
And if you're facing cancer, diabetes, Alzheimer's, heart disease, or even arthritis, you need to see this **[life-changing video](https://substack.com/redirect/06ea2729-288e-4233-b646-9b693ccdd2f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now, BEFORE an activist liberal Judge shuts it down.
P.S. It doesn't matter whether you're a Democrat or Republican. Nature's Divine Healing Code is your **[God-given birthright](https://substack.com/redirect/06ea2729-288e-4233-b646-9b693ccdd2f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. All you need to do is welcome it into your life. **[Click here now](https://substack.com/redirect/06ea2729-288e-4233-b646-9b693ccdd2f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/06ea2729-288e-4233-b646-9b693ccdd2f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Domestic violence survivors blast Mamdani for ignorant police comments
NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani's 2020 comments opposing police response to domestic violence calls have resurfaced, where **[he argued that domestic violence situations "would be far better handled](https://substack.com/redirect/a8f9977e-1d50-4f28-9d84-eadb9fa77325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by people trained to deal with those specific situations, as opposed to an individual with a gun."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b9b83ed7-1f25-43e5-8449-8228cb2204e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Domestic violence survivors and advocates are warning that lives could be endangered** if Mamdani implements these policies, with Michelle Esquenazi saying victims "hiding in the bathroom with their children" need immediate police protection because "it's a matter of life and death."
* **Multiple survivors credit police with saving their lives** , including Esquenazi who says NYPD officers protected her and her children during a 1993 attack by her ex-husband, and Jennifer Harrison whose life was saved when a cop warned her that her dangerous boyfriend was returning home.
* **Women's safety advocates emphasize the critical need for armed police response** , noting that domestic violence is the "leading cause of homicide death for women" and that 30% of women experience intimate partner violence, making fast law enforcement response with proper training and resources essential.

* * *
# CBS cancels Stephen Colbert for "financial" reasons
CBS announced it **[will end Stephen Colbert's "The Late Show"](https://substack.com/redirect/41c0e003-cc95-400d-9f9a-a5252b80bb3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after the upcoming TV season, calling it a "purely financial decision" and stating they consider Colbert "irreplaceable" while retiring the entire "Late Show" franchise in May 2026.
* **The cancellation ends CBS's long tradition of original late-night programming** that began in 1993 when the network hired David Letterman away from NBC, with executives citing "growing economic pressures" and "challenging backdrop in late night" as reasons.
* **The decision comes amid speculation about increased scrutiny from Skydance Media** , which is acquiring Paramount Global and whose leader David Ellison has shown interest in political content, potentially affecting hosts like Colbert and Jon Stewart who frequently criticize President Trump.
* **Colbert has been critical of both Trump and his own network's parent company** , condemning Trump's handling of the Epstein files and calling Paramount's $16 million settlement with Trump over a "60 Minutes" interview a "big fat bribe" to secure approval for the Skydance acquisition.

subject: Trump’s $2 billion prison fantasy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Trump wants to spend $2 billion of your tax dollars, Friend.
But here’s the kicker: he wants to rebuild Alcatraz at a time when families across Florida are barely scraping by , and we already have a prison nightmare happening right here in Florida.
Alligator Alcatraz, the ICE detention center where families have reported horrifying conditions, is living proof that we don’t need more prison projects:
🚨 Maggots in the food
🚨 No working showers
🚨 Retaliation against detainees who speak up
But instead of fixing that? They want to build another one with a $2 billion price tag.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4E4D38574D46375642414B6653582F61706A6D4957324F344D6448463961614637475A45427A473665713370716C74652B4E42723944664536616B556D726837/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-18%20at%209.37.09%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This is what happens when politicians like Ashley Moody and Florida’s MAGA machine empower Trump with zero accountability.
We don’t need more prisons. We need affordable housing . Clean water . Hurricane recovery . I’m running for U.S. Senate because I believe in priorities that reflect people, not power.
Let’s put an end to this cruelty and corruption. Pledge $10 HERE to flip Florida’s Senate seat now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I had no silver spoon
body:
This is my story, but it’s not so different for many Americans. |
---
I want to share something from the heart with you, Fellow American.

**_My story._**
It isn't one of glitz and glamour -- it's about hard work, loss, and fighting for what's right. I'm reaching out to tell you why I'm in this fight for our future, and why I need you with me.

Neither of my parents finished high school. But they were hardworking and determined that their children would surpass their achievements.

Most of my growing up happened on the main street of a small textile mill town. My parents had a business establishment -- a combination beer joint, restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall -- known as the Sanitary Cafe right on Main Street in Central, SC. We all lived in the back of the bar where we worked late into the evening, especially my mom, before heading off to bed in the backroom.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=09b4184c87744636a2fd307fec81e0b5&_e=d-LItmWOrbSSjdqPvnVx9_UwgI8M_Ap28jfYokF9lo5jNRQIlPuz0TSxsFwtyWkhmpTZbqqK_vkyPIFq6eneg-4CQdIu1FW4PWrEDVlFQS_tW1ffJs861fk6uUomqjYzGtouFZUcFLYYTqPrlWpvJ061Xn4E64gcZDiCLsl-7EmG8_4kHenVK7qwl95hCbVNFraZuhuQ86yk-RM_bnBt2GOcTZd-yrf4S9y_-9A0tYPPGlN2T3o9yTNBme137VqtWddk7ISA5sSzTR7Sb7kR4l8phck0mwiaMT0CduzI2boFk3sL8Hh38iybcQtsgAbvbkALEg50YBFTeVbHZ73lhqMMFH6G6QlsnlfCs3ERfZT8QBKwYjR0At4GWG_QoyHoHJZZ7yRmQniESFCJvL_Wjp99Nbmek8chWQxoz4H2FLGV9s0QQXtIkT4emx4hZfhqsSLqk8woxX-vu4kM74DFoxRt9oS0-raVC7JP0AKS_OVJ_hOEgs-HfucxLoaeNV34yRvhb74ZDVTAoeOkHmdqXiWgVOWp-p-1LtgQzgUyfcvS81tV5wc9Wyd0pF8ePZ5vfQW6M8DjM1Jz7saRJ8QkzvlwGWN495SoOHL7hC4KMk4ca5A8ATp46rW1t-4KpGjdlZ7NSBD8YwyEEFFqGubvpbmOj8ybkW3jxquoD7OmKFYPba81cYgjvJRxLMKmYxyz) I had no silver spoon in my mouth but I never felt I was missing out on something because I didn't live in a house like my friends did. I had a great life, and it was a great way to grow up.

I was the first in my family to attend college, but then life hit me hard. While I was in school, I lost my mom and dad within two years of each other. And just like that, I stepped up to help raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, while coming back home on the weekends to help at our family business.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=09b4184c87744636a2fd307fec81e0b5&_e=d-LItmWOrbSSjdqPvnVx9_UwgI8M_Ap28jfYokF9lo5jNRQIlPuz0TSxsFwtyWkhmpTZbqqK_vkyPIFq6eneg-4CQdIu1FW4PWrEDVlFQS_tW1ffJs861fk6uUomqjYzGtouFZUcFLYYTqPrlWpvJ061Xn4E64gcZDiCLsl-7EmG8_4kHenVK7qwl95hCbVNFraZuhuQ86yk-RM_bnBt2GOcTZd-yrf4S9y_-9A0tYNCoDFwZxL9Ti18KHkC8GIcIiKNyWaZmVyo-qL0sTw8pWM8qR98AHZrprZZs8mVY3knlvbSQhoWrXHy1tCpKjR-A9o1dBY4-mfH2Do7_nInaXbcR90f0A65RKL-S-VF6kdXfpf1AkFIh3oQeQ0j0XU9pteV1cGEar5LjuCkmUtnVldM9LifzoqNwSmZ7VONc27gsZ_aZsC5iiIVlp9f6OS693gV5coEuupSNeFGRP-vekNw6OfziEAJKLlWYWUQq-rEDMdd-0erqVqR2D_95cDTdX6kemI3PNJmR9jGRw1q8HALAwEIXk0x8UlhjdIEpgzPohSmf7V1TvmzHA7ZyeNJAzXjWbhlivTNo98fANWQkxtg4NrROuch9AxgDm8tj8zbWoor7s0kQIZcw9ls1FIVW_kWV7SxWiMA8bk8NB7esphGuUAp7iMM9DpPXy3_bijKyoDFd0QpsBelrjQvNTxb) **Fellow American, I learned some tough lessons early on.**

After law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a Judge Advocate General, serving as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after the people of South Carolina sent me to the United States Senate, I continued my service in the Air Force Reserves. I performed several short deployments in war zones like Afghanistan and Iraq, standing shoulder to shoulder with our brave men and women in uniform.

My story isn't all that different from yours or most people across this great country. I didn't have anything handed to me. I worked hard, grew up quickly, and took on big responsibilities.

**But what shaped me most was listening to the hard -working South Carolinians who'd come by our family business, sharing their hopes and struggles, or hearing the perspectives of my brave colleagues in the military.** _Whether I agreed with them or not, those conversations built my understanding of what Americans need and deserve._

Now, Fellow American, we all know our nation's in a tough spot -- we're divided, but there are some things we should agree on, plain and simple.

**🇺🇸 We need a country where you can raise your family without fear, where the streets are safe.**
**🇺🇸 We need a country where the American Dream isn't just a slogan.**
_It's alive, and every hard -working American has a real shot at it, no matter where they start._
**[That's what I'm fighting for every single day, Fellow American.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=09b4184c87744636a2fd307fec81e0b5&_e=d-LItmWOrbSSjdqPvnVx9_UwgI8M_Ap28jfYokF9lo5jNRQIlPuz0TSxsFwtyWkhmpTZbqqK_vkyPIFq6eneg-4CQdIu1FW4PWrEDVlFQS_tW1ffJs861fk6uUomqjYzGtouFZUcFLYYTqPrlWpvJ061Xn4E64gcZDiCLsl-7EmG8_4kHenVK7qwl95hCbVNFraZuhuQ86yk-RM_bnBt2GOcTZd-yrf4S9y_-9A0tYM5Hjhwl_VOm08HIbMIZXakIhXXKWqFcIrgdbVvOplaL7uDHVUJKWPTY4Rz9ku8vWusJwTRQZWveKGirOmCc7uuoxYPnGE5Oe29YuiRfnvLNChJu-U5MYQKo_gvj6y693E9fnAcbqj0Vpcefmiy7qeSnHi7JzgMpZIkHg0hLtkS0WGV5dLSCyj25LQrMZU2OO4PMHVQYhjNn1slXaaKn1rr7JV0VIxhBXwQFLNsF0xjsN48kTJZd4e2eq1gn790rAhDVLNs1LPJn2U14s_GUK77AUJ_K5JkmCSsXPCffMgrrzRfLXTxwBHWyxZ6-RSlTIg383T8N_H96NsqwNvW7pW-VhhDAPy9Ymx3unMvtDp0FCel2a3gzqFjSVX7Qp7-A72Gd2U2rbE-dGJOx-_lfglGpSgh88T2pJnRXiwUPaY19sRqbXIdXJY4icWlXgAFKvIX03xRAXbCdg6x6CvtmT5I)**

Sadly, there are folks in Washington, across the aisle, who don't see it that way. They're fine with open borders, allowing violent crime spill into our neighborhoods. They're okay with slapping higher taxes on hard-working folks like you, piling more burdens on your family. That isn't right, and I won't stand for it.

So I'm coming to you with a simple ask, Fellow American. If you've got a few dollars to spare, **[would you consider joining Team Graham to support my campaign?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=09b4184c87744636a2fd307fec81e0b5&_e=d-LItmWOrbSSjdqPvnVx9_UwgI8M_Ap28jfYokF9lo5jNRQIlPuz0TSxsFwtyWkhmpTZbqqK_vkyPIFq6eneg-4CQdIu1FW4PWrEDVlFQS_tW1ffJs861fk6uUomqjYzGtouFZUcFLYYTqPrlWpvJ061Xn4E64gcZDiCLsl-7EmG8_4kHenVK7qwl95hCbVNFraZuhuQ86yk-RM_bnBt2GOcTZd-yrf4S9y_-9A0tYPwWbrU3wqT1pMscxsT2zJDp_0BbRSSFgpq1InjHqBGz29i0x9cP32NkBql7bf5z8DWO8jCOyoDX6J8dEH_iWG0FQgI1eD1oM8NkK6tJUPUzgkrRPYmwBqwhTN3fhNrv2Q0s7LiG-z5uBSRAERENlNYlLrLckCK0H7eqG9P_fxOw0kbzFijhwX8ElQjDLn1MQfV2TJQHC22Eok_YQw82QY87s51Z2gKWsmTQMg5QAlL1lFNauvmNyrv0zoIu-TP1A0IAehfQfpk0m0yRY0fkuafKzHJHYu34okAvFjMO_KcSiVR0hg8AbJAOe7wf7f9Ad0pca30gOmoovJTCQugWScFFh4hqUXO22FYJNNbGjstSEmCGwfdVwnJhd06pmJ0yZFc7scqDgMLjoKEsSytLdL1WtSJMpeaDCjEyCIuQcAHEkyZ0Q_Ba_PEHFKXcVMneq1yRsM1J5wtJ1Jfq5TMfwqz)**

| [**JOIN TEAM GRAHAM >>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=09b4184c87744636a2fd307fec81e0b5&_e=d-LItmWOrbSSjdqPvnVx9_UwgI8M_Ap28jfYokF9lo5jNRQIlPuz0TSxsFwtyWkhmpTZbqqK_vkyPIFq6eneg-4CQdIu1FW4PWrEDVlFQS_tW1ffJs861fk6uUomqjYzGtouFZUcFLYYTqPrlWpvJ061Xn4E64gcZDiCLsl-7EmG8_4kHenVK7qwl95hCbVNFraZuhuQ86yk-RM_bnBt2GOcTZd-yrf4S9y_-9A0tYMqj-R10Ax6urCHGBThGBnpax2TAuwR6sVa3mSUSnhkOOLdJKpUP4IdOgYNF2RAnQ6WF-RgyL6Bl7Yr22GzaBkq1YzhFhprxPBBjRLQpmlo2pRFiK-9oa5pzVJlBuEe2mLq5XVxvWXtycNcM404TDAoEwxFlIjiimx_eWJJofhFANf85JZWQH5DOuinFgN6nmzWrxdvNxABx79avZnPPSgOttZkEf0gXvkkH8AA9kAuMA6NTBVps7O6K4ZwAkKNY2BAT0NgNueEN3puCkjl5p52OR0KyU-7-l34RQH6OQxwLM4w78B0LspVc-16C7iu7AgrnmW6_N9rNKKdRPmZtR8JEnwJU-LzXex_ak7SqBzJnMfN1uZvSt3M_7VT0uraNqsUrB4MAVHVXP5s1ZCREfLNuY8QFt1qfCUR6En-P2UywD75VxT8i4UDhH2ITPTCgL_YvRdx6G5gccyvZc3iMq_k)
---

Fellow American, I know we can build a country that keeps our communities safe, rewards hard work, and gives every American a chance to chase their dreams -- just like I did. Thank you for taking a minute to hear my story. I'm grateful for you.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=09b4184c87744636a2fd307fec81e0b5&_e=d-LItmWOrbSSjdqPvnVx9_UwgI8M_Ap28jfYokF9lo5jNRQIlPuz0TSxsFwtyWkhmpTZbqqK_vkyPIFq6eneg-4CQdIu1FW4PWrEDVlFQS_tW1ffJs861fk6uUomqjYzGtouFZUcFLYYTqPrlWpvJ061Xn4E64gcZDiCLsl-7EmG8_4kHenVK7qwl95hCbVNFraZuhuQ86yk-RM_bnBt2GOcTZd-yrf4S9y_-9A0tYMLOZmJ0x_1LHkH17aPSaY1JeTfJnn5ojJjTdMLMnmO2CgKqMB28351_vJ0X85JhVNu-Frn13o9GOJrg7_uOrTkQzxVGVFwkD_ydEHhlSYmGnw5e6mYWQ4M4BZ_WQi1vMZpIt4RxPZTSI8oVN55Dmtrh3uStD9Lw-eZ1joXHF6VDCaMN7TvFlSz9Fkd9H3GnB2zOiwgwYFMTkj_Q76VSB-nsA8GYSfd-yRF69leaS7qjW-u0o_3M70xKCzOc17vRY9lMpJoAPS3tnJl9iNAzQmB-HA5fUvhG9qHAGLccUnP1bLVzFIvXSSca2zawKRorT-3dEtKHTZ4V6UMKW6QlNNBaKgwblGd8kg54Aa9p5Gzc3lmMb-Nzlq4AN7YgVQnHNr6SmvmxQ3qbknePzRs_fWQYDhKrec5sPip08fq29Lubi8uLIdNOppLQzjS-47lunEbi2Gqcfc51cLYZ_0DbbZ8)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=09b4184c87744636a2fd307fec81e0b5&_e=d-LItmWOrbSSjdqPvnVx9_UwgI8M_Ap28jfYokF9lo5jNRQIlPuz0TSxsFwtyWkhmpTZbqqK_vkyPIFq6eneg-4CQdIu1FW4PWrEDVlFQS_tW1ffJs861fk6uUomqjYzGtouFZUcFLYYTqPrlWpvJ061Xn4E64gcZDiCLsl-7EmG8_4kHenVK7qwl95hCbVNFraZuhuQ86yk-RM_bnBt2GOcTZd-yrf4S9y_-9A0tYMTP0rTOmZ25XvsYrcCbZzRBQWAXYYRV_3B3nkDnEuU41uik12OlBCfL-2ohSP9nSD6V9PmeAhy6IKaobiMvfCBlbu1sAwuei0rQtU9eojH8CwdkGnRHPJABBvQb4ZXBI_XLluBvAcCw1AyA2Ox-1OTRYfzhxmeQxhYHf2dyJronz3w8LXrBNML_AFfuUEcLjS3pmnymhJszjFA0b7OcTf4tmvSW9Qd9eGcV8ayjQESBwPxjiA9V-7EsLSiON3o5rJQEfB1Beek4tDB_tHKBXdP4kl2JVRzyQsSrNZI94LKnHLkT2wnFmBP57ZJzzKlQBapqw4mV48_SfW2rpGsNMLHF0aW4dJfeB7zwRgFC3SHpR7q1Fgn8E6OqYEvxHxPCRU4Bk4Lkoh7iaHSWtUicNFbLGx-89SufQulUwfnkn46Uvg0aDOcGlnW3AWYlTBhWSbjUiQQPrmJXZpwGqo0Ta-l)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

clean_body: This is my story, but it’s not so different for many Americans. | I want to share something from the heart with you, Fellow American. My story. It isn't one of glitz and glamour -- it's about hard work, loss, and fighting for what's right. I'm reaching out to tell you why I'm in this fight for our future, and why I need you with me. Neither of my parents finished high school. But they were hardworking and determined that their children would surpass their achievements. Most of my growing up happened on the main street of a small textile mill town. My parents had a business establishment -- a combination beer joint, restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall -- known as the Sanitary Cafe right on Main Street in Central, SC. We all lived in the back of the bar where we worked late into the evening, especially my mom, before heading off to bed in the backroom. I had no silver spoon in my mouth but I never felt I was missing out on something because I didn't live in a house like my friends did. I had a great life, and it was a great way to grow up. I was the first in my family to attend college, but then life hit me hard. While I was in school, I lost my mom and dad within two years of each other. And just like that, I stepped up to help raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, while coming back home on the weekends to help at our family business. Fellow American, I learned some tough lessons early on. After law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a Judge Advocate General, serving as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after the people of South Carolina sent me to the United States Senate, I continued my service in the Air Force Reserves. I performed several short deployments in war zones like Afghanistan and Iraq, standing shoulder to shoulder with our brave men and women in uniform. My story isn't all that different from yours or most people across this great country. I didn't have anything handed to me. I worked hard, grew up quickly, and took on big responsibilities. But what shaped me most was listening to the hard -working South Carolinians who'd come by our family business, sharing their hopes and struggles, or hearing the perspectives of my brave colleagues in the military. Whether I agreed with them or not, those conversations built my understanding of what Americans need and deserve. Now, Fellow American, we all know our nation's in a tough spot -- we're divided, but there are some things we should agree on, plain and simple. 🇺🇸 We need a country where you can raise your family without fear, where the streets are safe. 🇺🇸 We need a country where the American Dream isn't just a slogan. It's alive, and every hard -working American has a real shot at it, no matter where they start. Sadly, there are folks in Washington, across the aisle, who don't see it that way. They're fine with open borders, allowing violent crime spill into our neighborhoods. They're okay with slapping higher taxes on hard-working folks like you, piling more burdens on your family. That isn't right, and I won't stand for it. So I'm coming to you with a simple ask, Fellow American. If you've got a few dollars to spare, | Fellow American, I know we can build a country that keeps our communities safe, rewards hard work, and gives every American a chance to chase their dreams -- just like I did. Thank you for taking a minute to hear my story. I'm grateful for you. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.
