name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: President Trump needs your help
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166j32nk1khhb3zjifyuwzfk58week40si3obv4gc2f1hzsidxwkq3czar4ob4oxomnxelpqq6rgdbvppbzyztg&__stmp=szlqbo&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
|
Dear Fellow Taxpayer,

I am going to share with you Washington DC's dirtiest secret.

Federal union bosses have seized control of the federal workforce and declared President Trump and Elon Musk ENEMY #1 and #2 for fighting to "Drain the Swamp" and save hundreds of billions of tax dollars by downsizing and reforming the bloated DC bureaucracy!

You see, union control of government is a CANCER killing the U.S. taxpayer -- impoverishing America's workers and entrepreneurs with red tape, wasteful spending and soaring inflation.

Using tens of millions of dollars seized from workers' paychecks, Big Labor's federal union bosses are orchestrating virtually every howl of outrage, protest and lawsuit against Donald Trump's and Elon Musk's cutbacks and reforms. . .

. . .paying for the lawyers, the plaintiffs, the lawsuits and the activists you see on TV marching and screaming into bullhorns. That's why I hope you will _STAND UP TODAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S CRUSADE to slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon guarding "the Swamp" in Washington_.

Please agree to sign your PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT to President Trump, Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency and your U.S. Senators and Congressman. I'll give you a link to your petition in a moment, but I want to be sure you understand how serious this is.

_President Trump is fighting valiantly to tame the out-of-control federal bureaucracy. And he needs to know he has YOUR FULL SUPPORT to stand firm_ when the Swamp Rats in Washington lash out.

And perhaps even more importantly, please _sign your petitions DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman support President Trump's crusade_ with every vote they cast!

The fact is government union bosses are the real puppet-masters pulling the strings behind the curtain in the "DC Swamp."

That's why you and I must PROVE to President Trump (and my colleagues here in the Senate and House) that _the American people OVERWHELMINGLY support his reforms and will not tolerate any more obstructionism, excuses or gridlock_!

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (popularly known as DOGE) are exposing the scandals and corruption government union officials have been hiding for decades:
---
$$$ Did you know that _only 6% of federal bureaucrats show up_ in person for a full work week? (And that figure drops to 1% if you take out janitors, security guards, and maintenance personnel!)
$$$ Can you believe that _government union big shots are PAID with YOUR tax dollars to conduct so-called "official union business" -- COSTING TAXPAYERS NEARLY A QUARTER OF A BILLION TAX DOLLARS A YEAR_?
$$$ Were you aware that federal office buildings cost $15.7 BILLION annually just to keep the doors open? And that _only 12% of federal office space is even occupied_?
$$$ Are you outraged to learn federal law effectively bars open shop, non-union contractors from bidding on federal public works projects -- _soaking American taxpayers for an estimated $21.7 billion a year in inflated construction costs_?
$$$ Did you know that if a conscientious public servant does a good job and their supervisor awards them a merit-pay bonus (or tries to fire or discipline an incompetent bureaucrat) without "going through the union" that would be a VIOLATION OF FEDERAL LABOR RULES?!?
$$$ Are you angry that in 2021, JOE BIDEN BESTOWED $130 BILLION UPON TEACHER UNION RADICALS who are brainwashing our kids!
The fact is _government union czars are the single biggest obstacle President Trump must overcome_ to cut out-of-control government spending and flagrant waste, fraud and abuse.

**[That's why I hope you will CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT TODAY](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=1d7jsvwwx4tbe9pr3x3nsllpjvi7dh1psmpo9ufkjikji4nvod0ipr91iysraa4vtwqpsnrvb9wdm6246ddd4lh83raqutfmf27ge2x2hzhs7oljqarxdua5v07qtu9fk82rowi6vc2zkjzb0dukj9ka45zva5bneuxy8et8q9ltbahjsbghl38hbsw6fyp2rusz16d1w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlqbo&__onlt=h)**!

As soon as their handpicked political cronies lost the elections, GOVERNMENT UNION OFFICIALS IMMEDIATELY VOWED TO BLOCK TRUMP'S REFORMS.

You see, President Trump is not only standing up to the liberal media and the radical Democrats, he's taking on the _unelected czars who secretly rule our government from within_.

Union officials I bet you've never even heard of -- like Everett Kelly.

He's not a Member of Congress. Not a Governor nor a Senator. No voter has ever cast a ballot for him.

And yet he rules Washington DC with an iron fist from his throne atop the largest government union, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE).

_The AFGE chieftain rules an empire of nearly a million government workers paid an average of $118,260 per year, costing taxpayers an estimated $97.4 BILLION ANNUALLY_.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency are exposing outrage after outrage committed by federal union bosses like AFGE President Everett Kelly:
\--- AFGE Council 220 President Witold Skwierczynski _COLLECTED A PAYCHECK FROM THE SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION FOR 34 YEARS WITHOUT WORKING A SINGLE HOUR_!

He couldn't have gone to work if he'd tried because _he was banned from Social Security offices nationwide after sending A PHOTO OF HIS PENIS_ to a fellow employee at 2 o'clock in the morning! He only quit because Trump's executive order required him and other union officials to (in his words) go "back to our desks to process claims."

Now, he's collecting a full pension "close to equal to my salary."
\--- The Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service played "the heavy" to force workers and employers to knuckle under to union-boss demands. The agency reportedly was "_RIFE WITH CORRUPTION" whose staffers "LIVED LIKE KINGS_." Despite having only 60 employees (many of whose offices had ENSUITE BATHROOMS WITH PRIVATE SHOWERS!), the FMCS occupied a _nine-story office tower_ on DC's posh K Street.
According to the Daily Wire, for years the agency's Director _billed the taxpayer for his meals and living expenses, claiming to be on a "years-long business trip" to DC_.
\--- Corrupt union officials are notorious for treating worker pension funds like their own lavish piggybanks. MANY union pension plans are teetering on the verge of insolvency. So JOE BIDEN BILKED THE TAXPAYER FOR $32 BILLION TO BAIL-OUT A SINGLE TEAMSTER UNION PENSION FUND.

That's bad enough. But instead of placing the pension into receivership under government oversight, _he left the foxes in charge of the henhouse_!
**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=1d7jsvwwx4tbe9pr3x3nsllpjvi7dh1psmpo9ufkjikji4nvod0ipr91iysraa4vtwqpsnrvb9wdm6246ddd4lh83raqutfmf27ge2x2hzhs7oljqarxdua5v07qtu9fk82rowi6vc2zkjzb0dukj9ka45zva5bneuxy8et8q9ltbahjsbghl38hbsw6fyp2rusz16d1w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlqbo&__onlt=h)**.

How did Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats let it come to this? Well, they were well compensated. . .

Organized Labor poured an estimated $25 BILLION into the last elections to defeat Donald Trump and elect Kamala Harris -- and other radical Democrats like her!

You see, federal workers are REQUIRED BY LAW to submit to the so-called "representation" of well-heeled union bigwigs _whether they like it or not_. Federal law gives union officials power over workers WHO AREN'T EVEN UNION MEMBERS!

_Most government bureaucrats figured out long ago that THEY DON'T REALLY WORK FOR THE TAXPAYER, NOR EVEN THE PRESIDENT... THEY WORK FOR THE UNION BOSSES_. Plain and simple.

President Trump knows he can't "Drain the Swamp" until we support his efforts to "Slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon."

The Union-Boss Dragon should be stripped bare:
\--- NO Monopoly Bargaining power over any federal employee.
\--- NO money deducted from any federal worker's or contractor's paycheck.
\--- NO authority to negotiate salaries, wages, job rules, promotion, firing or hiring.
\--- NO privileged status in winning multiple-billion dollar federal contracts.
\--- NO payment for work except for the US taxpayer, not a union.
**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=1d7jsvwwx4tbe9pr3x3nsllpjvi7dh1psmpo9ufkjikji4nvod0ipr91iysraa4vtwqpsnrvb9wdm6246ddd4lh83raqutfmf27ge2x2hzhs7oljqarxdua5v07qtu9fk82rowi6vc2zkjzb0dukj9ka45zva5bneuxy8et8q9ltbahjsbghl38hbsw6fyp2rusz16d1w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlqbo&__onlt=h)**.

But government union chiefs are so powerful and so entrenched, _I will need more than your petitions to slay the union bigwigs' DC Dragon_.

That's why I've joined forces with the National Right to Work Committee. When it comes to fighting AND BEATING corrupt union officials, they are the experts.

And that's why I hope you'll not only sign your petition but also make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 today to help the National Right to Work Committee EXPAND their nationwide campaign to prove to my colleagues in Washington, DC that politicians should fear "We, The People" more than "inside the Beltway" union politicos.

I don't know what you can afford to give today. Maybe for you a contribution of $25 or $50 is a stretch. I know for others $500 or $1000 will not be too much.

After you sign your petition, I ask you to be as generous as you can.

_You see, this Petition Drive is just the first step of a nationwide grassroots lobbying program_ to focus public pressure like a laser-beam on key Senators and Congressmen to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT!

The National Right to Work Committee needs your financial support today to:
1\. GATHER THREE MILLION PETITIONS SUPPORTING DONALD TRUMP AND ELON MUSK'S DOGE and urging lawmakers to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT and end it NOW!
2\. Launch a publicity and media campaign with news conferences, editorial board meetings, and op-eds by respected commentators and opinion leaders.
3\. Mail, text, use social media and email millions of taxpayers to turn up the heat on wavering politicians to get off the fence and do their jobs to curb and corral the out-of-control government workforce.
4\. And funds permitting, air costly hard-hitting TV, radio and Internet ads (especially on Fox News and Fox Radio, and local conservative talk!) to generate MILLIONS of letters, phone calls and texts to Capitol Hill demanding Big Labor's monopoly bargaining powers over the federal workforce be repealed.

body:

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Next week, President Donald Trump is expected to release his long-awaited AI Action Plan, setting a new course for U.S. AI policy with a focus on innovation, streamlined permitting, and global leadership.**Join ARI on Thursday, July 24 at 1:00 PM ET for a virtual panel unpacking the implications of the Trump Administration’s AI Action Plan.**

---
| [RSVP](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=5daa724c52&e=a07d75591f)
---
| [****](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=28f5902d23&e=a07d75591f)
We’re bringing together leading voices from industry, economics, and civil society to break it all down.
**Panelists:**
* **Jack Clark** , Cofounder, Anthropic
* **Samuel Hammond** , Chief Economist, Foundation for American Innovation
* **Elham Tabassi** , Director, Brookings AI and Emerging Technology Initiative
* **Stewart Baker** , Former General Counsel, NSA & DHS Policy Chief
* Moderator: **Brad Carson** , President, ARI

**What does this plan mean for the future of AI in the U.S.? What’s missing—and what’s next?** Bring your questions and join the conversation.
This event is free and open to the public.
👉 [**Reserve your spot now**](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=838e6089cd&e=a07d75591f) »

Friend,

For the American left, if you burn down whole city blocks and riot, you'll probably get a financial settlement.

If you invade the country, NGOs will pay your legal bills as you enjoy free housing and debit cards filled with taxpayer cash.

If you wave the Mexican flag while assaulting law enforcement, the news will call it a _"potent sign of protest."_

If you burn the American flag, they'll call it free speech.

But if you dare tear down a Pride flag, you face years in prison.

This demonstrates the lunacy of the radical left.

It's also what's at stake if we rest on our laurels instead of taking action to win in 2026, 2028, and beyond...

**Turning Point PAC has a plan to hold the line!**

We have identified 3 battleground states where we can have the most impact: Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

By establishing field offices and ramping up field operations in those states, [you and I can build a RED WALL](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hhbJH7LdXScjXzzDm_5-YQ~~/AARclBA~/Ikt7g4kIPCFInX5DRjbVYrxFchmBR1EIAoWhZOFrfA-1yHijqoYB26IGZM8kSGDGhyomvba125u60eVLJpSIxLuedCnEwikZxbf5--jTt9ejkUBVJDpK5RvvNtzvHwr48mIb_xMOBP4VNmvwXZmhr7vNONFrKguDPxdJzWmZdWHUb14RZR9e850vhmzCZvdg) to protect our America First victories.

To do so, we'll need to raise $75,000 before the end of the month to fund this mission.

name: Baldwin HQ
subject: Your perspective is needed now more than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4876%2E35263%2EdKjagT)
Peter, Trump and his allies got their wish: their Big Ugly Bill was signed into law. As Republicans celebrate ripping healthcare away from millions of people to give huge tax cuts to billionaires, Tammy and her Democratic colleagues are fighting for you, our healthcare, and our rights. **[But to bring your concerns to the table, she needs to know what’s on your mind. Will you share your perspective by taking our priorities survey today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Priorities_Survey_2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250718_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4876%2E35263%2EdKjagT)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Priorities_Survey_2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250718_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4876%2E35263%2EdKjagT)
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Baldwin
Date: Thursday, July 10, 2025
Subject: Priorities Survey for Peter
Peter, Republicans in the Senate are **laser-focused** on delivering huge tax breaks for billionaires.
They’re slashing health care for seniors and sick kids, ripping food assistance away from hungry families, and brushing off the impacts of their Big BS Bill with _“get over it”_ and _“we’re all going to die.”_
While Republicans side with the ultra-wealthy, Tammy and her Democratic colleagues are committed to fighting for working people, defending our healthcare, and cutting costs.
But to do this work, Tammy needs to know what’s on your mind. The last thing she wants is your concerns or experiences to get lost in the endless shuffle of headlines.
**[Peter, will you take our priorities survey today? We really value your response and it should only take a minute or two →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Priorities_Survey_2025?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250718_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4876%2E35263%2EdKjagT)**

Team Baldwin

body:
What your support means
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=521%2E181023%2E1YdNQa)
Team,
$26.50.
That’s the average contribution we receive from emails like this one. Some people give more, some give less — but it’s not about the amount. It’s about what the act of giving represents.
It means you care about your community, your family, and your country. It means you’re actively supporting someone that’s fighting for you.
When you chip in, whether it’s $3 or $30, you’re helping to build a campaign that’s powered by real people. People like you, who want a Governor that will work hard to strengthen public education, protect your freedoms, and make sure Michigan is the best place in the country to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.
We’ve got a big test coming up: our critical public fundraising deadline is just a few days away. Once that deadline hits, everyone will be watching to see just how much grassroots momentum this campaign has.
[**So today, I’m asking: will you chip in $26.50 — or whatever amount feels right for you — to help us show the strength of our movement?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2059?c0=jmb-em-q32025.V3Usni&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250718_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=521%2E181023%2E1YdNQa)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111707535/558130509/-2079073387?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Next_250718_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGJhMzY1OC1mMDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaVVbnlWZZvGjrIs3x-CySjgUGV-JLbFqY1068D78WI=) Derek, for my entire career, I’ve been focused on where we’re headed, on what’s next.

Many of you know I was an early investor in the cell phone industry... I always remember friends of mine telling me, “Warner, you're crazy,” but I was thinking about what was on the horizon.

When I was first elected governor it was on the promise to move Virginia forward. And we did.

And in the Senate, I’ve been focused on the challenges our country faces next: rebuilding our nation’s infrastructure for a 21st century economy, strengthening cybersecurity, modernizing national security operations, and investing in our communities.

**So on this campaign, I’ve got to think about what’s next, too.**

November 2026 may seem far away, but the reality is the decisions my campaign makes this summer will have an enormous impact on the outcome of the midterms in Virginia. We’ve got to decide how many staff to bring on, the scale of the advertising campaigns we’ll run and when to start, and so much more.

So I’ve got to ask you, Derek – one of my most engaged and informed supporters – to help us get it done.

[_**Will you consider a contribution of $5, $25, or $50 today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building? name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: This is a political vendetta
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250718-1434-foote&t=1001&akid=1434%2E342411%2EFKLOsP ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

A new proposal from Donald Trump’s Education Department threatens to
weaponize the Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) program —
historically a lifeline for public servants.

If enacted, PSLF would stop clearing loans for workers at nonprofits or
public entities that the administration deems engaged in so-called
"illegal activities" — a vague category that could include immigration
support, transgender youth care, diversity, equity, and inclusion
programs, and more.^1

Over 1 million borrowers — nurses, teachers, nonprofit employees, and
others — could lose access to debt relief simply because of their
employer’s mission.

This is more than policy. It’s a political vendetta. Trump is using his
power to target the very people who make our communities work.

The Squad Victory Fund was built to defend our democracy. Now is the time
to show the power of our movement and fight back. But we can’t do this
alone. This moment demands bold resistance — and the resources to power
it. That’s why we’re asking:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250718-movement.XbHFpO&refcode=em20250718-1434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1434%2E342411%2EFKLOsP ]Will you pitch in $3 — or whatever you can afford — to
help us stop Trump’s dangerous agenda and protect public service workers?
We cannot sit idly by while he tears down the progress we’ve fought so
hard to build.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250718-movement.XbHFpO&refcode=em20250718-1434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1434%2E342411%2EFKLOsP ]Contribute ››

In Solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

1 — [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19785?t=1022&akid=1434%2E342411%2EFKLOsP ]AP News

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1434%2E342411%2EFKLOsP

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, A new proposal from Donald Trump’s Education Department threatens to weaponize the Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) program — historically a lifeline for public servants. If enacted, PSLF would stop clearing loans for workers at nonprofits or public entities that the administration deems engaged in so-called "illegal activities" — a vague category that could include immigration support, transgender youth care, diversity, equity, and inclusion programs, and more.^1 Over 1 million borrowers — nurses, teachers, nonprofit employees, and others — could lose access to debt relief simply because of their employer’s mission. This is more than policy. It’s a political vendetta. Trump is using his power to target the very people who make our communities work. The Squad Victory Fund was built to defend our democracy. Now is the time to show the power of our movement and fight back. But we can’t do this alone. This moment demands bold resistance — and the resources to power it. That’s why we’re asking: [ ]Will you pitch in $3 — or whatever you can afford — to help us stop Trump’s dangerous agenda and protect public service workers? We cannot sit idly by while he tears down the progress we’ve fought so hard to build. [ ]Contribute ›› In Solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund 1 — [ ]AP News

It’s Charlie, Chair of the Democratic Party of Georgia — and I’ve got to say, I completely agree with Ken Martin.
Georgia **_is absolutely_** one of the most **_important battleground states_** in the country — not just in 2026, but for the long haul.
Our Senate seat is essential to making gains in 2026. If we lose it, Democrats lose any realistic shot at taking back the Senate.
Republicans hold a very narrow majority, and if Georgia flips red, it’s game over for making gains — and Donald Trump’s grip on power will get even STRONGER.
We know Democrats across the country are stepping up to run for Senate, but none of that will matter if we can’t defend our Senate seat here at home. **That’s why we’re going _all in._**
We’re planning to defend this seat aggressively, flip state legislative races, and help Democrats regain the House. **But we can’t do it without you.**
The work we do between now and November 2026 — knocking doors, registering voters, organizing communities — will determine whether we protect this seat and help build momentum nationwide.
[So, Peter, will you chip in $15 today to help us defend our Senate seat, stop the MAGA takeover, and help fuel Democratic wins in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111708537/558133656/1328710725?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_071825_BATTLEGROUND_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODU0MTMyZS1mMTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TyPGQ1nF8Xk_bteeaiVWYz2zGZsIXCqo3mUn98z09VU=)

## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/e66889a8-1bce-4ac8-bdfe-830dd054fa18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!

## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Coming up next week, we're starting off the show with former Secretary of the Navy Kenneth Braithwaite. Tuesday I'm joined by Dr. Sebastian Gorka, James O'Keefe, and Marine veteran Chad Robichaux. Tune in for my conversation with Sen. Ron Johnson on Wednesday, then Thursday we've got a great panel, featuring Patrice Onwuka, Chris Stigall, and Breanna Morello. Finally, Friday I'm talking with Dr. Alberto A. Martinez and Mick Mulvaney. Turn on notifications so you don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!

## The latest on Senate campaign spending...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8e3f622c-1e93-4fe1-80dd-bd459eb0247c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

## Why the Epstein files matter...
People have been tired of the government not telling it to them straight for years.
It's hard enough to keep track of what's going on in D.C. without elites purposefully hiding things from us.
Which brings me to what everyone's been talking about: the Epstein files.
Trump has been transparent on so much.
He's pretty much made being open--sometimes to a fault-- his whole brand.
But for some reason, the rollout of the Epstein files has been a lot slower, and a lot less transparent than expected.
Understandably, people are getting frustrated.
In the eyes of the public, it's become a test of whether Trump will keep pushing for the truth or let the establishment win.
Let's be real: the Epstein story stinks.
A rich guy with connections to big names--politicians, billionaires, you know the type--gets away with horrific crimes for years, then dies in a jail cell under suspicious circumstances, ruled a suicide.
That's why this story isn't just about honesty.
It's about the perception that elites are being protected, that there's a different standard for those in power.
Let's break it down...

A rich guy with connections to big names--politicians, billionaires, you know the type--gets away with horrific crimes for years, then dies in a jail cell under suspicious circumstances, ruled a suicide. That's why this story isn't just about honesty. It's about the perception that elites are being protected, that there's a different standard for those in power. Let's break it down... name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I have never seen such an obvious cover up in my entire life
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I was on MSNBC last night talking about the massive Epstein cover up Republicans and the Department of Justice are doing in front of our very eyes.
#

Peter, I was on MSNBC last night talking about the ridiculously brazen Epstein cover up Republicans and the Department of Justice are doing in front of our very eyes.
They are protecting Trump and all his elite pedophile buddies.
They’ve stonewalled the Epstein files.
They voted down my resolution on the Senate floor demanding the release of those files.
On Wednesday the Trump administration fired the prosecutor that was involved in the Jeffrey Epstein prosecution.
They call all of this a distraction — but yesterday they found plenty of time to defund foreign aid for starving children and abused women. Plenty of time taking billions of dollars back from PBS and NPR. There was enough time to take health care from 17 million people, and food assistance from more, to get rid of 30,000 VA staff, AND give trillions in tax cuts to millionaires and billionaires.
What they don’t have time for is giving the American people the truth. They don’t have time to stick up for the women trafficked and abused by Epstein and Trump. There is never enough time for them to stick up for the poor, and middle class families, and hungry kids, and veterans, and the elderly.
They promised to come in and drain the swamp, they campaigned on that, Trump promised he would be their retribution. That’s why people voted for him, because they hate the way the government always seems to use its power to take care of the elites. Now, Republicans hold the House, Senate, Supreme Court, and the White House. What are they doing with that power? Taking care of the elites.
This is a cover up. It’s a betrayal. And it’s an insult to every American, whether you voted for Trump or not.
The President of the United States is trying to cover up a major sex crime that occurred over twenty years because he was Epstein's biggest customer. The entire Republican party is backing him up on it. He has corrupted the Justice Department so thoroughly that they’re in on it too.
But this is not going away. I will not let it go away. Mark my words: The chickens are coming home to roost.
Please, stay engaged on this.
Thanks,
Ruben

**🚨 Please — just one more minute 🚨**
This is not a fundraising email, and we don’t expect you to donate. But if you appreciate what Ruben’s doing, we are not going to stop you from making a donation.
This work doesn’t come cheap, and we truly appreciate anything you send Ruben’s way.

name: Mike Nellis - Endless Urgency
subject: The Slow Collapse of the MAGA Movement
body:
From QAnon to the tech right, cracks are forming in Trump's coalition.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..BfjarNaruAPWZs5nIA6rqaXVgR_t_MogMdp8J1snDYU?) for more
---
[](https://substack..Ow5eFBu5QQ43FIdvDYCnJJPJPc_WdLAj1V1jupT-Qf4?)
---
# [The Slow Collapse of the MAGA Movement](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168652331&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUyMzMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NTYxNzMsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ0ODE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9zCQpt5kkiUsc6ivSHadKKGrMAHzV3BMx5o9Enn1Ljc)
### From QAnon to the tech right, cracks are forming in Trump's coalition.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Jul 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168652331&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUyMzMxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Mjg1NjE3MywiZXhwIjoxNzU1NDQ4MTczLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.yghA3fvFQlK41UuETGjQfj9Ib7BVE_ljYj_sYbGA1H0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168652331&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUyMzMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NTYxNzMsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ0ODE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9zCQpt5kkiUsc6ivSHadKKGrMAHzV3BMx5o9Enn1Ljc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=168652331&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUyMzMxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NTYxNzMsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ0ODE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9zCQpt5kkiUsc6ivSHadKKGrMAHzV3BMx5o9Enn1Ljc)
---
| | [](https://substack..8Nf9drqGw2kLWPpwxBVaU0VT-zAYGMD9yyrtT8jtpV8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/the-slow-collapse-of-the-maga-movement?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I believe we're witnessing the slow-moving death of the MAGA movement in real time over the Epstein cover-up. That doesn't mean Donald Trump's polling numbers are going to collapse overnight. And it certainly doesn't guarantee Democrats a win--this November, next year in the midterms, or in the presidential election.
But it _is_ a terrifying glimpse into the future for the Republican Party.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._zovsXj4Veu45t_C_P91dvsRdMoeeScmACdJhsumzGM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168652331)
What we're seeing are real fractures in the coalition Trump built--a coalition ranging from QAnon conspiracy theorists to Bible-thumping Republicans, to the tech right and Elon Musk, and many others who joined up with Trump hoping to get what they wanted out of the government.
This fiasco with Trump and Pam Bondi's cover-up of the Epstein files and flight logs shows just how weak the MAGA movement really is. Even with Trump in the White House and Republicans controlling both the House and Senate, MAGA influencers now feel more emboldened than ever to speak out against their own leaders.
Just this week, Nick Fuentes--a radical, lunatic right-wing QAnon guy--told Trump to go fuck himself. We've seen plenty of other voices do the same. But this goes beyond the Epstein crisis. Steve Bannon, Laura Loomer, and others have spoken out about the Medicaid cuts in Trump's bill. Tucker Carlson and others have criticized Trump's warmongering on Iran. These are things that aren't supposed to happen in a coalition Trump thinks he's got wrapped around his finger.
And every time Trump opens his mouth, he makes it worse. Over the past week and a half, even _Libs of TikTok_ --one of the most loyal pro-Trump accounts--has been begging him to shut the hell up online because he's only making the Epstein situation worse, lashing out at supporters, calling them weak losers, and saying he doesn't want their support.
As I've written twice this week: if the QAnon wing of MAGA stays home--if this movement fractures now or in the coming years without Trump at the helm--the Republican Party is in serious trouble. If Trump can no longer lead because his base doesn't trust him--and keep in mind, 71% of Americans say nothing he's done in the last eight months has improved their lives--his political support in Washington will crater. Most Americans are more pessimistic than optimistic about the country's future--more than halfway through Trump's first year.
If Trump no longer commands an army willing to show up and primary Republicans who defy him, his power vanishes. The reason he passed that horrendous budget, the reason people like Pete Hegseth--wildly unqualified--got top jobs, is because Republicans in Congress are terrified of losing their primaries. They'd rather limp to a general election with a shot at beating a Democrat than defy Trump.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._zovsXj4Veu45t_C_P91dvsRdMoeeScmACdJhsumzGM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168652331)
Now, I don't think the MAGA movement collapses today. Probably not even within the next year. But what we're seeing--fractures over Epstein, the budget, Iran, and more--is the prelude to what happens when the GOP tries to nominate someone in 2028.
Political strategists always overestimate how long movements outlive their figureheads. Remember how Democratic strategists said Republicans would never win again because of the Obama coalition? That coalition didn't stick around. They didn't show up for Hillary. They barely showed up for Biden. And they sure as hell didn't turn out for Kamala.
The same thing is happening here. American politics is heading for a reset. Some wings of MAGA will retreat, disengage, or reject whoever takes over the GOP next. And more than anything, I think this Epstein fiasco will be the tipping point for the QAnon crowd.
A new coalition will rise. Whether it's Democratic or Republican, I don't know. I won't pretend Democrats are destined to win in four years--not with the chaos and pain we're living through. But I do believe MAGA will go down as a failed movement. And Trump will be remembered as the scam artist he is--by both the people who voted for him and those of us who stood against him when it mattered most.
That's what we're witnessing now, however slowly. And the civil war that's coming--losers like J.D. Vance trying to claim Trump's mantle when it's time--will make it even harder to hold this fractured base together.
The biggest question I have looking ahead to 2028 is whether establishment Republicans can regain even partial control of the party. That alone could shift the tone and tenor of our politics--even if it's still terrible and regressive. And then we'll see what kind of leader Democrats put forward, and whether they can build a new coalition to reshape American politics and move our country forward after what I believe will be the colossal failure of Trump's second term.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._zovsXj4Veu45t_C_P91dvsRdMoeeScmACdJhsumzGM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168652331)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._
_You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._zovsXj4Veu45t_C_P91dvsRdMoeeScmACdJhsumzGM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168652331)

And Trump will be remembered as the scam artist he is--by both the people who voted for him and those of us who stood against him when it mattered most. That's what we're witnessing now, however slowly. And the civil war that's coming--losers like J.D. Vance trying to claim Trump's mantle when it's time--will make it even harder to hold this fractured base together. The biggest question I have looking ahead to 2028 is whether establishment Republicans can regain even partial control of the party. That alone could shift the tone and tenor of our politics--even if it's still terrible and regressive. And then we'll see what kind of leader Democrats put forward, and whether they can build a new coalition to reshape American politics and move our country forward after what I believe will be the colossal failure of Trump's second term. I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

If you burn the American flag, they'll call it free speech.

But if you dare tear down a Pride flag, you face years in prison.

This demonstrates the lunacy of the radical left.

It’s also what’s at stake if we rest on our laurels instead of taking action to win in 2026, 2028, and beyond...

**Turning Point PAC has a plan to hold the line!**

We have identified 3 battleground states where we can have the most impact: Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

I know this is no small ask, but this is no small operation.

**Winning in Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire is critical to the enduring success of President Trump’s America First agenda.**

These states have a number of important factors that make them the perfect targets for our grassroots ground game.
1. They are considered contested states that are important to both parties.
2. These states are growing.
3. **Republicans outnumber Democrats.**

Plus, if we win these states, we don’t have to worry about winning in other states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, or Wisconsin.

That’s the truth.

_**Only three states stand between us and a series of America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**_

Please help us [finish what we started](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e25597717/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zdW1tZXIyNS1zYi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsNnZ3U1k4UQ/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10cDI1MDcwNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwMDRfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazM/gaHp1OA/sah8e0406ab) and secure an America First future by donating today.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

P.S. Now that you’ve heard our plan, I want you to understand what is at stake if we fail: our Republic.

Everything President Trump has achieved... _undone_.
Our America First movement... _finished_.
Our freedom... _surrendered_.
The future of America... _**in peril!**_

We CANNOT let that happen.

[This is why it is CRITICAL that we raise $75,000 before the end of the month to build the RED WALL. Please rush your support today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e25597717/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zdW1tZXIyNS1zYi8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsNnZ3U1k4UQ/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10cDI1MDcwNSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwMDRfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazQ/gaHp1OA/scped1294fc)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: NEWS: Virginia GOP Governor Candidate Funded by Known Nazi Sympathizer
body:
---
**NEWS: Virginia GOP Governor Candidate Funded by Known Nazi Sympathizer** Derek, news on the key Virginia governor’s race (our only chance to flip a governor's seat this year) — the GOP’s candidate took money from a known Nazi sympathizer who participated in SS reenactments for 35 years. You can tell a lot about a person by the company they keep: Winsome Earle-Sears, the Republican candidate, is backed by a Nazi reenactor. Abigail Spanberger, who we’re proud to call our Democratic nominee in this race, is fueled by grassroots supporters like _you._ **Derek, no matter where you live, this election matters.** It'll be a signal of public sentiment since Trump took office in January. And in fact, this election is so important that we just announced an initial seven-figure investment in Virginia that will allow us to organize statewide and give our candidates the resources they need to defeat Republicans like Earle-Sears. **This investment wouldn’t have been possible without grassroots donations from Democrats like you. But this investment is just a starting point.** [**We hope you will join us in fueling this fight and others by splitting a donation between the Democratic Party of Virginia and the DNC at this link. name: Valerie Foushee
subject: What’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Which issues matter the most to you?

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=Xsumh%2BnM%2BvJTPpg1lfxc8lGYoXLpnidc9zl7eD%2F0U6yohDto9S8gD1vunjvZv8qyLWiBRiewna2FKSlns7BdEyZCZAhOHLn%2FV6UUcT4ee5Iasmq%2FvZKO7UbGp8vmi0V%2F%2FxKxcwnYTyGeZNOJ2Djb2MZeiPzZUZ%2FXhh6nI572xKHtbctMimgn5fmpwqmxDBF%2ByYHku%2BrnWeZtOYp71fVi8mwrv21K8YKuHxGAjoq284nnwSxMG0G9d6%2FQMF21ROc3zjpgmhsepPGYg5T%2FD1Y0eqonjxIpjjo40C6wIhphQ%2BTsN5An0DIHNHupIEr5puNBg2wXm%2BpL%2F1S5S32R4vgEVARIPUFsmGnM7xAZ2XDWYn%2FGKEBnAw3UilmaJOzuhdhltd7Lxxil2fsrwV%2BWWxED7znPBhMDAegovEfQ8qON7Vs%3D)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111710337/558139158/-1546188038?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_071825_Priorities_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDNlMWE4NS1mNDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDqgjaMQBo9fTZ0mWU-BIEiTzouEwrhN5yl_kaOutb8=)
---
Hi Peter, do you have a minute to chat?

My favorite part of being a public servant has always been getting to have conversations with folks like you. From my first elected role on Chapel Hill-Carrboro City Schools Board, to the North Carolina General Assembly, to now as your Congresswoman — I’ve remained committed to serving my neighbors, and that means listening to what my neighbors have to say.

I wish I could sit down with each of you and hear your concerns directly, but until I can be in 746,711 places at once, we’ll have to settle for the next best thing. My team put together a survey so you can share directly with me what’s on your mind. It will only take a minute (or less!)

[Now that we’re halfway through the year, it’s important that I know which issues are on your mind as we inch closer to 2026. Will you please take a minute to complete this survey? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111710342/558139163/-395073308?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_071825_Priorities_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDNlMWE4NS1mNDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDqgjaMQBo9fTZ0mWU-BIEiTzouEwrhN5yl_kaOutb8=&emci=3e3e1a85-f463-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=543e1a85-f463-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111710348/558139171/-395073308?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_071825_Priorities_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDNlMWE4NS1mNDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDqgjaMQBo9fTZ0mWU-BIEiTzouEwrhN5yl_kaOutb8=&emci=3e3e1a85-f463-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=543e1a85-f463-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895)
---
My focus has always been on making a real difference in the lives of folks in my community, so thank you in advance for taking the time to share your thoughts.

clean_body: Which issues matter the most to you? If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, do you have a minute to chat? My favorite part of being a public servant has always been getting to have conversations with folks like you. From my first elected role on Chapel Hill-Carrboro City Schools Board, to the North Carolina General Assembly, to now as your Congresswoman — I’ve remained committed to serving my neighbors, and that means listening to what my neighbors have to say. I wish I could sit down with each of you and hear your concerns directly, but until I can be in 746,711 places at once, we’ll have to settle for the next best thing. My team put together a survey so you can share directly with me what’s on your mind. It will only take a minute (or less!) | My focus has always been on making a real difference in the lives of folks in my community, so thank you in advance for taking the time to share your thoughts. — Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Heritage Action National ICE Survey
subject: Do you still stand with ICE?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205g9y4ncchueqwpcklgpeqkfczcxvj261x9uh67bqcbyehpurzuxa5t7q64rjmahsayr9yhbb9yqzk8apl&__stmp=szlsmc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlsmc&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol02serhwioqn6bux1pw8b1pguaaqygop5stcf9wklgyvd8kiqtn4wku91ue011h5if20ytvwfng08s1j0oz7keck8lfp7v4wj81gsdklie29o9qdfi4ob16qpp0fmesch4m5hot5dti&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlsmc&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlsmc&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlsmc&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlsmc&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol02serhwioqn6bux1pw8b1pguaaqygop5stcf9wklgyvd8kiqtn4wku91ue011h5if20ytvwfng08s1j0oz7keck8lfp7v4wj81gsdklie29o9qdfi4ob16qpp0fmesch4m5hot5dti&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlsmc&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szlsmc&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Donald Trump's billionaire budget bill is just the latest example of the GOP's limitless cruelty.

In voting for this bill, congressional Republicans voted to gut Medicaid, cut access to reproductive health care, and dismantle vital safety net programs — all while giving the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations a major windfall.

**We aren't letting them get away with it, and that's why we're laser-focused on taking back power _as soon as possible_ , starting with voting out these GOP extremists and flipping the House in 2026.**

As we prepare to fight back, we want your input on how we do so. [**So please, Peter,will you share your thoughts here:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111711179/558141872/-1056192281?refcode=WUENE738_20250718_LegSurvey_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056618&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGZmN2MyMi1mNTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3zVKj8lA1pd1zf4vwhz6tyxdEUoynOShapk7Qa4e4BM=&emci=37ff7c22-f563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44ff7c22-f563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5177934) | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111711180/558141873/-1056192281?refcode=WUENE738_20250718_LegSurvey_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056618&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGZmN2MyMi1mNTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3zVKj8lA1pd1zf4vwhz6tyxdEUoynOShapk7Qa4e4BM=&emci=37ff7c22-f563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44ff7c22-f563-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5177934)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Now that our salsa is sold out, I’m sharing the next best thing: the recipe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Chip in any amount today, and I’ll send you my official green chile salsa recipe.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3289%2E400544%2ELxbKSx)
Hi, it's Deb Haaland.
Long before I served in Congress or led the Interior Department, I was a single mom running a salsa business out of a commercial kitchen.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250718_salsa?refcode=em20250718-3289&refcode2=3289_400544_LxbKSx&akid=3289%2E400544%2ELxbKSx)
_Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa at the NM State Fair NMDA Country Store. Pueblo children start early... 🌶️_
Somáh and I would drive for hours across New Mexico delivering jars to mom-and-pop shops. It was a small business with a big heart. 💛
**So when our Be Fierce salsa hit the campaign store — and sold out in under 3 hours — it meant the world to me.**
Now that the jars are gone, I want to share the next best thing: the recipe.
**[Chip in any amount today and I’ll send you my official green chile salsa recipe — the same one I made for years with love and New Mexico heat. Be sure to check your emailed ActBlue receipt for the recipe!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250718_salsa?refcode=em20250718-3289&refcode2=3289_400544_LxbKSx&akid=3289%2E400544%2ELxbKSx)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250718_salsa?refcode=em20250718-3289&refcode2=3289_400544_LxbKSx&akid=3289%2E400544%2ELxbKSx)**
Be fierce,
Deb 🌶️
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=3289%2E400544%2ELxbKSx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=3&akid=3289%2E400544%2ELxbKSx)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

subject: 🚨ALERT: Vargas, Tribal Leaders Rally with FBI Director to Tackle Human Trafficking
body:
view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/b784bf3f3859/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10353949?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=e380dd4046) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=e380dd4046)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
This IR e-Blast Powered By:
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
Vargas, Tribal Leaders Rally with FBI Director to Tackle Human Trafficking and Violence on Native Lands (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/07/vargas-tribal-leaders-rally-with-fbi-director-to-tackle-human-trafficking-and-violence-on-native-lands.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/07/vargas-tribal-leaders-rally-with-fbi-director-to-tackle-human-trafficking-and-violence-on-native-lands.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Kash Patel speaks after being sworn in as FBI director in the Indian Treaty Room in the Eisenhower Executive on the White House campus in Washington, D.C., U.S., February 21, 2025. (REUTERS/Leah Millis/File Photo)
By Illinois Review

On Wednesday, Mark Vargas joined tribal leaders in Washington for a high-level meeting with FBI Director Kash Patel, focusing on the agency’s recent commitment to increase federal resources to combat human trafficking, unsolved violent crimes and cartel activity on Native American reservations.

In April, the U.S. Department of Justice, under the direction of President Donald Trump, announced the relaunch of Operation Not Forgotten – a significant deployment of over 60 FBI agents and resources to Indian Country aimed at investigating unresolved violent crimes.

This initiative represents the largest federal surge of resources to Native American reservations in history.

FBI Director Kash Patel emphasized the agency’s commitment,
stating (https://southdakotasearchlight.com/briefs/justice-department-announces-focus-on-crimes-and-missing-people-in-native-american-areas/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) , “The FBI will manhunt violent criminals on all lands” and “find those who have gone missing.”
https://x.com/illinoisreview/status/1946211544737440141?s=12&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Vargas, a respected strategist, Newsmax columnist, and editor-in-chief of Illinois Review, was joined by Navajo Nation Speaker and Coalition of Large Tribes (COLT) Vice-Chairwoman Crystalyne Curley; COLT Treasurer and Rosebud Sioux Tribe Vice President Lisa White Pipe; and COLT Chairman and Chairman of the Sisseton-Wahpeton Oyate, J. Garret Renville.
https://x.com/markavargas/status/1945558351611396482?s=12&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e380dd4046-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Public safety on Indian reservations is severely underfunded, exposing these communities to exploitation, drug cartel activity, violence, and human trafficking. For example, the Crow Tribe in southern Montana manages 2.3 million acres but has only two police officers to protect its people – leaving women and children especially vulnerable to kidnapping and exploitation.

According to the Justice Department, at the start of Fiscal Year 2025, the FBI’s Indian Country program was managing approximately 4,300 open investigations. These included over 900 death cases, 1,000 child abuse cases, and more than 500 investigations related to domestic violence and adult sexual abuse.

Operation Not Forgotten builds on efforts initiated during President Trump’s first term through Executive Order 13898, which established the Task Force on Missing and Murdered American Indians and Alaska Natives.

This marks the third deployment under Operation Not Forgotten, which has supported investigations in over 500 cases over the past two years. Together, these operations have led to the recovery of 10 child victims, 52 arrests and 25 indictments or judicial complaints.

Director Patel also expressed his commitment during the meeting to visiting tribal communities in person to witness the daily challenges faced by law enforcement – including vast, remote territories, understaffed police forces and severely underfunded facilities and equipment.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Vargas, Tribal Leaders Rally with FBI Director to Tackle Human Trafficking and Violence on Native Lands () Kash Patel speaks after being sworn in as FBI director in the Indian Treaty Room in the Eisenhower Executive on the White House campus in Washington, D.C., U.S., February 21, 2025. (REUTERS/Leah Millis/File Photo) By Illinois Review On Wednesday, Mark Vargas joined tribal leaders in Washington for a high-level meeting with FBI Director Kash Patel, focusing on the agency’s recent commitment to increase federal resources to combat human trafficking, unsolved violent crimes and cartel activity on Native American reservations. In April, the U.S. Department of Justice, under the direction of President Donald Trump, announced the relaunch of Operation Not Forgotten – a significant deployment of over 60 FBI agents and resources to Indian Country aimed at investigating unresolved violent crimes. This initiative represents the largest federal surge of resources to Native American reservations in history. FBI Director Kash Patel emphasized the agency’s commitment, stating () , “The FBI will manhunt violent criminals on all lands” and “find those who have gone missing.” Vargas, a respected strategist, Newsmax columnist, and editor-in-chief of Illinois Review, was joined by Navajo Nation Speaker and Coalition of Large Tribes (COLT) Vice-Chairwoman Crystalyne Curley; COLT Treasurer and Rosebud Sioux Tribe Vice President Lisa White Pipe; and COLT Chairman and Chairman of the Sisseton-Wahpeton Oyate, J. Garret Renville. Public safety on Indian reservations is severely underfunded, exposing these communities to exploitation, drug cartel activity, violence, and human trafficking. For example, the Crow Tribe in southern Montana manages 2.3 million acres but has only two police officers to protect its people – leaving women and children especially vulnerable to kidnapping and exploitation. According to the Justice Department, at the start of Fiscal Year 2025, the FBI’s Indian Country program was managing approximately 4,300 open investigations. These included over 900 death cases, 1,000 child abuse cases, and more than 500 investigations related to domestic violence and adult sexual abuse. Operation Not Forgotten builds on efforts initiated during President Trump’s first term through Executive Order 13898, which established the Task Force on Missing and Murdered American Indians and Alaska Natives. This marks the third deployment under Operation Not Forgotten, which has supported investigations in over 500 cases over the past two years. Together, these operations have led to the recovery of 10 child victims, 52 arrests and 25 indictments or judicial complaints. Director Patel also expressed his commitment during the meeting to visiting tribal communities in person to witness the daily challenges faced by law enforcement – including vast, remote territories, understaffed police forces and severely underfunded facilities and equipment. (Left to Right) Speaker Crystalyne Curley, FBI Director Kash Patel, COLT Treasurer Lisa White Pipe, and COLT Chairman J. Garret Renville in Washington D.C. on July 16, 2025. We’re headed to Canada in _less than a week_!!! God is on the move across the globe, and He has placed Canada on our hearts. He has called us to go—so we're going! The Holy Spirit is at work in Canada, and the evidence is clear! In just a few short years, we’ve seen Believers in Canada transform—from passively tolerating onerous COVID restrictions that kept them from worshipping to boldly gathering together to praise and pray, regardless of the cost! It’s a powerful testimony to what the Lord can do through people who resist the pressures of the world and choose to obey Him above all else. **Check out our most recent Canadian Tour HYPE video ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**

subject: Your silence is helping Trump!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Thousands have signed. But your name is still missing and time is running out.

|
---
Peter,

We’re disappointed to see your name still isn’t on the letter to Governor Gavin Newsom.

While Trump threatens to JAIL Democratic leaders for defending our democracy, _you’ve stayed silent._

Governor Newsom showed courage. The very least we can do is show we have his back.

**But right now, your name is still missing.**

Don’t let Trump’s authoritarian tactics slide, take a stand for our democracy:

name: Team Schiff
subject: Trump’s obsession with Adam Schiff just escalated
body:
Peter —
Donald Trump is continuing to spiral. He just called for Adam to be prosecuted on Truth Social.
We cannot let this attack go unanswered. Will you rush a split donation between Real Texas PAC and Adam so we can fight back against these baseless accusations? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2]
It’s right out of the authoritarian playbook. It’s an attempt to silence the people who hold him accountable. It’s not just a rant. It’s a calculated smear campaign, designed to distract from Trump’s own failures.
Let’s be clear: Adam led Trump’s first impeachment. He’s called out Trump’s lies time and again. He’s never back down. And Trump can’t stand it.
So instead of offering solutions while Americans face sky-high costs and healthcare chaos, Trump is lashing out on Truth Social with desperate attacks and conspiracy-laced nonsense.
It’s not just unhinged. It’s dangerous.
But Adam isn’t backing down. He’s never backed down. Not when he led Trump’s first impeachment, and not now as a U.S. Senator holding Trump and his Administration accountable every day.
But Trump’s base is watching. They’re fired up. And they want revenge.
We need your help to respond — fast. Will you help us stand up to Trump’s continued attacks by chipping in a split donation between Adam and Real Texas PAC ? While Adam is working to deliver for working families, we need to respond to these insults and lies about his record. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Schiff and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=071825_2&amount=25]
Thanks for your support.
Team Schiff
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-schiff?refcode=071825_2]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
