clean_body: Peter — Donald Trump is continuing to spiral. He just called for Adam to be prosecuted on Truth Social. We cannot let this attack go unanswered. Will you rush a split donation between Real Texas PAC and Adam so we can fight back against these baseless accusations? [] [] It’s right out of the authoritarian playbook. It’s an attempt to silence the people who hold him accountable. It’s not just a rant. It’s a calculated smear campaign, designed to distract from Trump’s own failures. Let’s be clear: Adam led Trump’s first impeachment. He’s called out Trump’s lies time and again. He’s never back down. And Trump can’t stand it. So instead of offering solutions while Americans face sky-high costs and healthcare chaos, Trump is lashing out on Truth Social with desperate attacks and conspiracy-laced nonsense. It’s not just unhinged. It’s dangerous. But Adam isn’t backing down. He’s never backed down. Not when he led Trump’s first impeachment, and not now as a U.S. Senator holding Trump and his Administration accountable every day. But Trump’s base is watching. They’re fired up. And they want revenge. We need your help to respond — fast. Will you help us stand up to Trump’s continued attacks by chipping in a split donation between Adam and Real Texas PAC ? While Adam is working to deliver for working families, we need to respond to these insults and lies about his record. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Schiff and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Thanks for your support. Team Schiff [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: A regular guy seeking a big job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation |

---

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77e479299f514e7799e4c1901e196d44&_e=43cCy87lvuy_VDPM2XBCosMEGuQcHHOFfrAsZnBn7bEv50tJ3vvEuVWb_6KOcHhiNPzAUXG-RCx1uVs1ySJXXZrXZD9_biWa_74X-wzCIKtS4u09fhNXCGymCm9unRLRwvcC076fSkscqwozQoNglh0ueTWv95NgBRVuSewQbmNl5wzPSZ8Ht_FAAPVlimm2QZvIf92awRDJFPEcDCIVJi7rtP014vh-kvw6cpxp3HTQr9hdsgLWUg6fKZX9ysXS20Q4BO6PfiuPec_ooaB8OI85GVdmpaJDkmeXuIo4N2I8b2S6e3qSbmlyrBqgEOwtx895bSIWpSoeQlDiYhhyOKiqpvM_Wbl9MyYy4J1OqSeH1FUZ6pk79-Wp-vIrxgF6WhnnWMyCX19PCr5aGLHZrxFiWZQrxxwLrZ1n3TZX7rLtkMXJFu5iLM6KV5uOAXeoHvCFprtx1BsskqUz8pmN4OI-DRP_7r7E67mk9ZmRC9-FSUFlFEKKDHN-EWDwLgj2lBJ_J9-qvILLiab3f6_9cqzM2r2ue_qHL51oSMi7J3eTpPtLA3gC-szjp2KgFJ-weeinhsTrBpqjNAVri2s1DLqXU1-uJAh8TcqmCZTco7yaky0FTz3kmgeyj-WrNLJK5UGadoQNKpDJHbV8OXSliCq0HcAV-d75SHkQXNw71xdqYg9TPdElcCEAgqKeKY5i8UByKknxfxI1_UL_FKm8WOdeFSOGSwD7YJHmfFvwm92FXfP0UWna_kODEEUUE1DPlEl6vjat2EAMifbFlsJkIw%3D%3D)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77e479299f514e7799e4c1901e196d44&_e=43cCy87lvuy_VDPM2XBCosMEGuQcHHOFfrAsZnBn7bEv50tJ3vvEuVWb_6KOcHhiNPzAUXG-RCx1uVs1ySJXXZrXZD9_biWa_74X-wzCIKtS4u09fhNXCGymCm9unRLRwvcC076fSkscqwozQoNglh0ueTWv95NgBRVuSewQbmNl5wzPSZ8Ht_FAAPVlimm2QZvIf92awRDJFPEcDCIVJi7rtP014vh-kvw6cpxp3HTQr9hdsgLWUg6fKZX9ysXS20Q4BO6PfiuPec_ooaB8OFM7pT4IrCQSQ_EVTc6N0pVPsGHwtBBOUh_MLa6dSmb0j3TxjZv9176Ih6VoJLIBLxt1PLIF_VGGUBl6__nFUDb_MViUvUhIeVGXo8VGmVnolEbBMA2beWIn_jTjuLfYdIG1E_zujBGrJzto1x-X59ykwFMCWAPD4X2mzQRE_SW8h_oGtmoym7BvFsfwTg9EQqxwpeiwfH48Mp0svHND3FtL_EHNYNc619KF6peCIY4dioxPNu2z_NhI7RtKBrFVD9hvf_U2jF87sR-CnvtP7Ou_PaqIGsrsPSObk2-I6HkJsIR6LfiGqQMHfpAjTjz4Ic7sMitf-uqWvXEttp3WcnetI5OuUq15PU0w6fW-OmxI59JsTA6auzXH4H9EGOdDXH8j5r5GiP-3wadt9iYgWIiJz9vFjKZ9Um-P4kRoUY4AqJZzIggP_9lR9rLat_7wcuXQg6v2yPcuHQz2Jus03p0_EJpjxefrKLW8HvbsXuNB2ioSTuNvCb0hodCIfNZxyg%3D%3D)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77e479299f514e7799e4c1901e196d44&_e=43cCy87lvuy_VDPM2XBCosMEGuQcHHOFfrAsZnBn7bEv50tJ3vvEuVWb_6KOcHhiNPzAUXG-RCx1uVs1ySJXXZrXZD9_biWa_74X-wzCIKtS4u09fhNXCGymCm9unRLRwvcC076fSkscqwozQoNglh0ueTWv95NgBRVuSewQbmNl5wzPSZ8Ht_FAAPVlimm2QZvIf92awRDJFPEcDCIVJi7rtP014vh-kvw6cpxp3HTQr9hdsgLWUg6fKZX9ysXS20Q4BO6PfiuPec_ooaB8OH8ZTCRs4MA5USMeFR6E7DFKWo3bJuLZWVZIXCAabpQTTe7xEFZMeL9kzGuzGoCmD-OgTL0o88JfF9f-Z8bsWEbIfLADz4Y7NRrY7AxUBuLwBqJMSIMKWzGoVGh0peWuOU8RTVm_jUYvTMfBisU6GGBuwdXBwRacb-22nbIca_dENECLCSMlXW8btqGBLRG8gjaTiW-VLeLZNaNB88Gvj9nH2ZleFtarrQa0R_UjvEvAXEUXiw6DqsActvXLd6AytXzzsA_1Cx6NaMfLS4xI4pVx0fUzKgHcH_lOTNEFXo4Ji6xws30tx2IJ-wcP-BHBkz7TUlP5zqcpEiLfRbzrtGjCiks7iHQWfH8IrNgZ5OxFIbXTuW_HE6kZ-5HzFjzbHgSKrSEOri02USJLru-iYdOkurLQbiedNdGTFMAs692BWYuhNJ5Aqc-MTKLyzCXEucldwJgIMjyUIV9-scZZOs-ELVb1uZ6nCRhKt7ZcYcORcwwE1MrZuClIyFWgHPKhwQ%3D%3D)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77e479299f514e7799e4c1901e196d44&_e=43cCy87lvuy_VDPM2XBCosMEGuQcHHOFfrAsZnBn7bEv50tJ3vvEuVWb_6KOcHhiNPzAUXG-RCx1uVs1ySJXXZrXZD9_biWa_74X-wzCIKtS4u09fhNXCGymCm9unRLRwvcC076fSkscqwozQoNglh0ueTWv95NgBRVuSewQbmNl5wzPSZ8Ht_FAAPVlimm2QZvIf92awRDJFPEcDCIVJi7rtP014vh-kvw6cpxp3HTQr9hdsgLWUg6fKZX9ysXS20Q4BO6PfiuPec_ooaB8OAB2riIzfn8VC8DSS5DAx671R0Dv5vqE49huPU0r9cOib-9VeSnl-k_IuF5GBvuRir5MLsrqxo_5iYi_OeuWsmMuygs_35TFQfix7vmYhxmw2x3o4eTn96WIPZaQuixpmhIp45m2iZxAA-KGAsuq33bE-zaqoWPuTNXB-vAuY1ybvCyG09zc-sZyRWsez16FuH_iO3mOpTptJUPXEZwFFON9LtiHRfYBngTsJLFn7Rk65F-pBujSr2TXdVxVx37vbfZ5GXvdKD_RDdtxu71haCgvPbnU744jfJKEq72l3FYJSUrR23tlW2922QVonuDy35iMc3srN6OE9l6_iIjvz8VTnFwBjPc42XteLve9HvPhEG9-zSe7BnwXv6nAEmJS2qDrEV_c-8LqRZ2KOXjCQ6Fm99iLa3f3GurI_QegIoYb40F3ZAH2HbOenXGE5x4zCcIG9GMzYKXSNQTpGd9AKIoakRjM0KB7Mfegp-53x5TqVHtgTYcg426ZxTUewdz2vg%3D%3D)

Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, **[I’m asking you to take a chance on me and support my campaign today, in its infancy, to help me get it off the ground and give us a shot at reclaiming a Senate seat we haven’t held in a generation](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=77e479299f514e7799e4c1901e196d44&_e=43cCy87lvuy_VDPM2XBCosMEGuQcHHOFfrAsZnBn7bEv50tJ3vvEuVWb_6KOcHhiNPzAUXG-RCx1uVs1ySJXXZrXZD9_biWa_74X-wzCIKtS4u09fhNXCGymCm9unRLRwvcC076fSkscqwozQoNglh0ueTWv95NgBRVuSewQbmNl5wzPSZ8Ht_FAAPVlimm2QZvIf92awRDJFPEcDCIVJi7rtP014vh-kvw6cpxp3HTQr9hdsgLWUg6fKZX9ysXS20Q4BO6PfiuPec_ooaB8OGL_FxSy9Ho3G7euzHa0mziSVBLJh56T64KBetjxhvSOMZwUz9dQKsB2pZQwV6GpT2hPIh_Z-oWqZ7lr1rXS8lfuebIKJAmvw3LRXg-h4YAAAlpb_vRTcvGOt9VLV76uSPdJ5J-MgR9x34YujMCL8vPG5-IBLh_iPcmxobzW-o910R3-BCogsa3C1FpN6T3BAkVkv9JhZVPB3prc1DNa0G_yoLQlOtCyMiJGbKHxu5eUWBQx6adJ4pNha0fiMQZ1T-qLI1MMvI0YqnCD7RLuRR1jtfI-yjI33GuxdvaCZTx_qjdi0aXRXJthfK4G3ODZZyGG0u47nJfIS7w3vyvzXYJwt-wrlj_lbn5AQrTbHt0noupQ2Q7MdAG2EeNmx5ENJdLfFr4DOKfeEUUbwNtF43p6KPXpbZcv3LjEXh10jDPj76UyO-HIxw7h7J2GewZ8eRzAJgyXAtMccUraQ9ahGAZS7Nnl0Eal1SbWLYzsrHcgQ1IZMybS2bj-7LvOIe3wBw%3D%3D)**.

clean_body: You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

clean_body: | | | Peter, Our sticker campaign ends on Sunday! Thousands of stickers have already been claimed. That’s a testament to how strongly this political vision is resonating with people all across the country. We saw it last month in New York City, when Zohran Mamdani won the Democratic primary in a historic landslide. We saw it just a few days ago, when Adelita Grijalva won her Democratic primary for Congress in Arizona. And we’re seeing it every single day, as people take to the streets or contact their representatives, demanding a better future for all — one that includes affordable housing, free transit, and health care for all. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Ryan Busse (via Giffords.org)
subject: This is disturbing.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The gun industry is shameless.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250718-1-b&refcode2=10687.3935704.D7eyDp&t=1&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)
---
Friend, this is disturbing.
Do you remember when the tobacco industry created the Joe Camel cartoon to peddle cigarettes to kids? Public outrage, lawsuits, and policy reform forced Big Tobacco to stop.
But guess who picked up the mantle of irresponsible marketing? **The gun industry.**
Right now, many gun manufacturers are marketing semiautomatic rifles to young men by glorifying the actions of domestic terror organizations like the Proud Boys and the Three Percenters (that’s what that big III on the side of this rifle means).
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=2&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)
My name is Ryan Busse, and for more than 25 years, I worked as a firearms executive at one of the world’s top gun manufacturers. **I am now working alongside GIFFORDS to hold the gun industry accountable for these actions because I care about our democracy and saving our country.**
[**Before I share more, will you please chip in any amount so GIFFORDS PAC can continue fighting back against the gun industry? Since Sandy Hook, they have helped pass hundreds of laws to curb gun violence in states.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=3&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&amount=3&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=22&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-july25.Pa0HtQ&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=23&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-july25.kqPk76&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=24&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-july25.fCKs9x&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=25&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-july25.-bFWqW&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=26&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=27&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
Marketing like this drives our nation towards violence and civil war. And Team, it works.
It divides our nation and these companies are okay with that because it delivers big profits to manufacturers. They have made more than $1 billion in the past decade alone.
**These ads target and radicalize susceptible young men, and it's getting worse.**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=28&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)
This is irresponsible and dangerous. It must stop. Now.
**Since leaving the industry, I have joined forces with Gabby Giffords to fight back against the radicalization of the gun lobby.**
GIFFORDS has worked to build a national coalition of grassroots supporters — including gun owners from across our country — committed to maintaining commonsense practices like background checks and safe storage.
With your support, we can continue fighting back against marketing like this that jeopardizes the fundamental freedoms of all Americans.
[**If you’re able, please chip in $10 or more to power GIFFORDS PAC’s work. We can build a movement that is more powerful than the gun lobby, but we need grassroots supporters like you.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=29&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&amount=3&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=48&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-july25.Pa0HtQ&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=49&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-july25.kqPk76&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=50&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-july25.fCKs9x&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=51&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-july25.-bFWqW&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=52&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&refcode=em250718-1-b&t=53&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp)**
---
****
Thank you for your support.
— Ryan Busse

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=54&akid=10687%2E3935704%2ED7eyDp) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: Do the courts have the final say on the U.S. Constitution?

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

clean_body: | = I need to be direct. At the end of this message, I’m going to humbly ask you to = to keep CA-45 blue. But before I do, allow me to lay out the high stakes in this race. First: I shocked the GOP establishment and flipped one of the most competitive seats in the nation back in November. Only 653 votes separated me and the Republican incumbent. Then: Republicans sought revenge almost immediately. I’m facing near-daily attacks, and now a top GOP super PAC is spending $5 million in swing districts like mine to protect the MAGA agenda. Now: I need your support to protect this seat. If the thousands of supporters reading this email all chipped in a few dollars right now, we’d send an undeniable message of strength. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. subject: We need to reverse this appalling attack on LGBTQ+ youth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m reaching out to you with some disturbing news.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111714843/558153753/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjM0NDQ1MS1mZDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdzhbydJAU66xExFWJmDOT2pQ7t5pRpQiIgshQ6FwpU=) Team, the Trump administration just shut down the federally-funded suicide hotline for LGBTQ+ youth. We have seen many examples of the Trump administration’s cruelty since the beginning of the year, but this is beyond the pale, folks. And as one of the only openly LGBTQ+ members of Congress, I'm leading the bipartisan fight to undo this appalling decision. **[Can you sign this petition telling the Trump administration to reinstate the federally-funded suicide hotline for LGBTQ+ youth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111714844/558153754/-1304155137?refcode=email_071825_hotline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjM0NDQ1MS1mZDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdzhbydJAU66xExFWJmDOT2pQ7t5pRpQiIgshQ6FwpU=&emci=bc8c80bf-f363-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d6344451-fd63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22117458)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111714845/558153755/-796499517?refcode=email_071825_hotline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjM0NDQ1MS1mZDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdzhbydJAU66xExFWJmDOT2pQ7t5pRpQiIgshQ6FwpU=&emci=bc8c80bf-f363-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d6344451-fd63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22117458)
---
Make no mistake: This hotline saves kids’ lives. LGBTQ+ youth are four times more likely than their peers to attempt suicide, and the hotline has provided suicide prevention services to 1.5 million young people across the country. There is no reason, beyond cruelty, to deprive these kids of a life raft in their moment of greatest need.
**Listen, this isn't just a phone line. This isn't politics — in fact, several House Republicans have even joined us in our fight to fix this.**
**The fact is, this is about young people who are trying to survive in a world that tells them that they don't belong and that they shouldn't be here. And when these people are in crisis, it is our responsibility as a country to support them and get them access to the help they need.**
**[Members of Congress from both sides of the aisle are calling for this hotline to be reinstated. Will you add your voice and join us in this fight to protect young LGBTQ+ people in this country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111714846/558153756/-1304155137?refcode=email_071825_hotline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjM0NDQ1MS1mZDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdzhbydJAU66xExFWJmDOT2pQ7t5pRpQiIgshQ6FwpU=&emci=bc8c80bf-f363-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d6344451-fd63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22117458)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111714847/558153757/-796499517?refcode=email_071825_hotline&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjM0NDQ1MS1mZDYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdzhbydJAU66xExFWJmDOT2pQ7t5pRpQiIgshQ6FwpU=&emci=bc8c80bf-f363-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d6344451-fd63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22117458)
---
Thank you,
Sharice
P.S. The Trevor Project will continue to operate its hotline for LGBTQ+ youth at 1-866-488-7386, a text line at 678-678 and a digital messaging service through its website.

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: A big win for our community – thanks to you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
There’s no substitute for hard work. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=f4e6ccf09f&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7ac528d3e34c/a-big-win-for-our-community-thanks-to-you?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=51b5fae460&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

Yesterday brought a major win for our community. Local officials and community groups were able to reach an agreement with Lakeside Industries to halt the proposed Cedar River asphalt plant. In its place, a warehouse will be built that avoids the potential impacts associated with an asphalt facility.

This is a huge victory for our region! It safeguards our environment, respects community wishes, and allows Lakeside Industries to finally utilize this space in a productive way. I'm incredibly thankful for all parties working together to come to this agreement.
[Seattle Times: Asphalt plant on Cedar River scrapped; agreement follows long fight](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=c697dcae69&e=77eef70c61)
[](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=10c5217488&e=77eef70c61)
Friend, I've been fighting for our community for years to get us to this point. Whether it was passing moratoriums, making our case to the press, or waving signs alongside you, the truth is that **_there is no substitute for hard work._** We got here by working hard--together--and I'd do it all again in a heartbeat, because nothing matters more to me than protecting our community.
But I couldn't have done it without you! Your generous support enables me to go out and get victories like this for our community--victories that are sometimes years in the making! If you would be willing to support me so I can continue to protect our neighborhoods, I'd be honored to have you by my side! **\---------------
[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=ff2054557c&e=77eef70c61)
\----------------** I'm incredibly grateful for this recent success, but there are many more challenges headed our way. I need your support moving forward so that I continue to fight to protect our community from extreme tax hikes, unwise cuts to law enforcement resources, and radical downtown-Seattle policies that hurt our suburban and rural neighborhoods. **Would you be willing to _[make a one-time donation of $100, $75, or even just $25](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=aa0286c7ae&e=77eef70c61) _so that I can continue working hard for you?** With your support, I will be able to continue achieving results for our community and protecting our neighborhoods! Thank you! Reagan
---

clean_body: There’s no substitute for hard work. | | | Is this email not displaying correctly? . ---|--- | | | Friend, Yesterday brought a major win for our community. Local officials and community groups were able to reach an agreement with Lakeside Industries to halt the proposed Cedar River asphalt plant. In its place, a warehouse will be built that avoids the potential impacts associated with an asphalt facility. This is a huge victory for our region! It safeguards our environment, respects community wishes, and allows Lakeside Industries to finally utilize this space in a productive way. I'm incredibly thankful for all parties working together to come to this agreement. Friend, I've been fighting for our community for years to get us to this point. Whether it was passing moratoriums, making our case to the press, or waving signs alongside you, the truth is that there is no substitute for hard work. We got here by working hard--together--and I'd do it all again in a heartbeat, because nothing matters more to me than protecting our community. But I couldn't have done it without you! Your generous support enables me to go out and get victories like this for our community--victories that are sometimes years in the making! If you would be willing to support me so I can continue to protect our neighborhoods, I'd be honored to have you by my side! \--------------- \---------------- I'm incredibly grateful for this recent success, but there are many more challenges headed our way. I need your support moving forward so that I continue to fight to protect our community from extreme tax hikes, unwise cuts to law enforcement resources, and radical downtown-Seattle policies that hurt our suburban and rural neighborhoods. Would you be willing to so that I can continue working hard for you? With your support, I will be able to continue achieving results for our community and protecting our neighborhoods! Thank you! Reagan | | | | Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn P.O. Box 40417 Bellevue, WA 98015 Email: mailto:info@reagandunn.com | |

name: Qasim Rashid, Esq.
subject: The Cancellation of Stephen Colbert
body:
By axing his show, CBS is reminding us that trust in corporate media is dead for a reason--but there's something even more sinister afoot we cannot ignore

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..N4BOsfn28v-wFEzJ3HHgRtYhtMppRbeEXZ9ZNJPCNyg?) for more

* * *
# [The Cancellation of Stephen Colbert ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168652502&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUyNTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NjA1NDgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ1MjU0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZmBuAigxPufJ3XIpFSQdk9vkyJVmQqUZdmXdkhlQ7jQ)
### By axing his show, CBS is reminding us that trust in corporate media is dead for a reason--but there's something even more sinister afoot we cannot ignore
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jul 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168652502&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUyNTAyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Mjg2MDU0OCwiZXhwIjoxNzU1NDUyNTQ4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.X3pTSmjaKLCQyLx8mKOzoK9qLkGX1lZVrXxWu5OI1bE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168652502&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUyNTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NjA1NDgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ1MjU0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZmBuAigxPufJ3XIpFSQdk9vkyJVmQqUZdmXdkhlQ7jQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=168652502&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUyNTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NjA1NDgsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ1MjU0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZmBuAigxPufJ3XIpFSQdk9vkyJVmQqUZdmXdkhlQ7jQ)
---
| | [](https://substack..4r2OHLDSrtgVXQ4DBT-HD1WP08rMOBpuQelEugobvrc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/the-cancellation-of-stephen-colbert?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Stephen Colbert is the highest rated late night host on television. His career has spanned nearly four decades of brilliant comedy, satire, and hard hitting truths. One such truth is, despite working for CBS, he called out CBS's parent company Paramount for agreeing to a $16M settlement with Trump. An effective bribe given to (apparently) grease the deals of a merger. Three days later, Colbert's show is cancelled and we're left wondering how much longer we're going to tolerate the total collapse of corporate media? **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..mxmBuRRojlfYzBPEt48f5abgC__rLqKW1DXX4AyBFFw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168652502)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/09d23023-d6f6-40e5-a243-f3bce1f2fd1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **The Backstory**
Donald Trump sued CBS and Paramount Global for $20 billion because he claims a "60 Minutes" segment caused him "mental anguish" and damaged his reputation as a content creator. I wish I were making this up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/803f2a88-c078-4fb6-9ad6-c5f78016cdf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rather than fighting this lawsuit and obvious abuse of power--that Paramount admitted was without merit--Paramount agreed to pay Trump a cool $16 million. The Trump regime ultimately decides if Paramount can merge with Skydance Media. And what better way to build a media monopoly than by capitulating to an aspiring dictator? Because that's what Paramount is doing--trying to save their bottom line at the expense of American democracy. In the aftermath, CBS News President Wendy McMahon and "60 Minutes" EP Bill Owens both resigned.
Then, four days ago, Stephen Colbert publicly criticized Paramount for their absurd decision to effectively bribe Trump to push through the merger with SkyDance. You can watch that clip below at the 3:30 mark.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7e6e78c4-49f2-4da7-91fc-372f2cc92b73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And just like that, Colbert is out. Of all the political takes Colbert expressed over the years, the on that was a bridge too far was criticizing the President of the United States and criticizing a media monopoly. So much for free speech and free expression. Paramount's response exemplifies why trust in corporate media is dead.
## What This Means For Democracy
And this is the sinister fact I alluded to in this article's title. If the nation's most powerful media organizations are not willing to stand up to government tyranny, then they've failed in their responsibility as the Fourth Estate. They have left us vulnerable to government tyranny, both by silently standing by, and by actively enabling it. Such media ceases to be the fourth estate, and embraces the role of State Media. Such propaganda should be discarded altogether, and replaced with actual voices to speak up for justice, fight for working people, and hold government accountable. Otherwise, our dying Republic is all but dead.
Indeed, this isn't a series of unfortunate lapses in judgment. It's a pattern. It's collusion. It's a soft coup through compliant media executives and billionaire owners who are terrified of upsetting Trump--and more terrified of losing market share.
Paramount is serving power, not truth. And we're paying the price. Cowardice in journalism is not a neutral act. It is betrayal. And we don't have time left for soft takes and polite critiques. Not when fascism is knocking on every door.
## **How We Fight Back**
**1\. Support Independent Media**
I launched _Let 's Address This_ to loudly and clearly confront injustice while demanding accountability. More than 500 articles and 25 million readers later, we've built something powerful. We've exposed corruption, elevated marginalized voices, and challenged fascism at every step. But I can't do this alone.
If you're a subscriber, thank you. If you're not yet, please join us. No paywalls. No billionaire backers. Just people-powered media. Every subscription, every share, every read chips away at the disinformation machine.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..mxmBuRRojlfYzBPEt48f5abgC__rLqKW1DXX4AyBFFw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168652502)
**2\. Use Ground News to Cut Through the Noise**
How do we recognize the bias behind major media corporations? How do we know the article we're reading is grounded in fact, not government talking points? I invite you to look at what Ground News has to offer, because it is more than a news website and app--it's a critical tool in a disinformation age. I use it every day. If you care about combatting misinformation and disinformation--and I know you do--you need [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/7e979af8-66e0-4058-aa09-37873f413c49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/833b9910-14f3-4348-aa76-e63916f7a0fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In addition to gathering related articles globally in one place, revealing source bias and factuality, they cut through partisanship and sensationalism to focus on the facts--**Ground News reports on who funds a media outlet**.
So even if you didn't know that Paramount and SkyDance might be trying to form a monopoly of sorts, [Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/7e979af8-66e0-4058-aa09-37873f413c49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) would show you where their funding comes from. That matters. Ground News doesn't tell you what to think. It shows you who's funding the narratives, so you can decide for yourself.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9f775cab-04b2-4a08-8f86-606bfe38fd43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
An example of how Ground News shows left leaning vs right wing media and how they report on the same story.
It's also worth mentioning that Ground News itself is subscriber supported, not billionaire funded. **So by subscribing, you directly support my newsletter and you contribute to keeping the media transparent.** And right now if you subscribe to Ground News at my exclusive link below, you'll conveniently get 40% off their Vantage Plan, the same one I use. That's $5/month to stop letting other people's agendas control how you think.
[Subscribe to Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/833b9910-14f3-4348-aa76-e63916f7a0fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## **Conclusion**
Stephen Colbert told the truth--and he was silenced. Not by the government directly, but by the corporate media executives who'd rather appease power than challenge it. Paramount paid $16 million to a man they admit is lying, then quietly removed one of the last remaining truth-tellers on primetime television for calling it out. This isn't just media cowardice--it's media capture.
When the Fourth Estate kneels to autocracy, we no longer have journalism. We have propaganda. And that propaganda is already shaping elections, burying corruption, and normalizing fascism.
So we're left with a choice: accept this collapse, or build something better.
That's why I created _Let 's Address This._ Because justice needs a megaphone, not a muzzle. Because the truth deserves more than 30 seconds of airtime before being buried under ad revenue and shareholder appeasement.
If you believe in that mission--if you believe in independent media that doesn't flinch when power roars--then now is the time to act.
👉 Subscribe to this human rights newsletter.
👉 Share this with someone still watching CBS thinking they're getting the full story.
👉 Join _[Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/d21fb9d1-9299-47ae-bd5c-a1af183d470e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , see who's shaping the narrative, and reclaim the truth.
We can't outspend billionaires. But we can outnumber them. And if we want to _Protect the Republic,_ we have to start by _protecting the truth._
**I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.** **Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..mxmBuRRojlfYzBPEt48f5abgC__rLqKW1DXX4AyBFFw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168652502)

body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITdetpS9tTyT89u-RvTwrQZgj7yIfEaGfNAUOPlQJsMZDVZedddMtc7oRyj27YfOe33PG0JlN6EnRrRwLeCu0cNs41fqWfQbe3hXcAeFnbmWw7CsXLgbf8eYpiNdkwG1EIdVinLWSY2qwrkVSKiYCHf9V4E_Esa-RJGFOAPp67tiZo4wX294f1rG9Bs1c7-qUCSyck9Yth3lN_3mJcJA-XdnfVDHdqJ1uZPObJcLQA5YY/4ia/VYsuIpXwRD6Gq6dwJN5UnQ/h0/h001.B54zGFRgdjLpAV-g_-cYI7o2zmEOc0hSxNvqbCSGczo)
---
Peter,

This July, as we mark Disability Pride Month and honor the resilience, leadership, and contributions of Americans living with disabilities, my opponent is championing a bill that tells them they are unfit to lead. A bill that would empower our MAGA Congress to play doctor and decide who is "cognitively impaired" enough to be removed from office.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA9Rrp0qznd65vapFbkJ7Rmzj2tLRplZ-oKtgEVdt7Yw_tsI5nec693XpTKxXRa41LdBLBriQ6a_D1fJym-P2LUZlq19s0wpbzgFJdsEOqsdzTF520clLNoSxVtQvymfIUaUJ7gVJ3DRZEIPrVgP5xR13KKOuyYT5YNNgdbsolFrYxdL0quN-dKUJ9Ngqo_XMLJOjnEkIuYWgXLas3soxNxBKoQKP6Zb4Kdz-zGCRLqo-IPEsO1dtwWn8sABDtHVtJa4Xw6Jq2UQoBDrggoKRtIE8SdNAHYZhZDvAhI_kylEuFeZsBXvK9LAp2ZhVR5RBUCcoayR0bJPz2nlSNCTUaw/4ia/VYsuIpXwRD6Gq6dwJN5UnQ/h1/h001.pH45TFfWNYliqDaFWjcPASzjqfobIm8k3Vz6MDO2hFE)

Marie Gluesenkamp Perez wants to hand that authority to the Office of Congressional Ethics, a government board with no medical training, no access to private health records, and no clinical standards. She thinks that's who should decide who gets to serve. They would make these decisions without doctors, without access to medical history, and without the clinical knowledge to understand what they're even looking at. **She is proudly calling it bold. I call it reckless and dangerous.** Look, we all understand we cannot let another Dianne Feinstein situation happen. Her staff concealed her decline for years and helped clear the way for three Trump Supreme Court Justices. **But what Marie is proposing would open the door for Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, or Jim Jordan to decide who they think is "fit" to serve. ** [**If you believe we need leaders who defend rights instead of inventing new ways to strip them, chip in right now.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUA9Rrp0qznd65vapFbkJ7Rmzj2tLRplZ-oKtgEVdt7Yw_tsI5nec693XpTKxXRa41Iu4ivgWPt1Mgzv2as0IJ6d5GqXa61tBXv3VLfXbJZ6lUJvmBosj74qwNIOs0n77KMOfu3b5QDazCIYOxjDb3yAVTI4CkqM850giyO3tGO9Vhq-YW24ETod--ydIGxcvVS2K_2QPW2dt6ukQ3Ui2MIE9-HVie_ZtyfEE7PJe4SHcoz0PGvEgmbBKsQTzyAgmvaIsa3LsLLs4uosAVV0Kciu_M1BdLWc0SiOhpW7igXqDqIGopD-ZfDfmwc_Qxovw3P0N4_MvO9cCZjtbnbX6Rj-/4ia/VYsuIpXwRD6Gq6dwJN5UnQ/h2/h001.HriIrMGxU572-F_aNzHeVCkw9VobqL5ZH3NK-FIowWk) Disability is not synonymous with incapacity. Cognitive conditions do not erase character, values, or the ability to serve. Marie's bill sends a message to millions of Americans with epilepsy, brain injuries, PTSD, bipolar disorder, or neurological differences that their lives are worth less. That their voices do not belong in power. That their futures in public service are conditional, revocable, subject to suspicion at any time. This is the same mindset behind the abortion bans that put politicians in the exam room. And it's the same cruelty behind bills that criminalize trans health care.

Now it is being repackaged in the language of "ethics" by a so-called Democrat who seems more concerned with scoring MAGA political points than disabled kids in her own district.

Congress already has measures in place to remove members who are unfit to serve, it happened to George Santos. And there are real alternatives.

We could require voluntary disclosure of hospitalizations or absences. We could enforce transparency rules within party leadership.

We could limit leadership positions with term limits.

**But we should never allow Congress to codify medical inquisition as law.

**For Marie to celebrate this bill as inventive reform reveals the hollowness of a political vision stripped of empathy.

It reinforces the oldest lie in American politics: that power belongs only to the unblemished, the able-bodied, and the well-connected.

And it tells disabled Americans to stay silent, stay invisible, and stay out of power.

[**This is our line in the sand. If you want to help build a government grounded in dignity and humanity, chip in today.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Donald Trump is America’s Lex Luthor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715304/558155636/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxMTk0ZC1mZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2k4piDQkX8Ny8p1RxY5UO6pJAd7Gpb3vDId-XailJE=)
Stop me if you've heard this one before.
**A billionaire villain becomes President of the United States and ushers in a wave of corporate corruption and greed, only to be stopped by an immigrant committed to social justice and the common good.**
As a comic book fan, it sounds a lot like Lex Luthor and Superman. _And as an American at this moment in history, it sounds a lot like Donald Trump._
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715305/558155637/789508428?refcode=250718_RG_lexluthor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxMTk0ZC1mZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2k4piDQkX8Ny8p1RxY5UO6pJAd7Gpb3vDId-XailJE=)**
So today, I’m reaching to ask you to join me in playing the role of Superman at this perilous moment for American democracy.
**[Together, we can stop the billionaire villain in the White House who threatens the common good and the American values we cherish. That starts with grassroots supporters like you chipping in $10 or more right now to elect a Democratic House Majority. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715306/558155638/789508428?refcode=250718_RG_lexluthor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxMTk0ZC1mZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2k4piDQkX8Ny8p1RxY5UO6pJAd7Gpb3vDId-XailJE=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715307/558155639/-309737922?refcode=250718_RG_lexluthor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxMTk0ZC1mZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2k4piDQkX8Ny8p1RxY5UO6pJAd7Gpb3vDId-XailJE=)
I’m a huge Superman fan. As an immigrant who moved to this country as a kid, I learned English by reading comics, and I grew a love for Truth, Justice, and the American Way — _everything that MAGA and Fox News now hate._
I resonated with Superman — an immigrant who came to this country to do the most good, expose corruption, and fight greedy corporate titans.
_**Meanwhile, Lex Luthor, a billionaire villain, becomes President.**_
Donald Trump is our Lex Luthor — and MAGA Republicans don’t get to change the story because they don’t like what it stands for.
**[You can help me defeat our Lex Luthor and restore the values that Superman fights for — Truth, Justice, and the American Way — to our government by chipping in $10 or more right now. Can I count on your support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715308/558155640/789508428?refcode=250718_RG_lexluthor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxMTk0ZC1mZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2k4piDQkX8Ny8p1RxY5UO6pJAd7Gpb3vDId-XailJE=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715309/558155641/-309737922?refcode=250718_RG_lexluthor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxMTk0ZC1mZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2k4piDQkX8Ny8p1RxY5UO6pJAd7Gpb3vDId-XailJE=)
Thank you,
Robert
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715310/558155642/-309737922?refcode=250718_RG_lexluthor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxMTk0ZC1mZTYzLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2k4piDQkX8Ny8p1RxY5UO6pJAd7Gpb3vDId-XailJE=)

name: Team Yass
subject: A scam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
School vouchers are nothing more than a scam to send our tax dollars to give the wealthiest families in the country a coupon for a low-cost, expensive education. **[And now Education Secretary Linda McMahon and House Republicans are trying to push this scam at the national level. We need our supporters in 18326 to stand up for public schools. Will you add your name right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715461/558156364/1600699701?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250718_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWJlM2UzMC0wMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzVh7UOqsr6Bv9gJZl9PXoEnCWwdeCeHuZj0lXo-5ZY=&emci=b2dfad29-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a9be3e30-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=45157234)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715462/558156365/1600699701?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250718_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWJlM2UzMC0wMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzVh7UOqsr6Bv9gJZl9PXoEnCWwdeCeHuZj0lXo-5ZY=&emci=b2dfad29-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a9be3e30-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=45157234)**
---
Arizona was **dead last** on a list of states for best public education in 2024. We have some of the lowest teacher salaries in the country, some of the highest student-to-teacher ratios in the country, and Republicans have continued to blow a hole in the funding for public schools at the state level and hurt public school students.
**Over 70% of school vouchers** have gone to students who live in the wealthiest zip codes in Arizona to fund expensive private education and luxury items. We need leaders who are fighting for high-quality, accessible, public education, NOT trying to defund it.
**[Will you stand with Yassamin today and add your name?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111715463/558156366/1600699701?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250718_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWJlM2UzMC0wMDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzVh7UOqsr6Bv9gJZl9PXoEnCWwdeCeHuZj0lXo-5ZY=&emci=b2dfad29-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a9be3e30-0064-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=45157234)**

name: Voter Action Project
subject: This bill is still a threat we need to stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=vx8WXVHq6RP8M-v5lof7j6SanCEvdKFbirqCUiCySVk=&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=vx8WXVHq6RP8M-v5lof7j6SanCEvdKFbirqCUiCySVk=&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=vx8WXVHq6RP8M-v5lof7j6SanCEvdKFbirqCUiCySVk=&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=vx8WXVHq6RP8M-v5lof7j6SanCEvdKFbirqCUiCySVk=&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=vx8WXVHq6RP8M-v5lof7j6SanCEvdKFbirqCUiCySVk=&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=F1pF3m7l+pTPJk0Y3vKkt4idEEMwiydTnn38dbdGculC5OOnUi7h9+xtI7Q4D4D/s1y4HoUeinRY6ReZJNaobUdEE6dEyBf6j2/d5mL+y80=]

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: Case filed ✅ Your help still needed
body:
This law is a disgrace. We’re taking Trump to court. | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111716842/558161154/2141984067?sourceid=1150808&utm_campaign=26emaus-0703aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2Y3YWNmZi0wMTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmT1c9WeZQ70I1TIsPjbYR7lv4GcD-KElbMbL6O2aYo=&emci=7cd15957-5963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6cf7acff-0164-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111716843/558161155/2141984067?sourceid=1150808&utm_campaign=26emaus-0703aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2Y3YWNmZi0wMTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmT1c9WeZQ70I1TIsPjbYR7lv4GcD-KElbMbL6O2aYo=&emci=7cd15957-5963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6cf7acff-0164-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

We are taking the Trump administration to court.

A cruel new Trump-backed law attacks clinics that provide reproductive health care, including abortions, by stripping them of Medicaid funding for non-abortion care like birth control, cancer screenings, and STI testing. It's a deliberate attempt to shut down providers offering _entirely legal care._ [**We won't let this happen without a fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111716844/558161156/1268344831?sourceid=1150808&utm_campaign=26emaus-0703aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2Y3YWNmZi0wMTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmT1c9WeZQ70I1TIsPjbYR7lv4GcD-KElbMbL6O2aYo=&emci=7cd15957-5963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6cf7acff-0164-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Our client Maine Family Planning (MFP) is already being forced to turn away new primary care patients who rely on Medicaid. Without immediate relief, thousands of Mainers—especially those in rural areas—could lose access to the care they need to stay healthy. | [**SEND CRITICAL SUPPORT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111716845/558161157/1268344831?sourceid=1150808&utm_campaign=26emaus-0703aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2Y3YWNmZi0wMTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmT1c9WeZQ70I1TIsPjbYR7lv4GcD-KElbMbL6O2aYo=&emci=7cd15957-5963-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6cf7acff-0164-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "SEND CRITICAL SUPPORT")
---
👉 We're asking the court to:
* Restore Medicaid funding for essential services like OBGYN visits, contraception, STI testing, and cancer screenings
* Grant emergency relief so MFP can continue providing essential care to patients who rely on Medicaid

This law is a disgrace and its ripple effects will be devastating to millions of low-income Americans. [**We're fighting back—not just for Mainers, but for everyone who could be next. clean_body: This law is a disgrace. We’re taking Trump to court. | | | ---|--- Peter, We are taking the Trump administration to court. A cruel new Trump-backed law attacks clinics that provide reproductive health care, including abortions, by stripping them of Medicaid funding for non-abortion care like birth control, cancer screenings, and STI testing. It's a deliberate attempt to shut down providers offering entirely legal care. Our client Maine Family Planning (MFP) is already being forced to turn away new primary care patients who rely on Medicaid. Without immediate relief, thousands of Mainers—especially those in rural areas—could lose access to the care they need to stay healthy. | "SEND CRITICAL SUPPORT" 👉 We're asking the court to: Restore Medicaid funding for essential services like OBGYN visits, contraception, STI testing, and cancer screenings Grant emergency relief so MFP can continue providing essential care to patients who rely on Medicaid This law is a disgrace and its ripple effects will be devastating to millions of low-income Americans. "RUSH YOUR GIFT NOW" Onward, Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. This law will create a domino effect that harms everyone. If MFP clinics are forced to close, other providers will have to absorb those patients, and it will become harder for everyone in the state to get health care. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” just screwed us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
The fight isn’t over: see what this bill means for you, and how we push back. |

name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: Sixteen years ago, the federal minimum wage was raised to $7.25
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
And it’s remained the same ever since.
#
$7.25 — that’s the federal minimum wage right now, Peter.
**The federal minimum wage was raised to $7.25 on July 24, 2009 — SIXTEEN years ago — and it’s remained the same ever since.** According to the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, _$7.25 in 2025 has the buying power of less than $5 in 2009._
In those sixteen years, we’ve all seen the cost of living skyrocket. Housing costs are higher. Groceries are more expensive. Healthcare costs are through the roof. And yet millions of workers are still being paid wages that don’t even cover the basics.
**Let’s be clear:_If they wanted to, Congress could raise the minimum wage._** But year after year, corporate-backed politicians have blocked every attempt to deliver real raises for working Americans. They have no idea what it’s like to live paycheck-to-paycheck — and they have no sympathy for anyone who does.
With your help, we can root these power-hungry politicians out of Congress and elect leaders who will actually stand up for families like yours by working to increase the minimum wage and lower costs across the board. So what do you say, Peter?
**[Will you help us elect candidates who will stand up for working families by chipping in $10 or whatever you can today? clean_body: And it’s remained the same ever since. $7.25 — that’s the federal minimum wage right now, Peter. The federal minimum wage was raised to $7.25 on July 24, 2009 — SIXTEEN years ago — and it’s remained the same ever since. According to the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, $7.25 in 2025 has the buying power of less than $5 in 2009. In those sixteen years, we’ve all seen the cost of living skyrocket. Housing costs are higher. Groceries are more expensive. Healthcare costs are through the roof. And yet millions of workers are still being paid wages that don’t even cover the basics. Let’s be clear:If they wanted to, Congress could raise the minimum wage. But year after year, corporate-backed politicians have blocked every attempt to deliver real raises for working Americans. They have no idea what it’s like to live paycheck-to-paycheck — and they have no sympathy for anyone who does. With your help, we can root these power-hungry politicians out of Congress and elect leaders who will actually stand up for families like yours by working to increase the minimum wage and lower costs across the board. So what do you say, Peter? If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you for standing with us, Heartland Patriots HQ | | Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

**_[Sign onto our petition today and commit to making Good Trouble.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111718295/558166371/-899298814?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250718_PT_GoodTrouble_0_NLLD_TeamThompson_NA_NA_rally&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2RmNjhmMC0wNTY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SJ48whEzLWY1_qUqjmOJROfuEE5M27Tn7i9iSgyM1YM=&emci=0dd36bea-0564-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e3df68f0-0564-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=2678920)_**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111718603/558167375/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDczMDc3Yi0wNjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YLRWLARPSy_8SgqVBOoJXr0wYd2sOSnpJW9hz_8KWYU=&emci=c7d8f2fe-3363-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3073077b-0664-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

It’s National Park and Recreation Month, and here in WA-08, we’re lucky to call some of the most beautiful public lands in the country home.

From the snow-capped peaks of Mount Rainier to the wild forests of the North Cascades to the winding trails around Lake Chelan, these places are part of who we are.

But right now, **our parks are under threat.** Trump and his allies in Congress are trying to gut funding for public lands, slash protections for millions of acres, and roll back the programs our parks and forests rely on in order to thrive and remain open for our communities to experience and enjoy.

Thanks to Trump's Big Ugly bill, that also means Washington will have fewer resources to fight wildfires, repair trails, and protect the public spaces families count on to stay safe. **Kim knows that these parks belong to all of us: not developers, not to special interests— _but to the people and wildlife in Washington State._** She's fighting to keep them that way.

[**But this fight is going to take all of us raising our voices and standing with leaders like Kim, a proven champion for our public lands, all the way to Congress and the White House. If you can, chip in whatever you’re able to help protect our public lands and defend the parks and forests that help make Washington so special. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111718604/558167376/-2027950711?refcode=em25_250718_natpar_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250718_natpar_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3073077b-0664-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDczMDc3Yi0wNjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YLRWLARPSy_8SgqVBOoJXr0wYd2sOSnpJW9hz_8KWYU=) clean_body: Peter, It’s National Park and Recreation Month, and here in WA-08, we’re lucky to call some of the most beautiful public lands in the country home. From the snow-capped peaks of Mount Rainier to the wild forests of the North Cascades to the winding trails around Lake Chelan, these places are part of who we are. But right now, our parks are under threat. Trump and his allies in Congress are trying to gut funding for public lands, slash protections for millions of acres, and roll back the programs our parks and forests rely on in order to thrive and remain open for our communities to experience and enjoy. Thanks to Trump's Big Ugly bill, that also means Washington will have fewer resources to fight wildfires, repair trails, and protect the public spaces families count on to stay safe. Kim knows that these parks belong to all of us: not developers, not to special interests— but to the people and wildlife in Washington State. She's fighting to keep them that way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. clean_body: I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat. | Fellow Conservative, I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat. We’ve traveled hundreds of miles in the last week alone and we’re gearing up to travel thousands of miles before this is all over. Keeping fuel in the truck is going to become a major campaign expense. This race will come down to just a handful of votes, so we can’t run low on fuel. Literally. The average cost of gas in Georgia is just about $3. Logistics and planning are the keys to a successful mission and a winning campaign. We’ll defeat Jon Ossoff by outworking him, so that means we must keep fuel in the truck and our team on the trail. Thank you, John King | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Peter,
---
The Radical Democrats think they’ve finally got me.
---
**You see, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being **JAILED** for the rest of my life, the most powerful force absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the _ONE_ _THING_ that can save me: _**the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU.**_
---

I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. _Or so I thought..._
---
Never did I imagine that I would be the centerpiece of one of the Democrats’ most vindictive plots in history.
---
This entire plan by the Deep State to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of sinister scheme you’d think would only exist in the movies.
---
_But believe me, it exists; I’m living it! And if I fail to win this trial and defeat these sham charges, the Democrats will be able to jail me for the rest of my years on God’s green Earth._
---
These Deep State thugs know I have no pardon coming. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill...
---
_...But what they continue to underestimate time and again is the collective strength of millions of faithful patriots like you who also _REFUSE_ to surrender to the Left’s tyranny. _
---

clean_body: Waiting for your signature. | Peter, The Radical Democrats think they’ve finally got me. You see, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being JAILED for the rest of my life, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the ONE THING that can save me: the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. Or so I thought... Never did I imagine that I would be the centerpiece of one of the Democrats’ most vindictive plots in history. This entire plan by the Deep State to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of sinister scheme you’d think would only exist in the movies. But believe me, it exists; I’m living it! And if I fail to win this trial and defeat these sham charges, the Democrats will be able to jail me for the rest of my years on God’s green Earth. These Deep State thugs know I have no pardon coming. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill... ...But what they continue to underestimate time and again is the collective strength of millions of faithful patriots like you who also REFUSE to surrender to the Left’s tyranny. They entered my mugshot under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — ” — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. At this final hour, can I count on you, Peter? Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
