clean_body: | = Peter — I hope this clears things up: Republicans and their billionaire donors are using DEI in place of much more offensive terms to disparage people of color, women, and queer people. This is beyond wrong, and it's harming people from all walks of life. When the most powerful people in our country talk down to marginalized groups, the most extreme among their supporters are emboldened to do the same — if not much worse. Their dog whistling is a complete and utter distraction from the fact that Trump has no plans to provide any sensible leadership as our nation's president. | Thanks for reading and taking action with me. It’s time we get back to making progress. — Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: Scott Peters
subject: Happy Pride, San Diego!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter – This upcoming weekend is San Diego Pride, and each year, I am excited to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community and their progress as we continue to fight for the advancement of LGBTQ+ protections.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111727345/558196117/-1353700799?contactdata=UVfm1xjl9Dry6LbEVwD3HhndbwqVWV/1/5RI74Y+69JI5tEVvuzPDjhxjZHu2sKNs5CaIMAnOFa35qJ6mfpl36O3Af2Tlbr3rUu6e/ltHYcYfNryCaWGu983jdEK5qNF&refcode2=509a0200-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode=SP_EM_PT_90DO_230718_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDlhMDIwMC0yMjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lzDn9jcoNYWypwC5kzIRxHF-3PIqDV07iC_Pv_bB2M=&emci=49b843b7-1f64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=509a0200-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5258741)
_Photos from previous years' Pride Parades_
From the beginning of my career in public service, I have made a commitment to the LGBTQ+ community, and I’ve never wavered in that commitment. As San Diego City Council President, I worked to oppose Prop. 8 here in California and I delivered an amicus brief to the Supreme Court against the horribly bigoted Defense of Marriage Act.

During my time in Congress, I passed legislation that would outlaw LGBTQ+ discrimination in the federal workplace and helped lead the charge for the Equality Act, a law that would provide explicit protections against discrimination based on an individual’s sexual orientation or gender identity.

But this fight is more urgent than ever. Conservative-led state legislatures are passing anti-trans laws at an alarming rate, and the Trump Administration is set on rolling back our hard-earned progress on inclusion and equality across the board.

**[We can’t stand by while extremists continue to advance their deeply un-American and hateful agenda. If you’re with me, add your name to stand for LGBTQ+ equality now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111727346/558196118/-1353700799?contactdata=UVfm1xjl9Dry6LbEVwD3HhndbwqVWV/1/5RI74Y+69JI5tEVvuzPDjhxjZHu2sKNs5CaIMAnOFa35qJ6mfpl36O3Af2Tlbr3rUu6e/ltHYcYfNryCaWGu983jdEK5qNF&refcode2=509a0200-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode=SP_EM_PT_90DO_230718_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDlhMDIwMC0yMjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lzDn9jcoNYWypwC5kzIRxHF-3PIqDV07iC_Pv_bB2M=&emci=49b843b7-1f64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=509a0200-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5258741)** | | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111727347/558196119/-1353700799?contactdata=UVfm1xjl9Dry6LbEVwD3HhndbwqVWV/1/5RI74Y+69JI5tEVvuzPDjhxjZHu2sKNs5CaIMAnOFa35qJ6mfpl36O3Af2Tlbr3rUu6e/ltHYcYfNryCaWGu983jdEK5qNF&refcode2=509a0200-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode=SP_EM_PT_90DO_230718_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDlhMDIwMC0yMjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lzDn9jcoNYWypwC5kzIRxHF-3PIqDV07iC_Pv_bB2M=&emci=49b843b7-1f64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=509a0200-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5258741)
---
We must continue to fight for every American’s right to love who they love, marry who they choose, and identify and express themselves authentically. That’s why today, I’m reaffirming my commitment to LGBTQ+ rights. We will not stop until every American has equal protection under the law.

Happy Pride, San Diego. Always celebrate responsibly, and remember to continue the fight for equality for all.

With gratitude,

Scott

|

Today marks the 500th episode of The Sean Spicer Show, I want to thank everyone who made this possible, The First TV, all of our sponsors, and to you for tuning in every night. So, my utmost thanks to everyone that watches and listens, please share with your friends and family as we continue to grow our community. President Trump is winning on a lot of fronts but his approval rating is in tanks right now, what went wrong? Mark Mitchell from Rasmussen Reports is here to unpack it for us. It was June 13th when President Trump hit an all time high in his approval rating and the country headed in the right direction. A month later after the 4th of July weekend, things have changed quite drastically. Voters were ecstatic when DOGE was exposing corruption, fraud, waste and abuse, it was part of the agenda, cleaning out the swamp. Now that Pam Bondi and the DOJ have flip-flopped on the Epstein case, sentiment has changed. The American people are smart, they know there was corruption and they want transparency from this administration. As things look now, even with no messaging or winning policy, Democrats are poised to take back the House in 2026. As media outlets and fake polls in line with Democrats try to fabricate the truth, Mark has real data, polling, reporting and a prescription to turn this all around. This is an opportunity for the White House to fix some botched messaging, get back on track and celebrate all the wins.

**Mark Mitchell**

# [Tomato Tariffs: Take Two](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=168650336&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUwMzM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NzYwODQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ2ODA4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uHD5oB9TzfR7mxIvfnTXvcQgWEzVuB6v-W3XeaIBD8I)
### How a 17% tariff on Mexican tomatoes might impact the pizza business
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Jul 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=168650336&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUwMzM2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Mjg3NjA4NCwiZXhwIjoxNzU1NDY4MDg0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ixAO-Qz46oQLmowFbYL29EGoni6btLYZBhd3JDKrnf4&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=168650336&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUwMzM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NzYwODQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ2ODA4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uHD5oB9TzfR7mxIvfnTXvcQgWEzVuB6v-W3XeaIBD8I&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=168650336&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4NjUwMzM2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTI4NzYwODQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTQ2ODA4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uHD5oB9TzfR7mxIvfnTXvcQgWEzVuB6v-W3XeaIBD8I)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbWFuc2hhcmFtYW5pL3AvdG9tYXRvLXRhcmlmZnMtdGFrZS10d28_.RTOfPfryLqHBa1MIrR1NgONpfi7Vnc8Xd5GwnyAzlME?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/tomato-tariffs-take-two?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/040eadda-c433-4c4d-b0e6-82bba41e0686?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As the founder and chief executive of a [frozen pizza manufacturer](https://substack.com/redirect/d68836bd-8bc1-40f4-8a1e-c99140c9d5b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I closely watch how global events can impact my business. Unsurprisingly, the trade war has been a particular area of my focus. And when the possibility of tomato tariffs arose in April, I did what I have long advised businesses to do when navigating uncertainty: think about scenarios and how the future may unfold, contemplating (before anything happens) how potential developments might impact your business. Then come up with anticipated responses for each scenario.
* * *
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4918ac77-2905-4683-b0bc-66b625994226?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [The Short (and Long) of Trump's Trade War](https://substack.com/redirect/4918ac77-2905-4683-b0bc-66b625994226?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| May 12
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/4918ac77-2905-4683-b0bc-66b625994226?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Back in May, I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/4918ac77-2905-4683-b0bc-66b625994226?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the possibility of the U.S. imposing tariffs on imports from Mexico, including tomatoes. This week saw the realization of that possibility when the U.S. Department of Commerce [announced](https://substack.com/redirect/e844f5e9-2b65-475c-91b0-12a478a0f2a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) sweeping new duties on Mexican products. Imports of tomatoes from Mexico are now subject to a 17 percent tariff.
* * *
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d68836bd-8bc1-40f4-8a1e-c99140c9d5b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [Practicing What I Preach](https://substack.com/redirect/d68836bd-8bc1-40f4-8a1e-c99140c9d5b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Mar 17
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/d68836bd-8bc1-40f4-8a1e-c99140c9d5b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Here at Goodwell Foods, we pride ourselves on making American products, with American ingredients, for American consumers.** We have spent time analyzing our supply chain, looking for vulnerabilities, and making changes or building redundancies to reduce risk and increase our resilience to shocks.
As you can imagine, pizza manufacturing requires a lot of tomatoes. In fact, at Goodwell, we use almost one million pounds of tomato sauce every year. And it takes six million tomatoes to make this sauce. Clearly, then, tomato tariffs will have a dramatic impact on my business, correct? It's obviously going to increase prices and hurt my margins, right?
**Maybe. Maybe not.**
I recently [spoke with a local TV station on this very topic](https://substack.com/redirect/a500fc18-3511-4710-9bd5-901368fa33b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The fact of the matter is, our tomato sauce is made in California, with tomatoes grown in California. Given these tomatoes are not subject to tariffs, there should be no direct impact on my sauce availability or pricing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7a0f07c7-f236-44b4-8020-98458fb48869?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But it's not that simple. You see, most of the tomatoes consumed in the United States are used for salsa and ketchup. Salsa-makers tend to use Mexican tomatoes, as do some ketchup manufacturers (Heinz is a notable exception), while pasta and pizza sauces are mostly made from tomatoes from the Golden State. So though it's true that Mexico [holds](https://substack.com/redirect/3acde302-20e7-4d93-8367-fd473c593454?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 70% of the U.S. tomato market, California [accounts](https://substack.com/redirect/03747449-adcf-446a-bbe3-263cec0e962e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for 90% of all processed tomatoes.
[FOLLOW GOODWELL FOODS](https://substack.com/redirect/0579b5ec-5a3f-45d3-8ec2-e6da1a009193?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As prices rise for those companies that use Mexican tomatoes, they may look to source their tomatoes from domestic supply, and that increased demand against a static supply would likely increase prices. But that's only if supply remains fixed, which is very unlikely. As I have often said, _**the best solution to high prices, is ...high prices**_. Higher prices incentivize more supply, which in the long run will bring down prices.
Florida is one place where that might happen. The [Florida Tomato Exchange](https://substack.com/redirect/dd3684a2-4e5b-4a1e-83c5-68a08b146a90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (FTE) - whose member companies account for 90% of all of the tomatoes grown in Florida - has been a vocal opponent of Mexican imports. [According](https://substack.com/redirect/f55f2c10-99f9-4de7-bdfa-c78e8f29225f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the FTE, Florida and Mexico peak growing seasons overlap, and the NAFTA trade deal resulted in hundreds of growers being put out of business and the Florida tomato industry being cut in half. It will take some time to build back that capacity, but higher prices might encourage investment and expansion.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..XOPD-BGq66ayUtaNTKgr25jnlrN8enUWvAQUNaF0bgU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168650336)
Innovation and adaptation will also help. While most U.S. tomatoes are grown in fields, Mexico uses greenhouses. In fact, according to the USDA, over the past 20 years, greenhouse grown tomatoes have expanded from 14% of imports to 60% today. Domestic greenhouse use has grown somewhat in the same time span, but still only accounts for 12% of all such tomatoes. Making investments and expanding U.S. greenhouse capacity can extend growing seasons and boost yields, shortening the amount of time it would take to increase domestic supply.
And don't discount Americans taking matters into their own hands. Earlier this year when egg prices soared, I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/04e30fec-5180-4302-a303-4b43ee8d20a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about Granite Staters raising their own chickens and selling eggs to their neighbors; one couple even [rented](https://substack.com/redirect/35ed2486-2b9e-4660-8f01-1c278d4a967e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) their chickens out! The same phenomena could play out with tomatoes, which have a lower barrier to entry than chickens. A [local greenhouse](https://substack.com/redirect/209fd163-4e90-4bee-89f2-226133ba3c66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Cincinnati is selling tomato plants and offering to teach customers how to tend them; it estimates that a $4 plant could yield has many as 60 tomatoes.
* * *
[](https://substack.com/redirect/04e30fec-5180-4302-a303-4b43ee8d20a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [Humpty Dumpty Economics](https://substack.com/redirect/04e30fec-5180-4302-a303-4b43ee8d20a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Mar 7
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/04e30fec-5180-4302-a303-4b43ee8d20a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
So, my bet is that any bump in prices will level out in the long run as domestic supply increases. Businesses need to be forward-looking, think in scenarios, and be prepared for all of them, rather than trying to guess which one might come to pass. That's what we did when the specter of tomato tariffs arose back in April, and as a result, we didn't panic when tariffs were announced this week.
_**To thrive (rather than just survive) in times of uncertainty, it 's best to look forward, connect dots, and think in terms of scenarios.**_

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/7710bf41-05f0-4a5f-b9cb-49eded7163b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/247e4c87-5346-4ae6-9459-dc4b13991947?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/05c4350f-86ad-4d80-ab8f-229d453aa81c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

Unsurprisingly, the trade war has been a particular area of my focus. Then come up with anticipated responses for each scenario. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | May 12 | Back in May, I about the possibility of the U.S. imposing tariffs on imports from Mexico, including tomatoes. And it takes six million tomatoes to make this sauce. Clearly, then, tomato tariffs will have a dramatic impact on my business, correct? clean_body: | = I want to share something that says a lot about the kind of campaign we’re building together: Last quarter, the average online contribution to our campaign was $23.03. That's not billionaire cash or corporate PAC money. That’s teachers, farm workers, students, and neighbors chipping in what they can. People who believe we deserve better than broken promises and backroom deals. We are refusing to take money from billionaire special interests or oil lobbyists because we have something more powerful: a real grassroots movement, fueled by real people just like you who know what’s at stake. Meanwhile, my opponent David Valadao is selling out the Central Valley to score points with GOP leadership – voting to strip health care from over 65,000 of his own constituents just to stay in his party’s good graces. Peter ,
Just last week, Donald Trump took to Truth Social to heap praise on Arkansas Senator Tom Cotton, noting that he never lets him down.
And you know what? Trump's not wrong.
Tom Cotton has spent years protecting the powerful, stonewalling investigations, and looking the other way.
Even though he has the power to do something about the Epstein files as Chair of the Senate Republican Caucus, he's not moving a finger.
He's exactly the kind of politician Trump loves: ruthless, secretive, and accountable to no one.
Well, that ends now – because Hallie Shoffner just entered the race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotv-hs-2025?refcode=Email07182025_GOTVPAC&amount=25]
Hallie is an Arkansas farmer taking on Tom Cotton directly, and she's not afraid to challenge the corruption or cowardice that has defined his career.
Will you split a donation between Hallie Shoffner and GOTV PAC to take down Trump's favorite senator? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotv-hs-2025?refcode=Email07182025_GOTVPAC&amount=25]

Here's what you need to know and what you can do to help save the Postal Service.

1\. **The Post Office is enshrined in the US Constitution and created by an act of Congress.** _Trump’s efforts to unilaterally dismantle it are unconstitutional!_

2\. **Privatizing USPS would mean higher costs, slower delivery, and the loss of universal service** — especially for rural communities, seniors, and people with disabilities.

3\. **It’s a threat to our elections.** Millions depend on the USPS to vote by mail. Weakening it makes it harder for everyday Americans to participate in our democracy.

We can’t allow Trump to dismantle the USPS and privatize it completely.

**[As New Dems fight to defend working Americans’ access to the USPS, we need you to have our back! Can you add your name to defend the USPS? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111727792/558197562/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250718_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWMyNTQ5Mi0yMjY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YPr9BxbdtLPXUHcO4kkGy9npgjiDeG7zaDxHZACEb24=&emci=f99096d0-ff63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fec25492-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)**

clean_body: Add your name to protect it >> | Trump is trying to break up the Postal Service and sell it off to private corporations! | Here's what you need to know and what you can do to help save the Postal Service. 1\. The Post Office is enshrined in the US Constitution and created by an act of Congress. Trump’s efforts to unilaterally dismantle it are unconstitutional! 2\. Privatizing USPS would mean higher costs, slower delivery, and the loss of universal service — especially for rural communities, seniors, and people with disabilities. 3\. It’s a threat to our elections. Millions depend on the USPS to vote by mail. Weakening it makes it harder for everyday Americans to participate in our democracy. We can’t allow Trump to dismantle the USPS and privatize it completely. They knew this piece of legislation was deeply unpopular, even with their own voters. But they did it anyway, because they serve Donald Trump and his wealthy friends, not everyday Americans. And now, Mike Johnson and the GOP are doing everything they can to deflect from the consequences. The NRCC is ramping up its attacks on districts like ours — places they must win to keep control of the House and shield themselves from accountability. Peter,

The American people deserve leaders who work for them, not their stock portfolios.

Seth is the leader in the fight to ban members of Congress from trading stocks.

You sent Seth to Congress to fight for Rhode Islanders. To fight for policies that defend the working class. And now, we must fight back against corruption on the inside. **_[If you’re with Seth, can you sign on to stand with him today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111728406/558199494/1362702349?source=EM_NBI_SM_20250719_PT_Stocks_0_6MO_TeamMagaziner_NA_NA_CongressionalTrading&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjU1NjU4Mi0yNDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHi8MQfj5w-8x3ebu2cB6l_9r5D_y6lPUZd1IUiimtU=&emci=00556582-2464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=06556582-2464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15384964)_** | | [STAND WITH SETH](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111728407/558199495/1362702349?source=EM_NBI_SM_20250719_PT_Stocks_0_6MO_TeamMagaziner_NA_NA_CongressionalTrading&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjU1NjU4Mi0yNDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iHi8MQfj5w-8x3ebu2cB6l_9r5D_y6lPUZd1IUiimtU=&emci=00556582-2464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=06556582-2464-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15384964)

Piers Morgan **[humiliated washed up liberal talk show host Joy Reid](https://substack.com/redirect/041d8539-e586-4a6f-be32-7bd947253d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a very fiery interview, calling her out for "racializing everything" and losing the trust and interest of her audience on MSNBC.
Watch the clash here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/041d8539-e586-4a6f-be32-7bd947253d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9e64a266-8417-4b52-942c-af77ef19c594?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Firing Dispute:** Morgan directly challenged Reid's claim that she was fired from MSNBC for being a Black woman, arguing instead that **["your show just got increasingly unpopular"](https://substack.com/redirect/041d8539-e586-4a6f-be32-7bd947253d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with ratings dropping 28% from 1.3 million viewers in February 2024 to 973,000 in February 2025. Reid's show "The ReidOut" was canceled in February as part of a larger network shakeup.
* **Race Card Accusations:** When Morgan accused Reid of playing "the race card" instead of acknowledging rating struggles, she fired back that he was "fixated on trying to racialize conversations" and called his accusation "your version of the race card." Morgan interrupted, saying "You racialize more conversations in your tenure at MSNBC than any host in history."
* **[Heated Clash:](https://substack.com/redirect/041d8539-e586-4a6f-be32-7bd947253d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Reid accused Morgan, a "White European," of having double standards when "people of color" discuss race, while Morgan shot back "You racialize everything, Joy... It's not my schtick, it was your schtick, but people got bored with it." The contentious interview also included Morgan confronting Reid about a 2018 controversy over homophobic posts from her old blog.

[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9e64a266-8417-4b52-942c-af77ef19c594?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# 3rd Biden aide pleas the Fifth in Republican probe to investigate Biden mental decline cover-up
A former top aide to Joe Biden **[invoked her Fifth Amendment](https://substack.com/redirect/ec444cfe-e7ad-4a11-9ff6-c8553369ec01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** right during a closed-door deposition Friday, intensifying Republican-led efforts to investigate the former president's cognitive decline and handling of classified documents.
* **Annie Tomasini, Biden 's **former deputy chief of staff, declined to answer questions from the House Oversight Committee about whether the White House instructed her to mislead the public on the Biden's health or conceal sensitive government records. She is the third ex-aide to take the Fifth in the case.
* **Tomasini previously helped inventory documents** at the Penn Biden Center, where classified materials from Biden's time as vice president were later discovered. Her testimony follows that of Jill Biden's former chief of staff Anthony Bernal and the president's personal physician Kevin O'Connor, both of whom also refused to answer key questions under oath.
* **" There is now a pattern of key Biden confidants seeking to shield themselves** from criminal liability for this potential conspiracy," Oversight Chair James Comer (R-Ky.) said, who has suggested the committee may soon call Biden family members to testify.
* **A wave of former White House staffers,** including ex-press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre and chief of staff Jeff Zients, are scheduled for transcribed interviews through September. Republicans are also hoping to unravel the use of the presidential autopen, which they say may have been used improperly to sign last-minute pardons under the Biden administration.
* **The investigation gained momentum** after Special Counsel Robert Hur's February report concluded that Biden "willfully" retained classified documents but declined to charge him, citing concerns a jury would view the president as a "well-meaning elderly man with a poor memory."

* * *
# Anti-Israel protestor gets SLAMMED by Tour de France bodyguard after charging onto the course
A **[pro-Palestinian protester was removed from the Tour de France](https://substack.com/redirect/1e587fb0-4d87-418a-a78c-5692d31d6d0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** course Wednesday after sprinting onto the track near the finish line to denounce the participation of an Israeli-registered cycling team.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/78af8097-9bb9-457f-a70c-7e33f579e122?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **The man, wearing a shirt reading "Israel out of the Tour"** and holding a keffiyeh, ran alongside cyclists 25 meters from the Stage 11 finish before a security guard tackled him, shoved him into a barrier, and threw him over a wall into the crowd. The incident occurred as Norway's Jonas Abrahamsen narrowly defeated Switzerland's Mauro Schmid.
* **The protest appeared to target the Israel Premier-Tech team** , an Israel team in this year's race, despite fielding no Israeli riders. The group, Boycott Divestment and Sanctions (BDS) has called the Israel team "Team Genocide" and encouraged protests.
* "**We call for more peaceful protests than ever, " BDS said** earlier this year, citing the team's appearances in the Tour de France, Giro d'Italia, and Vuelta a España. The Tour concludes in Paris on July 27, following 21 stages across the French countryside.

* * *
# "Ridiculous": Speaker Mike Johnson BASHES WSJ reports about Trump Epstein connection
House Speaker Mike Johnson on Friday dismissed a _Wall Street Journal_ article alleging that President Donald **[Trump sent Jeffrey Epstein a lewd birthday letter](https://substack.com/redirect/054f8539-624a-4b60-96ce-f0e1f13719fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in 2003, calling the story "bogus" and part of a media effort to damage Trump's reputation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6077fec5-7150-423e-87be-36825afa01b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The** _**WSJ**_**report[claimed](https://substack.com/redirect/83568269-6ebe-4395-bf65-064597b55615?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump sent Epstein** a birthday message along with a drawing of a naked stick figure woman signed with Trump's initials. Trump has denied authoring or sending the note: "I never wrote a picture in my life... It's not my language. It's not my words."
* **" The president and I talked about** that ridiculous allegation this morning," Johnson said on CNBC's _Squawk Box._ "He's never drawn such a picture, he's never thought of drawing such a picture... [WSJ] is literally making things up."
* **Trump and his allies, including Vice President J.D. Vance** , have called the report false and defamatory. Trump has threatened to sue _The Wall Street Journal_ , its parent company News Corp, and Rupert Murdoch over what he called a "fake thing."
* **The renewed focus on Trump 's past ties to Epstein** comes amid political tensions over efforts to release files related to Epstein's criminal history. Trump has acknowledged a former friendship with Epstein but said the two cut ties in 2004. Epstein died by suicide in federal custody in 2019, according to the Justice Department. Trump has urged Attorney General Pam Bondi to release grand jury transcripts, pending court approval.

* * *
# Active-Duty military get pay bump in SWEEPING new bill
The House of Representatives **[passed a sweeping $832 billion defense appropriations bill](https://substack.com/redirect/99916bd8-ffea-4389-9e8b-b877529b582f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** early Friday for fiscal year 2026, approving a pay raise for U.S. service members and increased funding for research and development despite some bipartisan clashes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/99916bd8-ffea-4389-9e8b-b877529b582f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The bill passed in a 221-209 vote** , with five Democrats--Reps. Don Davis (N.C.), Jared Golden (Maine), Vicente Gonzalez (Texas), Adam Gray (Calif.), and Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (Wash.)--joining nearly all Republicans in support.
* **The package includes a 3.8% pay bump for active-duty,** National Guard, and reserve troops, $148 billion for Pentagon research and development, and $1.15 billion for counter-drug and trafficking efforts.
* **A bipartisan effort** to strip $500 million from Israel's missile defense partnership failed 422-6, with both right-wing Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene and progressive "Squad" members backing the attempt.
* **The measure also cuts $7 billion** from operations and maintenance, reducing that portion of the budget to $283 billion. House Armed Services Chair Mike Rogers (R-Ala.) called the bill a major step in "modernization" and "cutting red tape." The bill now moves to the Senate, which advanced its own version July 9.

All you need to do is welcome it into your life. 3rd Biden aide pleas the Fifth in Republican probe to investigate Biden mental decline cover-up A former top aide to Joe Biden right during a closed-door deposition Friday, intensifying Republican-led efforts to investigate the former president's cognitive decline and handling of classified documents. Annie Tomasini, Biden 's former deputy chief of staff, declined to answer questions from the House Oversight Committee about whether the White House instructed her to mislead the public on the Biden's health or conceal sensitive government records. She is the third ex-aide to take the Fifth in the case. Tomasini previously helped inventory documents at the Penn Biden Center, where classified materials from Biden's time as vice president were later discovered. Her testimony follows that of Jill Biden's former chief of staff Anthony Bernal and the president's personal physician Kevin O'Connor, both of whom also refused to answer key questions under oath. " There is now a pattern of key Biden confidants seeking to shield themselves from criminal liability for this potential conspiracy," Oversight Chair James Comer (R-Ky.) said, who has suggested the committee may soon call Biden family members to testify. A wave of former White House staffers, including ex-press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre and chief of staff Jeff Zients, are scheduled for transcribed interviews through September. Republicans are also hoping to unravel the use of the presidential autopen, which they say may have been used improperly to sign last-minute pardons under the Biden administration. The investigation gained momentum after Special Counsel Robert Hur's February report concluded that Biden "willfully" retained classified documents but declined to charge him, citing concerns a jury would view the president as a "well-meaning elderly man with a poor memory." Anti-Israel protestor gets SLAMMED by Tour de France bodyguard after charging onto the course A course Wednesday after sprinting onto the track near the finish line to denounce the participation of an Israeli-registered cycling team. The man, wearing a shirt reading "Israel out of the Tour" and holding a keffiyeh, ran alongside cyclists 25 meters from the Stage 11 finish before a security guard tackled him, shoved him into a barrier, and threw him over a wall into the crowd. The incident occurred as Norway's Jonas Abrahamsen narrowly defeated Switzerland's Mauro Schmid. The protest appeared to target the Israel Premier-Tech team , an Israel team in this year's race, despite fielding no Israeli riders. The group, Boycott Divestment and Sanctions (BDS) has called the Israel team "Team Genocide" and encouraged protests. "We call for more peaceful protests than ever, " BDS said earlier this year, citing the team's appearances in the Tour de France, Giro d'Italia, and Vuelta a España. The Tour concludes in Paris on July 27, following 21 stages across the French countryside. "Ridiculous": Speaker Mike Johnson BASHES WSJ reports about Trump Epstein connection House Speaker Mike Johnson on Friday dismissed a Wall Street Journal article alleging that President Donald in 2003, calling the story "bogus" and part of a media effort to damage Trump's reputation. | | ---|---|--- The WSJreport Trump sent Epstein a birthday message along with a drawing of a naked stick figure woman signed with Trump's initials. Trump has denied authoring or sending the note: "I never wrote a picture in my life... It's not my language. It's not my words." " The president and I talked about that ridiculous allegation this morning," Johnson said on CNBC's Squawk Box. "He's never drawn such a picture, he's never thought of drawing such a picture... [WSJ] is literally making things up." Trump and his allies, including Vice President J.D. Vance , have called the report false and defamatory. Trump has threatened to sue The Wall Street Journal , its parent company News Corp, and Rupert Murdoch over what he called a "fake thing." The renewed focus on Trump 's past ties to Epstein comes amid political tensions over efforts to release files related to Epstein's criminal history. Trump has acknowledged a former friendship with Epstein but said the two cut ties in 2004. Epstein died by suicide in federal custody in 2019, according to the Justice Department. Trump has urged Attorney General Pam Bondi to release grand jury transcripts, pending court approval. Active-Duty military get pay bump in SWEEPING new bill The House of Representatives early Friday for fiscal year 2026, approving a pay raise for U.S. service members and increased funding for research and development despite some bipartisan clashes. | | ---|---|--- The bill passed in a 221-209 vote , with five Democrats--Reps. Don Davis (N.C.), Jared Golden (Maine), Vicente Gonzalez (Texas), Adam Gray (Calif.), and Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (Wash.)--joining nearly all Republicans in support. The package includes a 3.8% pay bump for active-duty, National Guard, and reserve troops, $148 billion for Pentagon research and development, and $1.15 billion for counter-drug and trafficking efforts. A bipartisan effort to strip $500 million from Israel's missile defense partnership failed 422-6, with both right-wing Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene and progressive "Squad" members backing the attempt. The measure also cuts $7 billion from operations and maintenance, reducing that portion of the budget to $283 billion. House Armed Services Chair Mike Rogers (R-Ala.) called the bill a major step in "modernization" and "cutting red tape." The bill now moves to the Senate, which advanced its own version July 9. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. subject: are you getting our emails, friend?

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23221%2E4449941%2EsNBIwj) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23221%2E4449941%2EsNBIwj) Are you getting our emails, friend?

...Because if D.C. became the 51st state, we’d gain two more Democratic Senators – _we’d have a clear path to the Senate Majority!!_ [**Maybe we were wrong. Maybe you don’t care. Fight for Reform

— FORWARDED MESSAGE —

**Listen up:**
**WE TOLD YOU:** Pete Buttigieg, Jamie Raskin, Jasmine Crockett, Joe Biden, and Elizabeth Warren all want Washington, DC to become the 51st STATE!

**WE TOLD YOU:** If DC became the 51st state, 700,000 Americans would get representation in Congress AND we’d gain 2 more Democratic Senators!

**WE TOLD YOU:** Donald Trump and the GOP HATE the idea of DC becoming a state because it would **WRECK their far-right agenda.** **So, we’re rushing to gather 20,000 signatures before 11:59 PM so that we can reach our goal and PRESSURE CONGRESS TO MAKE DC THE 51ST STATE!**

DC has a larger population than Vermont and Wyoming but they have absolutely 0 voting representation in Congress... It's disgusting!

**Trump and his GOP are opposed to DC Statehood because they’re afraid of Democracy and giving power back to the people!**

But, we can’t stand by and idly watch for another second, that’s why we’re penning a massive petition.
[**20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: Add your name to our MASSIVE petition to demand Congress make DC the 51st state! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64532?t=9&akid=23221%2E4449941%2EsNBIwj) [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64532?t=10&akid=23221%2E4449941%2EsNBIwj)

We discussed the victories Democrats are having in resisting the MAGA agenda in their states and how grassroots investments fuel that work. [If that’s all you need to hear, you can click here to take a stand against Trump’s MAGA agenda and fight for our shared future by making a donation to the DLCC.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDgicZfgb3kpC3Q-b6VCjsBegR2hJM7a9kkKdh475zeHqVEtgIwtNuDd7N5qkBJ8W12y6gRAWviRKNZW6lWX4sFH9R74mk2VVE4Kc25vlgcgGWSOg7kiVMm-UgSPhbNslOiFisjQr8Qc8FngDj3rIwer42DotyJenxHVhsHNurxRp2mgDSwTFEcOaKfu50Sjt_DjW644_x109S6YouhdqSOVA93pqunt1eV3zsOdwoFxbb6e1ZLA2hoKFLxcG9lxpuat5QyJ1qDbRzTx6K1_FdMpWZ7QYWrAVobo_wOEB140zE0LjlfaWZDD7RSxU6P2O-8lYeJZV3FtzpT0D1VhxdfOAT-AQL-D2EEFCG2-OWsVL15GYoHe-iKFxugG4Gw3JtLU6Gy70bHqURTTGOSVeLSsBL3Hgp6pX9_PVtpsTL7fZkFpQUgyz6bIkUHFhCegt0wzy0tn_5IEt8yubjqNDt-MXJ_f3xZ6JVc9qHQ1j40qA6TQFOYil2c6waQp6hHLl_bYuUJHzy2i1Ue633gABdmQ/4ia/OuNLd30GSFSUSDpLmmKZYg/h1/h001.BtWvvOZBkb7NcL1TaIOTCpVvEkeodm65llLbxegmDsA) Cycle after cycle, donations have helped elect Democratic leaders to our statehouses who act as a firewall against Trump’s agenda. But here’s the truth: we’ve seen a steep drop in contributions, putting critical strategic investments and long-term plans in jeopardy. **As Trump tests the limits of his power and our democracy, cuts funding for the Department of Education, slashes Medicaid, and silences dissent, the real power to fight his extremism is in our state legislatures.** **The DLCC’s goal is to build Democratic power where it matters most – in our statehouses.** We are doing everything to ensure state Democrats have the resources to defeat right-wing extremists nationwide. Our power becomes increasingly limited when we fall short of our fundraising targets. Winning depends on the work we do together _right now._ The DLCC is leading the strategy to win our state capitols. We fuel thousands of Democratic candidates across all 50 states who are standing up to Trump’s anti-American agenda. Without adequate support at the state level, GOP megadonors could flood elections that are meant to represent _your_ interests with _their_ MAGA millions. We cannot let this moment pass us by. That’s why I’m personally calling on supporters like you to help fund the DLCC’s operation to elect state Democrats. [I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t necessary.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDgicZfgb3kpC3Q-b6VCjsBegR2hJM7a9kkKdh475zeHqVEtgIwtNuDd7N5qkBJ8W12y6gRAWviRKNZW6lWX4sFH9R74mk2VVE4Kc25vlgcgGWSOg7kiVMm-UgSPhbNslOiFisjQr8Qc8FngDj3rIwer42DotyJenxHVhsHNurxRrDVrkl_bfnBIhO83xR08o-FTWdUDn1QErxGgGIc8aYnu8JoaA8VkTJ3lxyghsJu_5YDE-4a9RDa_KzxQQyiSdJUweyQLLB4cWRvqqjwLs0XrWTqVuxzxpwkn94J5sTl8fAYAjniPOdYjLGcKKyWjGUdVcgK7heRD6zRA1ViLd5k67ZIG8S0aNsNnm6O96YmOCA0VbtXSrEQcP83RJQZdqb_BogXZixbxk0N0umG1EPvmQEnTNTngbn9QOrROKBMHqvMTOPu-N38ou-h9Zud9U59iJ7s5I1AdeHNRIa473f2HV0oD3aXKyk9eRvgN5nH67aYDpZYoZvw3ih-OlSS11Bg8bQ3z3dEiaA8non1igGcg/4ia/OuNLd30GSFSUSDpLmmKZYg/h2/h001.EAom1pjK8OxfxYT0ULBm4Sc4FaXXcvtGghqnQ2Zjw7Q)[ I’m counting on you to own a piece of this fight, help our party compete against GOP spending, and lead state Dems to victory with a $7 donation. clean_body: Last week’s Down Ballot Defenders Summit was an incredible opportunity to hear about the DLCC’s mission to build Democratic power where it matters most – in the states. Can you help keep up the fight? | | | | | ---|--- Last week, I had the opportunity to lead our first-ever Down Ballot Defenders Summit – an exclusive event for grassroots supporters like you. During the event, I was joined by four incredible legislators and hundreds of grassroots supporters from across the country. We discussed the victories Democrats are having in resisting the MAGA agenda in their states and how grassroots investments fuel that work. Cycle after cycle, donations have helped elect Democratic leaders to our statehouses who act as a firewall against Trump’s agenda. But here’s the truth: we’ve seen a steep drop in contributions, putting critical strategic investments and long-term plans in jeopardy. As Trump tests the limits of his power and our democracy, cuts funding for the Department of Education, slashes Medicaid, and silences dissent, the real power to fight his extremism is in our state legislatures. The DLCC’s goal is to build Democratic power where it matters most – in our statehouses. We are doing everything to ensure state Democrats have the resources to defeat right-wing extremists nationwide. Our power becomes increasingly limited when we fall short of our fundraising targets. Winning depends on the work we do together right now. The DLCC is leading the strategy to win our state capitols. We fuel thousands of Democratic candidates across all 50 states who are standing up to Trump’s anti-American agenda. Without adequate support at the state level, GOP megadonors could flood elections that are meant to represent your interests with their MAGA millions. We cannot let this moment pass us by. That’s why I’m personally calling on supporters like you to help fund the DLCC’s operation to elect state Democrats. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | In solidarity, Heather Heather Williams President Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. U.S. Senators Katie Britt and Tommy Tuberville joined their Republicans colleagues in passing targeted spending cuts that were recommended by the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

“This is a common sense approach,” Britt (R-Montgomery) told Fox News before the final vote.

“This money was way outside of the mission of what it was intended for. We’ve got to rein that in. We have to cement our values and our opportunity for our people. To your point, this is the easy stuff and the American people deserve better. This is their money, this is not ours and we’ve got to treat it like such and we’ve got to be more responsible.”

Alabama's two U.S. Senators joined forces this week to send President Donald Trump a letter requesting that his administration rescind the Biden administration’s final rule mandating Project Labor Agreements for federal construction projects.

In December 2023, the Biden administration published in the Federal Register the Federal Acquisition Regulatory Council’s final rule, Use of Project Labor Agreements for Federal Construction Projects. The rule applies to large-scale federal construction projects valued at $35 million and would severely hinder merit-based competition, costing taxpayers billions of dollars annually.

WASHINGTON, D.C. (WKRG) — A bill introduced by Senator Katie Britt (R-Ala.), and passed by the Senate, is aimed at protecting local fishermen from illegally caught fish being sold in the U.S. According to a news release from Britt’s office, the Illegal Red Snapper and Tuna Enforcement Act, co-sponsored by Commerce Committee Chairman Ted Cruz (R-Texas) and senators Tommy Tuberville (R-Ala.) and Brian Schatz (D-Hawaii), instructs the National Institute of Standards and Technology and the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration to create a standard method of identifying the country of origin for red snapper and some species of tuna that is imported into the United States.

---

clean_body: | | | | | Official Team Britt Newsletter | | U.S. Senators Katie Britt and Tommy Tuberville joined their Republicans colleagues in passing targeted spending cuts that were recommended by the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). “This is a common sense approach,” Britt (R-Montgomery) told Fox News before the final vote. “This money was way outside of the mission of what it was intended for. We’ve got to rein that in. We have to cement our values and our opportunity for our people. To your point, this is the easy stuff and the American people deserve better. This is their money, this is not ours and we’ve got to treat it like such and we’ve got to be more responsible.” | | Alabama's two U.S. Senators joined forces this week to send President Donald Trump a letter requesting that his administration rescind the Biden administration’s final rule mandating Project Labor Agreements for federal construction projects. In December 2023, the Biden administration published in the Federal Register the Federal Acquisition Regulatory Council’s final rule, Use of Project Labor Agreements for Federal Construction Projects. The rule applies to large-scale federal construction projects valued at $35 million and would severely hinder merit-based competition, costing taxpayers billions of dollars annually. | | WASHINGTON, D.C. (WKRG) — A bill introduced by Senator Katie Britt (R-Ala.), and passed by the Senate, is aimed at protecting local fishermen from illegally caught fish being sold in the U.S. According to a news release from Britt’s office, the Illegal Red Snapper and Tuna Enforcement Act, co-sponsored by Commerce Committee Chairman Ted Cruz (R-Texas) and senators Tommy Tuberville (R-Ala.) and Brian Schatz (D-Hawaii), instructs the National Institute of Standards and Technology and the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration to create a standard method of identifying the country of origin for red snapper and some species of tuna that is imported into the United States. | | | | | | | | | Gulf of America Hat Celebrate conservative leadership and show your patriotism with this unique, high quality, Made-in-America hat. | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 By texting KATIE, you consent to join a recurring SMS/MMS text messaging program that will provide alerts, donation requests, updates, and other important information. body:

Trump’s Medicaid cuts aren’t just cruel – they’re expensive.

Trump’s “Big Ugly Bill” will impact every single Michigander. Here are the facts:
* Medicaid covers **2.6 million people in Michigan** – that’s 1 in 4 residents, including children, people with disabilities, and working families.
* In some rural communities, **more than 40% of the population relies on Medicaid.**
* Our state received **$17.5 billion** in federal Medicaid funding in 2023. That funding is now being slashed.

Let’s call this bill what it is: **a massive redistribution of wealth from the middle class to the ultra-wealthy.** As the country faces an affordability crisis, this is the _last_ thing Michiganders need.

[_**I’m fighting back, but I need you with me. Holding this seat is key to flipping Michigan blue and standing up to Trump’s billionaire first agenda. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Stephen Colbert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2600%2E4032634%2EV-83nE)
---
This week, I introduced my Presidential Library Anti-Corruption Act. This plan would ban companies and governments from donating unrestricted funds to the presidential libraries of sitting presidents. There’s something else that happened this week that highlighted the implications of these types of donations, and I want to talk about it. **It was just announced that CBS has canceled “The Late Show with Stephen Colbert” starting next year. This announcement comes just _three days_ after Colbert called out CBS parent company Paramount for an over $16 million settlement with Trump — a deal that looks like bribery.** This $16 million settlement funneled to a future presidential library is what my anti-corruption bill would prevent if it becomes the law. You see, this all started when the Trump administration sued CBS, which is owned by Paramount, over a “60 Minutes” interview Trump claimed was deceptively edited. This was a suit that many experts called “baseless.” CBS even said it was “meritless.” It just so happens that, at the same time, Paramount is waiting on approval from the Trump administration for a multi-billion-dollar merger with Skydance. Maybe they'll get the approval, and maybe they won't, and there are a lot of factors that go into that. Ultimately, Paramount decided to opt for a bogus settlement worth $16 million, with the money funneling straight into Trump’s future library. That looks like bribery right out in the open to a lot of people — including Stephen Colbert. America deserves to know if his show was canceled for political reasons. And we need to pass my Presidential Library Anti-Corruption Act to put an end to these types of donations. This settlement sends a terrible signal. It tells everyone who has business pending in front of the federal government that if they've got enough money and can funnel it to Donald Trump through his future presidential library, they might receive better treatment from the U.S. government. That's wrong, and we need to put a stop to it now. I won’t stop fighting to put these common-sense safeguards in place and get corruption out of our government. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

clean_body: Urgent new effort to stop attacks on Medicaid. | Senator Gillibrand to FIGHT back against Trump's Medicaid cuts We’ll keep this petition open for a limited time for maximum impact — if you haven’t signed yet, this is your moment. | | Donald Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” will deliver devastating cuts to Medicaid. Millions of Americans will lose their health care, and costs will skyrocket. In the face of this chaos, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand isn’t backing down. As Chair of the DSCC, she’s leading the charge to protect health care access and stop Trump’s devastating cuts in their tracks. This fight can’t wait. We need 10,000 supporters to stand with Senator Gillibrand before midnight to show the strength of our movement. | Senator Gillibrand is pushing forward, but she can’t do it alone. The more voices we have behind this petition, the stronger our message: Hands off Medicaid. Add your name to stand with Senator Gillibrand in the collective fight against Trump's attacks on Medicaid: The time to act is now. — Team Gillibrand * =

Friends, The fight to reclaim our Republic starts with truth and action. That’s why I wrote _Heirs of the Revolution: Our Civic Duty to Restore Our Republic_. It’s a call to arms for every American who believes we’ve strayed too far from our founding principles, and a roadmap for how President Donald Trump is fixing it. This book is already drawing attention from conservative leaders across the country. In addition to Kash Patel, I’m honored to have received endorsements from:

Now, I’m asking for your help. We are so close to making _Heirs of the Revolution_ a national bestseller. body:
When Republicans rammed through their bill that guts health care and forces folks to pay more for basic goods, they ignored people like you
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111730271/558205482/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZhNTYwYS0yZDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TmoIlgop4z0PWa9Z6LGBQneRwIGUU79rVh2Gz-IoYc=&emci=499a0200-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=61fa560a-2d64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | When Republicans rammed through their budget bill (the one they called big and beautiful – I guess that's how they characterize kicking millions off health insurance and making middle-class families pay more for groceries and energy bills) they ignored the voices of **people like you.** They buried their heads in the sand as their offices were flooded with phone calls and pleas not to pass their budget bill. They either dodged town halls, or callously dismissed the concerns of their constituents when confronted. They told folks worried about Medicaid cuts, "we all are going to die" or to "get over it." **The GOP may as well have pretended that the people actually hurt by their legislation don't exist.** So I want to elevate your voices. I want to highlight the thoughts, the worries, and the fears you have about what this bill means for your future – and the future of your neighbors, your friends, and your communities. [**When you have a minute, please tell me your thoughts about the GOP's budget.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111730272/558205483/123416034?ms=2025-07-18-voices&refcode=2025-07-18-voices&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZhNTYwYS0yZDY0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0TmoIlgop4z0PWa9Z6LGBQneRwIGUU79rVh2Gz-IoYc=&emci=499a0200-2264-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=61fa560a-2d64-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364) In the coming days, we'll amplify some of your stories to remind Republicans about the real consequences of their bill. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Epstein cover-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, Donald Trump, Pam Bondi, and this corrupt administration are leading a massive cover-up to protect the ultra-wealthy. Despite their promises to release the full list of Jeffrey Epstein’s former clients, Donald Trump and his administration are now blocking the release of that list — claiming that the scandal is “boring” and “bullshit.” _What made them change their tune?_ For years, Trump and Republicans have demanded answers and accountability. This week, House Republicans had the chance to keep their promise to the American people when the House voted on a resolution that would have forced Attorney General Pam Bondi to release the list. **Instead, they blocked the resolution.** It’s clear who they’re trying to protect. After handing billionaires a massive tax break, Republicans are now using your tax dollars to shield the same wealthy elite from accountability for their heinous, disgusting crimes against children. **[The American people deserve the truth. No one should be above the law — no matter how powerful. clean_body: | Peter, Donald Trump, Pam Bondi, and this corrupt administration are leading a massive cover-up to protect the ultra-wealthy. Despite their promises to release the full list of Jeffrey Epstein’s former clients, Donald Trump and his administration are now blocking the release of that list — claiming that the scandal is “boring” and “bullshit.” What made them change their tune? For years, Trump and Republicans have demanded answers and accountability. This week, House Republicans had the chance to keep their promise to the American people when the House voted on a resolution that would have forced Attorney General Pam Bondi to release the list. Instead, they blocked the resolution. It’s clear who they’re trying to protect. After handing billionaires a massive tax break, Republicans are now using your tax dollars to shield the same wealthy elite from accountability for their heinous, disgusting crimes against children. | Thanks, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Did you see what happened, team?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Team,
I need you to understand what just happened.
The Republican Attorneys General Association — RAGA — just dumped TWO MILLION DOLLARS into Virginia to prop up Jason Miyares.
Let me be crystal clear: This is more money than any GOP committee has spent on ANY statewide race in Virginia this year.
They're not doing this because they're confident. They're doing this because they're terrified .
Here's why: I'm running to be Virginia's next Attorney General, and unlike Miyares — who has pledged his loyalty to Trump at the expense of our families — I'll actually stand up for Virginians.
If you're ready to fight back against this $2 million MAGA money bomb, rush $25 to my campaign right now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]
Chip in to Fight Back → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Look, before I decided to run for Attorney General, I spent my career as a public servant and lawyer fighting for justice for our communities. I've taken on corruption. I've fought for working families. I've stood up to powerful interests who thought they were above the law.
I know what it looks like when the powerful try to buy their way out of accountability.
That's exactly what's happening here.
These MAGA donors are dumping truckloads of money into this race because they know Jason Miyares will be a reliable foot soldier for Donald Trump's agenda.
While Trump weaponizes the Justice Department against his enemies, while he pardons violent criminals who attacked our democracy, while he shreds the rule of law — Miyares isn’t just staying silent – he’s enabling Trump every step of the way.
But here's the thing: We've beaten these odds before.
Here's our path to victory: We're going to out-organize them in every corner of Virginia. We're going to knock on more doors, make more calls, and mobilize more voters than they think possible. But to fight back against $2 million in new attacks, I need your help right now. Can you rush $25 — or whatever you can afford — to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=250]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Donald Trump is using the full weight of the federal government to hurt states like Virginia. He's already firing federal workers, threatening to withhold disaster aid, and attacking reproductive rights.
Virginia needs an Attorney General who will stand up to these attacks. Not roll over for them.
But first, we have to win this race.
RAGA's $2 million is just the beginning. They'll spend whatever it takes to keep their MAGA loyalist in Richmond.
And you — right now — get to decide whether we fight back or let them buy this election.I know which side I'm on. Please join me.
— Jay Jones
P.S. — They think $2 million can silence our movement. Let's show them how wrong they are. Here’s the link to make a donation: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=25]

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

name: Josh Poppins
subject: Practically perfect in every primary ☂️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
It takes a lot to run a U.S. Senate campaign in Florida. Grit, optimism, and sometimes... a well-timed umbrella. Rain or shine, I’m showing up, knocking doors, and talking with voters who are ready for a change.
If you saw this and thought, “Is that Josh Weil or Mary Poppins?” I hope it is because you recognize this campaign does have some magic in it, Friend.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4D3575364258784965754457326D4D674978595267472F486E39657043412B784D4259713450362B43624D2B50697051716241392F6C2B41643748515A746232/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-18%20at%2012.14.54%E2%80%AFPM.png]
But we’re not floating in on a magic umbrella. This campaign is powered by people. Real Floridians chipping in to build a government that works for us , not just for billionaires and lobbyists.
So while this photo might be a bit of fun, the stakes are serious this election, and I’m counting on you to help us soar. I’m spreading our word all over Florida, for teachers, veterans, and every hardworking American that has been done wrong by our government.
Can you chip in today and help us keep this momentum going?
Every dollar keeps us moving ( with or without the umbrella.)
Rush a $10 donation today and help this campaign take flight!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
It’s you and me, that is the real magic.
Let’s get to work,
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: This is an abuse of power
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=4ALfDuqI%2BU7p0%2BjLUd%2B8iWeM%2FSU4xUoBARJMQJI0ZlgriV%2B9QrI2svJ4tgPEgbR9jkiJlR%2BUobQPWlMmPR26YeCIIVMpyzF7YDnQ%2Bq1we616wiVJa%2B9XLFdyMhIWsiCCr%2FFOiPlcxVq31j9A%2F8OepBPM7ZW0GlV0qhmWo1SlKkgQUpJgaszCebmqfFlHPptBuQ8UiuqfHVOY48gCYsjqpQVo1XwJ2CJTwY8lljC6F6kTJzpzc3bXerPx7wrQBtNOEV4H25J3%2BpMZcs3BXIOi03veEFUgsJ9gD1QIsCSfYRAgUaqaN7J09GEIi9VJY%2F292RNn164t9Z2tBSPNxHkWjPjHVA7QU0YJf4PaRI8bkixxmAKBkdFdC1%2FXcFZGyJDk6esUlHsCdTC9dI9RS6w6dXuZ9bdMyvk8rf%2F4HgX%2Bt6U1BtY0zua4xvePVZVsrrUc]

# [#]
For weeks, I’ve been trying to schedule an oversight visit to the Adelanto ICE facility. As a Member of Congress, I have a legal and constitutional obligation to ensure that people in our district are not being subjected to inhumane conditions.

But the Department of Homeland Security, under Donald Trump’s leadership, has repeatedly stonewalled me.

DHS has continuously changed their policies, delayed our requests, and made excuse after excuse to prevent me and other Democratic Members of Congress from entering the facility.

I don’t need permission from DHS to do my job.

Congress has a constitutional right to conduct oversight. The Trump administration’s attempt to block us is not just unacceptable — it’s unlawful.

Blocking Members of Congress from overseeing ICE detention facilities doesn’t fix any issues at the border, it doesn’t make our communities safer, and it sure doesn’t create solutions. What it does do is chip away at our democracy and puts all of our civil liberties at risk.

Trump and his allies are using federal agencies to avoid scrutiny and punish their political opponents. They want to hide what’s happening behind closed doors — and silence those of us fighting to expose it.

We won’t be intimidated. But I need your help.

Because I am standing up to Trump, his supporters have put me on the target list. MAGA is actively preparing to unseat me in the Midterm Elections, but Team Ruiz is fighting back.

I’m committed to standing up to this dangerous overreach — but I can’t do it alone. Will you contribute $10 to help power our fight for accountability and protect the future of our democracy? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-july25?amount=10&refcode=SBD_RR_EM_FR_071825_DETENTIONCENTER_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1

Thank you for standing with me,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer] CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer?recurring=true&amount=25] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer?recurring=true&amount=25]
[https://drraulruiz.com/] LEARN MORE » [https://drraulruiz.com/]
PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE

Because I am standing up to Trump, his supporters have put me on the target list. MAGA is actively preparing to unseat me in the Midterm Elections, but Team Ruiz is fighting back. I’m committed to standing up to this dangerous overreach — but I can’t do it alone. Will you contribute $10 to help power our fight for accountability and protect the future of our democracy? >> Thank you for standing with me, Raul [] [] [] [] The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress. [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: unsubscribe: You can also click here to donate [] . Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: The Democratic Party
subject: What you can do about Republicans stealing five seats:
body:
---
Derek, Have you heard about what Republicans are trying to do in Texas? Here’s what’s going on and **[what you can do to help:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250718_3995_fr&refcode2=3995_22930333_SeUn3_&akid=3995%2E22930333%2ESeUn3_) Donald Trump is terrified of losing the House, so Republicans are following his orders to try to steal **_five_** currently Democratic seats by gerrymandering Texas. They’ll try to execute their power grab **_this Monday_** at a special legislative session. Derek, we condemn this effort to rig elections, and we and our partners at the Texas Democratic Party are going to do everything we can to stop it. **The DNC and Democrats across Texas are ready to mobilize and fight this, but it’s going to take all of us to protect free and fair elections. [**If this fight matters to you, please split a donation today between the DNC and the Texas Democratic Party before the special session begins** _in just three days_**. Your donation today will ensure we have the resources we need to fight back against Texas Republicans.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?amount=10&refcode=em_20250718_3995_fr&refcode2=3995_22930333_SeUn3_&akid=3995%2E22930333%2ESeUn3_) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Texas Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250718_3995_fr&refcode2=3995_22930333_SeUn3_&akid=3995%2E22930333%2ESeUn3_)**

The Democrats

name: America First War Room
subject: Vietnam SOG Knife -- Free Gift.
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e53683903/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvOTJxWHFtR2c5ZA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsQjcwSTdQeQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN5Z0JTOXd2aTZyTTBscw/gaHrefw/sem48a92916)

[Dateline -- July 17th, 2025 -- U.S.A.]
Dear Freedom Loving Patriot:
I just received into my warehouse a **BRAND NEW product.** It's our new _"Commando"_ knife -- based on the original **Vietnam SOG blade** designed for covert operators.
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e53683903/VaHR0cHM6Ly9maWdodGZhc3QuY29tL29zbC9jbW5kby9pbmRleC5waHA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsQjcwSTdQeQ/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTI1LTA2/gaHrefw/s3vbf57bcb8)
This is one big beast -- over **12-1/2 inches** long.
Best Part: Because I'd like your feedback on this, I will now **_give you one_**...********for** FREE!**
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e53683903/VaHR0cHM6Ly9maWdodGZhc3QuY29tL29zbC9jbW5kby9pbmRleC5waHA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsQjcwSTdQeQ/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTI1LTA2/gaHrefw/s3vbf57bcb8)
[**> > Claim yours HERE! <<**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e53683903/VaHR0cHM6Ly9maWdodGZhc3QuY29tL29zbC9jbW5kby9pbmRleC5waHA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsQjcwSTdQeQ/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTI1LTA2/gaHrefw/s3vbf57bcb8)
_Okay, why am I giving away a**$100 knife?**_**** Well, in case you're not familiar with how this works...
...I have a small list of guys -- specifically **American men**(and a few women)**who like their gadgets** \-- that I target to test out my new products.
**YOU fit the profile.** You are on that _"hotlist"._ Which means you simply get treated better than everyone else.
All I ask is for some feedback, (and even that's not required).
[**> > Yes! I want one! <<**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e53683903/VaHR0cHM6Ly9maWdodGZhc3QuY29tL29zbC9jbW5kby9pbmRleC5waHA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsQjcwSTdQeQ/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTI1LTA2/gaHrefw/s3vbf57bcb8)
But this is a limited test with **just 200 Commandos** to go around.
For a safe life...
Bob Pierce
President, FightFast/TRS
**P.S.** Again, (and I can't stress this enough), this is for **Parler members only.** If you've personally received this email invite from me, **_that's YOU._**
However, if your buddy forwarded this email or something like that, sorry, you're not on the list and you won't be allowed to get one of these for free. (But it will be on my main website soon for _just $100 --_ a darn good price for this badass knife.)
**P.P.S.** With **only 200** to go around, this promotional giveaway _**could disappear at any time!**_

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e53683903/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MTg/LbmNsQjcwSTdQeQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN5Z0JTOXd2aTZyTTBscw/gaHrefw/s7icc7cf59a)
